name: Team Schiff
subject: 2 days away
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5414%2E5257348%2E2Hnx5l)
Derek — The next Senate debate is just _2 days away._
Adam will once again be taking the debate stage against multimillionaire celebrity Republican candidate, Steve Garvey.
**[Will you make sure we have the resources to run rapid response for the lies and attacks thrown Adam’s way?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240210_PM3_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5414%2E5257348%2E2Hnx5l)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240210_PM3_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=5&akid=5414%2E5257348%2E2Hnx5l)
---

| [EXPRESS DONATE $250](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240210_PM3_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=9&akid=5414%2E5257348%2E2Hnx5l)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240210_PM3_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=5414%2E5257348%2E2Hnx5l)
---
In the last debate, Steve Garvey called Adam a **liar** because he had the courage to investigate the connections between Trump’s presidential campaign and the Russian government, and to impeach him for attempting to extort Ukrainian President Zelenskyy into helping him cheat in the election.
**Here’s the truth: when Adam helped lead the House Intelligence Committee, he determined that Trump’s campaign gave internal campaign polling data to Russian intelligence. All the while, Russian intelligence was** _helping_** the Trump campaign.**
If unveiling the truth about foreign interference in our elections enrages the MAGA world, so be it. And if impeaching Trump over his multiple abuses of power subjects him to vile attack, Adam will stand tall. **He’s never going to stop protecting our democracy and defending our institutions.**
That’s what he plans on doing in the U.S. Senate — he’ll continue to hold Trump and his cronies to account.
But we need your help to get him there: **In just 48 hours, our team needs another 10,000 grassroots donors to help us reach undecided voters in California.**
**[Derek, can you rush $10 today to help us hit our pre-debate grassroots donor goal?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240210_PM3_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=11&akid=5414%2E5257348%2E2Hnx5l)**
Thank you for stepping up in support of Adam.
— Team Schiff

subject: [RAFFLE EVENT] Gear up before the Super Bowl
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-feb2024-fr-february?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-feb2024-fr-february?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Hey team,

We are thrilled to announce an exclusive opportunity for our community members — a chance to win one of three iconic Joe Montana jerseys courtesy of Team Swalwell! This special raffle celebrates the legendary career of Joe Montana, and gets you ready to root for the 49ers this Sunday.

Here's the best part: participation is absolutely FREE! No donation is required to enter, making this a unique chance for all fans to own a piece of football history.

How to Enter: Visit our raffle page, fill in your details, and confirm your participation with a click, and you're in! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JZpaeLtUA0yH0d5DjuML5Q2]

ENTER TO WIN » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JZpaeLtUA0yH0d5DjuML5Q2]

Remember, participation is entirely free and open to everyone - let your friends and family know so they can join in, too!

Don't miss this chance to win a piece of sports history. Enter now, spread the word, and stay tuned for the announcement of the winners. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JZpaeLtUA0yH0d5DjuML5Q2]

ENTER TO WIN » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JZpaeLtUA0yH0d5DjuML5Q2]

Good luck, and may the best fan win!

— Team Swalwell

P.S. After Sunday, the next biggest matchup of the year is this November. It’s more than a big game, it’ll decide the fate of our democracy. Help Eric get battle ready to take back the House by chipping in today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Feb2024-FR-February?&refcode=E6963-20240210-JerseyRaffle-SL-Other&amount=10]

name: DLCC Special Elections Team
subject: We cannot lose this special election...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
We’re counting on the support of this team to help power our candidate to victory, defend our majority in Pennsylvania, and crush our February fundraising goal. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**This Tuesday, we’re facing a must-win special election for a seat in the Pennsylvania House. Here’s the situation:** 👉 **Democrats won control of the PA House in the 2022 midterms** – _and since then we’ve defended our majority in five special elections._
**👉 The PA House is a key target chamber for state Republicans.** This special election isn't just an opportunity for Democrats to defend a key seat, it's an opportunity for Republicans to gain power in one of their target chambers ahead of November.
👉**S****pecial elections are notoriously underfunded, and results can come down to less than a dozen votes.** We need grassroots supporters like you, to give state Democrats the boost necessary to compete. **We’re counting on the support of this team to help power our candidate to victory on Tuesday.** [Will you pitch in a gift of $7 right now to help defeat the GOP and WIN in states like Pennsylvania and beyond? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgp4PY-Uezxt4gU70G4qur8TWTeoU77sPbla-0Br0NBSflYCussTWwDWde-9lpFDj5XZlos80AIQSzGNovRY4JKbp_ddr2p16Bj56e2zjk4nJBixNAREe2t2PDnSC6r3lqT03eptJL4w9Yqv88ZLy4johKJJbypcZck9OEUKGawxiz5JsEwm_eAj-51VnAmdRImh8ivj9Lsoolkg9-5n-dqvltpXoLFRdv6aChC8tDmugwffvoXFHfMs1k8pkOJmpux4pwvfLF8ubDwfhQXeK8lh-mllg1KvMQbXgzBEk6X5aB0pQzAG3DbISI3vk5KnbCn4wKAgMinPd5R2xIxe-d0JAYMsAg25iOT7v1o4PCdVDDcLVjnjrbrKa9s9h0YbJJ9if4jD43QvWayPfsiIz_Ho9H4uNIi6JfpuAAYzpmBJK31QBNKqLbwJy-U_J4S00_aj61N6nIEGqKL-GuuTDcFCwYXPSCH-HxkK_satAgdTVlEPici8ZzLC-61vm4dxkO2y8VWELXuExDJsNB-qBzbuQ/43r/jE7L7amdQfux8U4cY6L-8Q/h0/qaHGP2-9ITwFgu8J37LTaOBKu0oh3fyDZ0oVUDPUcBg) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: We’re counting on the support of this team to help power our candidate to victory, defend our majority in Pennsylvania, and crush our February fundraising goal. | | | | | ---|--- This Tuesday, we’re facing a must-win special election for a seat in the Pennsylvania House. Here’s the situation: 👉 Democrats won control of the PA House in the 2022 midterms – and since then we’ve defended our majority in five special elections. 👉 The PA House is a key target chamber for state Republicans. This special election isn't just an opportunity for Democrats to defend a key seat, it's an opportunity for Republicans to gain power in one of their target chambers ahead of November. 👉Special elections are notoriously underfunded, and results can come down to less than a dozen votes. We need grassroots supporters like you, to give state Democrats the boost necessary to compete. We’re counting on the support of this team to help power our candidate to victory on Tuesday. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Let's do this. name: Senate under ATTACK! (via VPP)
subject: this can’t become our new normal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
don’t let this happen ever again...
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61945?t=6&akid=12944%2E878179%2EbAAum5) | [**WE NEED 500 DEMOCRATS TO COMMIT TO SUPPORTING DEMOCRATIC HEROES LIKE SHERROD BROWN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61945?t=7&akid=12944%2E878179%2EbAAum5)
---
**WE TOLD YOU:** a new poll shows Sherrod Brown within the margin of error of losing his seat to any of his three potential Republican challengers.

**WE TOLD YOU:** Brown’s seat is expected to be one of the closest, most important races in 2024!

**WE TOLD YOU:** We missed our end-of-month ‘Battleground Senate Fund” by almost $1,500.
_We CANNOT let mess-ups like these become our new normal, not when we’re fighting to save our razor-thin Senate majority!_

**It’s time to step it up , because our country, our democracy, and Democratic heroes like Sherrod Brown are depending on it:[_Rush $7 now to our Battleground Senate Fund so we can start the month of February off right! »_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61945?t=8&akid=12944%2E878179%2EbAAum5)**
[**CHIP IN $7 NOW TO COMMIT TO DEFENDING OUR ONE-SEAT SENATE MAJORITY »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61945?t=9&akid=12944%2E878179%2EbAAum5)

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: What matters to you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
I got into politics because I wanted to shine a light on the issues that mattered most to working-class families like mine.
Growing up as the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran, my family instilled in me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence at a young age.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78785205/454456615/2128632416?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3424-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTFjYTAzMC03MWM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rXk5qlHBnT61cSJM9mROtZgpv7LiNgbUHOzSPI9X5RM=)
**Who I am and where I come from is why I will always fight to shine a light on the real issues Americans face, like finding good-paying jobs and lowering everyday costs.**
But right now, polls are showing me locked in a _dead heat_ against my extremist GOP opponent who is determined to bring all our progress to a grinding halt.
I'm the most vulnerable Democratic woman in the Senate this year, and experts are saying Nevada will likely decide Senate _and_ White House control. This race is a critical moment for all Americans to show what issues matter most to us.
**[_Will you give $5 or more right now to help me win in Nevada, defend the Senate, and shine a light on the issues that matter most to Americans instead of the MAGA agenda?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78785206/454456616/2128632416?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3424-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTFjYTAzMC03MWM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rXk5qlHBnT61cSJM9mROtZgpv7LiNgbUHOzSPI9X5RM=)**

That’s why I’m counting on your critical grassroots support to fight back and win. Senate control will all come down to Nevada – and I need to know you’re with me. [**Will you chip in now to win in Nevada and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78785213/454456785/1598999503?refcode=footer&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTFjYTAzMC03MWM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rXk5qlHBnT61cSJM9mROtZgpv7LiNgbUHOzSPI9X5RM=) You can also [**text JACKY to 30508**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78785214/454456786/1077135989?refcode=footer&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTFjYTAzMC03MWM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rXk5qlHBnT61cSJM9mROtZgpv7LiNgbUHOzSPI9X5RM=&emci=e4c25d9a-e9c5-ee11-b660-002248223848&emdi=ea1ca030-71c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=3800590) to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. clean_body: | | | Friend, I got into politics because I wanted to shine a light on the issues that mattered most to working-class families like mine. Growing up as the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran, my family instilled in me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence at a young age. = Who I am and where I come from is why I will always fight to shine a light on the real issues Americans face, like finding good-paying jobs and lowering everyday costs. But right now, polls are showing me locked in a dead heat against my extremist GOP opponent who is determined to bring all our progress to a grinding halt. I'm the most vulnerable Democratic woman in the Senate this year, and experts are saying Nevada will likely decide Senate and White House control. This race is a critical moment for all Americans to show what issues matter most to us. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, – Jacky | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen:** Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But experts say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and the GOP is zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat. That’s why I’m counting on your critical grassroots support to fight back and win. Senate control will all come down to Nevada – and I need to know you’re with me. = You can also to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Thank you, Jacky By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help. | | Dear Friend, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America’s baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, “Those were the days.” But this email isn’t about baseball. In fact, it’s a email I never thought I’d be writing to you.
---
| [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0-PmzAQxT-NuYHs8b_kwCFZElRVbaVsteqekLGHxBUOxJigfPuKNNrLHH7z5s17Joy97x4l0XsCcPFuIgCE7wjA7XMJcf4bvtc5u93-5Df1M8h1C28EID1G_JK-XAoMxvcr1VXmSt45KjIsmaZaMSY3OruU0gmtW2MptNBtnGg1GGU7tm0Na7dSZr4ECoICY5RykLJA226Qd1I50K4Vigj6_FOYgNFbw6a0mBiHIRR2CFlfXlIap2ewI4HjhHaOWCz-GtGtipUlvGN-NvGOj7wbYj5P-YRXk5DAUSurHe9aq7ZMCyEJP84pNNMwR4uEV_uqzk-HDwJqxQGdnwPh1eHHi1gTRuPPV8Kr_00oNPuqbt7rt13z-av-1pwOH837790pX8frKmFcXZbIsli6cfF97yeliaDnZ1k7hH8BAAD__3Gcg-A)

| | **Today,[I’m asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0-PmzAQxT-NuYHs8b_kwCFZElRVbaVsteqekLGHxBUOxJigfPuKNNrLHH7z5s17Joy97x4l0XsCcPFuIgCE7wjA7XMJcf4bvtc5u93-5Df1M8h1C28EID1G_JK-XAoMxvcr1VXmSt45KjIsmaZaMSY3OruU0gmtW2MptNBtnGg1GGU7tm0Na7dSZr4ECoICY5RykLJA226Qd1I50K4Vigj6_FOYgNFbw6a0mBiHIRR2CFlfXlIap2ewI4HjhHaOWCz-GtGtipUlvGN-NvGOj7wbYj5P-YRXk5DAUSurHe9aq7ZMCyEJP84pNNMwR4uEV_uqzk-HDwJqxQGdnwPh1eHHi1gTRuPPV8Kr_00oNPuqbt7rt13z-av-1pwOH837790pX8frKmFcXZbIsli6cfF97yeliaDnZ1k7hH8BAAD__3Gcg-A)** Today, I’m asking you to help me start a Republican Comeback Rally that folks will be talking about for generations to come. Because when you think about it, those ‘good-ol’ days of the 1970s weren’t as good as we tend to first remember. Baseball was just a welcome distraction from the gloom and malaise that had settled on our country thanks to one failed Democrat policy after another. I’m running for the United States Senate because 2024 America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: \- Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter’s rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. **_Remember?_** \- Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. **_Remember?_** \- Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. **_Remember??_** Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, “It’s déjà vu all over again.” There’s fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they _welcome_ the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Steve, I’m afraid America’s best days are behind us.” But listen, here’s something I also want you to remember... **_We Republicans_ ****pulled our country out of that 1970’s Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** **We put classic conservative values at the heart of everything we did.** **And America became a shining city upon a hill once more.** _**We can do that again**_**.** **It starts by stunning the Democrats with a Senate win in California.** **But there’s no way I can pull it off without you.** **That’s why I’m asking you to rush in your $35 donation today** I’m sorry for the urgency but _the primary is in less than three months_ and here’s where things stand... In March, I need to be one of the top 2 vote-getters to get to the November general election. Adam Schiff will probably take the #1 spot. And polls have me hot on his heels for the #2 spot. Once we’re passed the primary, I know with your help, I can beat him in November. Why? First... I’ve lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you –- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I’ve never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. Second... you know I’m not a career politician. But I do have the one thing a Republican needs to get elected in California... ...name recognition. I’m no Schwarzenegger and I’d certainly never dare compare myself to President Reagan. But California voters know me. And Adam Schiff and the Democrats are shaking in their boots seeing how quickly I rose in the polls after entering the race. As I’m writing you this email, there are just a few percentage points separating us. We’ve got a shot –- a very real shot -- of landing smack behind Schiff in the primary so we can go on to beat him in the general election. But there are just three months left until the primary. And the giant Democrat political machine is going to use every second of that time trying to bury me and our common sense message. **[**When you rush back your _Garvey for Senate_ campaign contribution of $35 or more...**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0-PmzAQxT-NuYHs8b_kwCFZElRVbaVsteqekLGHxBUOxJigfPuKNNrLHH7z5s17Joy97x4l0XsCcPFuIgCE7wjA7XMJcf4bvtc5u93-5Df1M8h1C28EID1G_JK-XAoMxvcr1VXmSt45KjIsmaZaMSY3OruU0gmtW2MptNBtnGg1GGU7tm0Na7dSZr4ECoICY5RykLJA226Qd1I50K4Vigj6_FOYgNFbw6a0mBiHIRR2CFlfXlIap2ewI4HjhHaOWCz-GtGtipUlvGN-NvGOj7wbYj5P-YRXk5DAUSurHe9aq7ZMCyEJP84pNNMwR4uEV_uqzk-HDwJqxQGdnwPh1eHHi1gTRuPPV8Kr_00oNPuqbt7rt13z-av-1pwOH837790pX8frKmFcXZbIsli6cfF97yeliaDnZ1k7hH8BAAD__3Gcg-A)** ...you’re helping fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: _You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free._ This race is the toughest in the nation. But they say the hardest thing to do in sports is hit a 95-mph fastball. And you know I’ve done that plenty of times. Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win in California as a common sense Republican. But I can’t do it without you. I’m fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I’m not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. It all depends on you! You can do nothing and continue to suffer the agony of defeat. Or you can **[**step up to the plate with me and take a swing for the thrill of victory**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0-PmzAQxT-NuYHs8b_kwCFZElRVbaVsteqekLGHxBUOxJigfPuKNNrLHH7z5s17Joy97x4l0XsCcPFuIgCE7wjA7XMJcf4bvtc5u93-5Df1M8h1C28EID1G_JK-XAoMxvcr1VXmSt45KjIsmaZaMSY3OruU0gmtW2MptNBtnGg1GGU7tm0Na7dSZr4ECoICY5RykLJA226Qd1I50K4Vigj6_FOYgNFbw6a0mBiHIRR2CFlfXlIap2ewI4HjhHaOWCz-GtGtipUlvGN-NvGOj7wbYj5P-YRXk5DAUSurHe9aq7ZMCyEJP84pNNMwR4uEV_uqzk-HDwJqxQGdnwPh1eHHi1gTRuPPV8Kr_00oNPuqbt7rt13z-av-1pwOH837790pX8frKmFcXZbIsli6cfF97yeliaDnZ1k7hH8BAAD__3Gcg-A)**. Please join me. Because when we win in California, we’re winning for all of America. Thank you and God Bless,
---

With your help, I know we can beat Adam Schiff in California and start the Republican Comeback Rally America needs. But the primary is in just three months. **[**So please rush campaign contribution of $35 or more as soon as you can.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0-PmzAQxT-NuYHs8b_kwCFZElRVbaVsteqekLGHxBUOxJigfPuKNNrLHH7z5s17Joy97x4l0XsCcPFuIgCE7wjA7XMJcf4bvtc5u93-5Df1M8h1C28EID1G_JK-XAoMxvcr1VXmSt45KjIsmaZaMSY3OruU0gmtW2MptNBtnGg1GGU7tm0Na7dSZr4ECoICY5RykLJA226Qd1I50K4Vigj6_FOYgNFbw6a0mBiHIRR2CFlfXlIap2ewI4HjhHaOWCz-GtGtipUlvGN-NvGOj7wbYj5P-YRXk5DAUSurHe9aq7ZMCyEJP84pNNMwR4uEV_uqzk-HDwJqxQGdnwPh1eHHi1gTRuPPV8Kr_00oNPuqbt7rt13z-av-1pwOH837790pX8frKmFcXZbIsli6cfF97yeliaDnZ1k7hH8BAAD__3Gcg-A)** Thank you! –Steve

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. | | Having you and all of America’s baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, “Those were the days.” But this email isn’t about baseball. In fact, it’s a email I never thought I’d be writing to you. | | | Today, Today, I’m asking you to help me start a Republican Comeback Rally that folks will be talking about for generations to come. Because when you think about it, those ‘good-ol’ days of the 1970s weren’t as good as we tend to first remember. Baseball was just a welcome distraction from the gloom and malaise that had settled on our country thanks to one failed Democrat policy after another. I’m running for the United States Senate because 2024 America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: \- Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter’s rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? \- Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? \- Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, “It’s déjà vu all over again.” There’s fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Steve, I’m afraid America’s best days are behind us.” But listen, here’s something I also want you to remember... We Republicans pulled our country out of that 1970’s Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan. We put classic conservative values at the heart of everything we did. And America became a shining city upon a hill once more. We can do that again. It starts by stunning the Democrats with a Senate win in California. But there’s no way I can pull it off without you. That’s why I’m asking you to rush in your $35 donation today I’m sorry for the urgency but the primary is in less than three months and here’s where things stand... In March, I need to be one of the top 2 vote-getters to get to the November general election. Adam Schiff will probably take the #1 spot. And polls have me hot on his heels for the #2 spot. Once we’re passed the primary, I know with your help, I can beat him in November. Why? First... I’ve lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you –- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I’ve never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. Second... you know I’m not a career politician. But I do have the one thing a Republican needs to get elected in California... ...name recognition. I’m no Schwarzenegger and I’d certainly never dare compare myself to President Reagan. But California voters know me. And Adam Schiff and the Democrats are shaking in their boots seeing how quickly I rose in the polls after entering the race. As I’m writing you this email, there are just a few percentage points separating us. We’ve got a shot –- a very real shot -- of landing smack behind Schiff in the primary so we can go on to beat him in the general election. But there are just three months left until the primary. And the giant Democrat political machine is going to use every second of that time trying to bury me and our common sense message. ...you’re helping fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free. This race is the toughest in the nation. But they say the hardest thing to do in sports is hit a 95-mph fastball. And you know I’ve done that plenty of times. Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win in California as a common sense Republican. But I can’t do it without you. I’m fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I’m not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. It all depends on you! You can do nothing and continue to suffer the agony of defeat. Or you can . Please join me. Because when we win in California, we’re winning for all of America. Thank you and God Bless, | | Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | P.S. It’s the bottom of the 9th and Republicans desperately need a homerun. We simply can’t let another election slip through our fingers while Democrats go on destroying our country. With your help, I know we can beat Adam Schiff in California and start the Republican Comeback Rally America needs. But the primary is in just three months. Thank you! –Steve | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE | | |

name: Dr. Jill Biden
subject: My thoughts on this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
| | |
---
Peter, I’ve heard from so many of you asking about the Special Counsel's report this week. Thank you for your love and support. You probably know the basics: Joe cooperated fully with a Special Counsel’s investigation and they found he did nothing wrong -- no criminal charges were warranted. [**I thought Heather Cox Richardson wrote about it eloquently here.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.SLdqY4re9NRChJwFnQ0irybX0AMCXn6oRKpS-X9TZ3gDDFG6M4szry_zUUBPYjTv9dOV6pqs_zWe7KN0kn4EFPqwfaVyEWtE8405sc2GkXe2EK0Al2bVvdM4WX65jTlQbuIIvLv9ON8tTEmaupCXog5EaIm4PlrHuE6vZjod7TlJ_Ul8LCyj9ifT5T0W1KbGEqnTgRXknHErGufqNcWrdvOGk5syHpFvIjJ3_eQP8SBd-QRyTL4WyO7jc0jWxd83zL1UYKeM2MmmJ4D7xnwGnt_3bcMpCvjfYm4Vv4Fnp4IxWH5hXhsLXXrYty9i5CjISDoaXO1enVCq1ZT9tq029kGtxnUCXJKRtK625M50GwXd9Mnb-6RfG_dSJFm0fSNoBH4o442WGUMqjMxL1BZ5OA/43r/h1-DaLbmRX2v4OY9v3xO2g/h0/h001.DeyN3JxF7z0lSOxde_U2w4yc9KXyRaW0nzIusqK6I8U) The reason I’m writing is because of what else was in the report: Inaccurate and personal political attacks about Joe. Rather than just saying the case was closed, as they have for others, the Special Counsel claimed that Joe “couldn’t remember the year his son died.” Believe me, like anyone who has lost a child, Beau and his death never leave him. I hope you can imagine how it felt to read that attack -- not just as Joe’s wife, but as Beau’s mother. I don’t know what this Special Counsel was trying to achieve. We should give everyone grace, and I can’t imagine someone would try to use our son’s death to score political points. If you’ve experienced a loss like that, you know that you don’t measure it in years -- you measure it in grief. May 30th is a day forever etched on our hearts. It shattered me, it shattered our family. So many of you know that feeling after you lose a loved one, where you feel like you can’t get off the floor. What helped me, and what helped Joe, was to find purpose. That’s what keeps Joe going, serving you and the country we love. Joe is 81, that’s true, but he’s 81 doing more in an hour than most people do in a day. Joe has wisdom, empathy, and vision. He has delivered on so many of his promises as President precisely because he’s learned a lot in those 81 years. His age, with his experience and expertise, is an incredible asset and he proves it every day. Look at all he’s accomplished: He brought our country back from COVID. He brought our economy back from the brink. He created 14 million jobs. Gas prices are down. Inflation is down. Energy costs are down. He got bipartisan legislation passed -- even in the midst of this hyper-partisan environment. The media may not give him credit, but I’m thankful you realize all he’s done for this country. Joe is the most resilient person I’ve ever known. When he gets knocked down, he gets back up and gets back to work. That’s what he’s doing. It is just so meaningful to both of us to have you behind us. Your support is what keeps this campaign moving forward. At some point in our lives, we’ll all experience grief or loss. We’ll go through challenging moments and twists and turns. But we find joy together, we persevere together, and ultimately we’ll prevail together. Thank you for being part of our campaign. Love, Jill | | | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jwo48Pzlh6he5y-OY0IheoZhFy919hdCv12HrtNldlhUcmU8kNNeWqw72o-XGJveNbUqJAV6Zzz9sjTzCCcsCVYxbE5imRiiYxnpRwd1cAUXfxkNu0Hj6_6FytYy8zuPAULKeHO6r3ECdLBqM_Fz4dq11RHYQfGiYvgdZXOjsdzLCDBmgNCRPFYiqCX3hOc1KhI421QELYMaJSTEPHnUlcDcWRQWuZRCfP8wINZWniX41E1jedHuYDas7TCEHJDVoOUyM7Urz6iJUN5SL-2msNYCMX2wTzi38pynh2aAB6FyqyNBXtY2XJwkB3oqw9O_h5eoIZkYgIXKp1sExXgb0Ec4pWbuCkGymui5IgVIsjoB45pc8a9zJgo27yclb2MpGrELEkN7vUYozbfq-zJMX65ibESnMDjY_fiVwUy3r16yv45Z7_wd4_ACgbU8SwRhJIoBV8cFe3DUtesxLA86FzMFNmwDnNHmrappknZ_J3AmemO33YHA9Xx3WGYkAvBHdU/43r/h1-DaLbmRX2v4OY9v3xO2g/h1/h001.Y_mmwsfrGmKga_H-GYouoGCmGJOvwZqgw-hWsN-_vsU)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you so much for being a supporter of President Biden and Vice President Harris. But Peter, we don’t want to bother you. If you’d like to only receive our most important emails, **[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-73i6pENRDbuwkW190gLNkiHzsGbVDb9qKB3X6jTEEB3L4g7bvuAlkDUTE96Vx_2J0NNj9OXzDh5MnQ_1CNSnflJ66MphJ4euHqu_aoQjEHIPtP48nyPdRtzM02Me0UBuTTps6zp-3JhVXm9FKLsPW0hNqXEmy5f4YkBv6iJcti9nE24hiPYTSSQqBkd4UH58-XPoSgj6M85PBAzYoi8sBjIlM_ocDxI79E_leIv5BQd_rcMDnAvQmPD1BhGmWespfCl_z-in7rKRMrdrUtF8ibT7uXVhJI7BbQ_NPY-y7_w/43r/h1-DaLbmRX2v4OY9v3xO2g/h2/h001.ylVMFpHzxFi4wDIsSZlB4pPBP8EC-tP1sk8vkEmDJd4)** If you’d like to unsubscribe from all Biden for President emails, you can **[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39WJZTHRJqGvE3cLKyMy_TghoXqo8YnYuBKuyQYSoT0ydHJ7p_7WHvdo0YGrK0BB6EbN8RFVAQcHaB2jX2_Zd-2M4xN11PE0N88L34K72SQC6vifHzdwwF-SjqKU7MncdhQORjhHdKIeLcAmlJdjBpxo_72tFsH012Au8YiMEjaHpPodvGddTQqSLz2Dj6zWGeyY1pQnyMcgsKGaByk1cR-vNIY8xBsZY-JCyeeSKoRMgvuGAMzrQXO-xbFxJAp5ASMglsgavPWriHgQUvan1mFs40pYVmH7USSIkMv2HIwTA/43r/h1-DaLbmRX2v4OY9v3xO2g/h3/h001.v2VTSiHywZOjrx6QMoKE92sry-Qhi-hfoiR7mqoFcdE)**

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jwo48Pzlh6he5y-OY0IheoZsASVkSCCIQpEX82jZHyMjYSQprJxkNoPv3yhRTE4_T4m1rX94t3YfYZ7885M0ENGnxCOlsHnfmj0-ICLdsNI-4upP5ohIimVit2yi8uAe09zPbtB6dEGFXZUzc_C6gRhLtn68OD7h_DPzs4JJWl9zKXD3Mc0FYGSicEmcRcRcjRSeBcWzjdSeWIaTcoTIVnLwS5SIxewz7ym_85YIFC9yx_RAq8M6PPSIOGp4RpQQBjjL-pHyPYp2zNFJBAMHWiLwmpkh6tCwDtEcjQlC4GT3BZ_ictPTMd6NNbGvw3L2MVquXZoSh7PgRROHvZg4gvv2kDg3oiy4oUdGCosGtLR028h9G0IFdaQbUpVraZXMAYz21bazfMPlay43RZLspjoIY9K9hBxxv8LUEKu2NU978a7tA_3F2mQYQb2F81T52QLb6zQcxMkWEdDsJg6x_Go/43r/h1-DaLbmRX2v4OY9v3xO2g/h4/h001.btVxdAHtjWYB9p8cDIl9GnosVvm7-4oYPP6DZyVz2YI)

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.

| Paid for by Biden for President.

Fellow American,

****I hate to have to tell you this, but I’m losing.****

I’ll be brief. I didn’t want it to come to this point, but I need your help. Time is running out.**Anything you can chip in will make the difference between victory and defeat.**

All of this starts with a win in AZ-08. Your support will get us back in the race but you have to _**act fast.**_

I need your help to collect the resources needed to take on my opponents in the district, so I’m asking you to rush an emergency donation ASAP. Every dollar you give will go toward putting together a MAGA grassroots infrastructure to knock doors, gather petition signatures, confirm election day voting plans, launch TV and radio ads, and more.

**[I can’t do this without you - please, step up now.](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=70bccbb107b4408cb518ef5754dd6d4c&_e=Srh73qzUzVxxPPvDg0ck5iWdoKltjFDy_nfK5GWdQ7U1ZeFc90E3VJXuzwWH2Fr9WdZBZlr9O9YJsUJW1rKqNnwOtZyZVB0IH-dTIDwlXIQyOVtMLck5zX3PBPE2lXShK_pnHPjPRcj-yik73Dsf6Nk-IRVUotLMD82zOPX_kWsdYaer15AxjkZNyZjgSFQmPeRedeWk2yNf6H6jO6HlCORMxhrVMrni6wPXbuC1cV_aac0qhqwfzbTJuhX5jfGC3Zh7vBTKq6qYELhMWpChwClHfasi_D2xnZqnW3-m-uu0lmfGAam0ZpfEAs55jNMHOauUitZ8U2hbiy-SfMVitbhnay_NL_MGuoJyQ984l1B_GPjZ04vG64t5110VJmYn2FAzr0Kdx4tO2Ay8scgdgg%3D%3D)**

For Arizona,
Abe

subject: The lowest approval rating of any GOP Senator up for re-election this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Josh Hawley made himself vulnerable.
#
Peter — you wanna know why Josh Hawley has the worst approval rating of any Republican U.S. Senator running for re-election this year?
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43688?refcode=em20240210-4790&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4790%2E614464%2E5dYU4W)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43688?refcode=em20240210-4790&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4790%2E614464%2E5dYU4W)**
**He’s led the charge to criminalize abortion.** He even used his position in the U.S. Senate to support _his wife’s_ lawsuit to ban the most commonly used abortion pill that _his donor judge_ ruled in favor of last year.
**He’s betrayed working families.** From voting against investment in industry and job creation here in Missouri, to supporting anti-union “Right-to-Work” laws, Hawley has proved over and over that working families across our state can’t count on him to fight for them in the U.S. Senate.
**He’s shown all of us that he’s just a fraud and a coward.** On January 6, 2021, Hawley showed us who he really is — just a fraud who will raise his fist when he thinks it makes himself look strong, then runs away like a coward the moment things get real. Missourians haven’t forgotten that.
**And now, Josh Hawley is in a neck-and-neck race with Lucas Kunce.** He’s made this race our best chance to defeat a GOP incumbent and flip a U.S. Senate seat — and Lucas still has time to take the lead:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43688?refcode=em20240210-4790&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4790%2E614464%2E5dYU4W)

On January 6, 2021, Hawley showed us who he really is — just a fraud who will raise his fist when he thinks it makes himself look strong, then runs away like a coward the moment things get real. Missourians haven’t forgotten that. And now, Josh Hawley is in a neck-and-neck race with Lucas Kunce. He’s made this race our best chance to defeat a GOP incumbent and flip a U.S. Senate seat — and Lucas still has time to take the lead: With so much on the line in this election, you have a chance to make a difference by supporting Lucas Kunce, a real warrior for working people, in his race against Josh Hawley. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Between securing abortion rights and sending a real warrior for working people to represent Missouri in the U.S. Senate, we can’t do any of it without your help. Thanks for everything, Team Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

The rumors that Michelle Obama was preparing to run for president in 2024 gained steam over the last several weeks. A spate of public comments and targeted leaks by Barack and Michelle only added to the speculation about her political intentions. And Michelle Obama gave this final answer about replacing Joe Biden as the nominee. name: BREAKING Supreme Court News [From House GOP]
subject: Coordinated smear campaign against Justice Thomas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
It’s happening on the SAME DAY as Trump’s ballot removal case began

| |

---
| | | _The Hill: Democrats rip Clarence Thomas for not recusing himself from Supreme Court Trump argument_
* * *

Please listen carefully:

**Top Democrats just launched a coordinated smear campaign against Justice Clarence Thomas on the SAME DAY as Trump’s ballot removal case began.**

They tried forcing Justice Thomas to recuse himself... They tried unleashing partisan investigations against him... They even tried impeaching him...

All of it was designed to remove him from the bench for key cases like this!
---
| | | [HELP US DEFEND JUSTICE THOMAS](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39169%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gP%2fQesYiDl0d1u8pqB7VOg&sysid=1 "HELP US DEFEND JUSTICE THOMAS")
---
You see, here’s the dirty secret:

**If he STEPS DOWN from the bench:** Democrats will hope the Supreme Court would then rule in favor of removing Trump from the ballot and also rake in cash from their Trump-hating donors.

**If he STAYS on the bench:** Democrats get to claim the Supreme Court ruling is partisan, use it to push for packing the Court with Liberal activists, and rake in cash from their Trump-hating donors.

Either way, they see it as a win-win. _**[That’s why we’re calling all Conservatives to stand with Justice Thomas in the midst of this unprecedented smear campaign and help save our Conservative Supreme Court Majority.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39160%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6NGnBDVzrdN9YuuKwv6m3g&sysid=1 "That’s why we’re calling
all Conservatives to stand with Justice Thomas in the midst of this unprecedented
smear campaign and help save our Conservative Supreme Court Majority.")**_
---

We could really use your help right now.

Thank you.

- House Republicans

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Help me strike out Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683465%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2xnVignGwL4bBjCrqd89Uw&sysid=1)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683466%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B32D1Six1cvH%2boigtFnDvg&sysid=1)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That’s a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683467%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vJ19gp5UpywXbqJi006hww&sysid=1)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683468%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1LvqdvJZ75GMqkoy2lZqjA&sysid=1)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683469%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HhlxitbT%2fgtPypIYRuX4lg&sysid=1)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683460%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jwVp29KgIOW%2fyjFyTB6kuQ&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683461%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DjtGuqD4rPV6cCRVFyhcKQ&sysid=1)
---
[**Join My Campaign**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683462%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7PuAKaAGoGb5HlH3C6EuLA&sysid=1)
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683465%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2xnVignGwL4bBjCrqd89Uw&sysid=1)
---
| | **PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE**
---
PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389
---
| |
---
|
---

American Update
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683463%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HVW%2fXsCQqQtK0JBMKgyBHQ&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683464%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oPOrY%2btwSBLmMFg%2b0sIvkA&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c2388%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=25DZQFx0KV3Asop65vdqIA&sysid=1)

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Moment to talk?
body:
I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpvgcrjd1ut39vp21r5rqsojrrqip9tudne6k1vo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj7cth2bs)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcutfikmihpdp1q08rg2ap3kv0p68aikjiau06q0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj7cth2bs "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlpui7br8bjt5i3pjl3dfmfj07k8mrhl742k1oug_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj7cth2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z400lil69hu7r44fqf7dn4d3qdcu0l3vng5gl1ag_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj7cth2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvv3lv9vea7t7itvgs0pdtprncplmnrehe98rd38_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj7cth2bs)
---

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if every single person _reading this today_ could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z105ar3kook4ade0pq83r7n3bgm881ovm03i9rtg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj7cth2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5mhe5r31bsqq1q3cmqebkqhhj79goovcu910i78_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj7cth2bs "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?")**

---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpmrcq78vef3e78kc54121sq1mr5nlonhjo6b7io_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj7cth2bs)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help- starting right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za0f1eh1rl1i61t1d0ghsjn5ee6v4ftav2opgil8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj7cth2bs "I need your help – starting right now. ")**

Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlldctjqgbnooo7apgodacgqdnc61sk11thm8vko_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj7cth2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmbvo4rqj56sln2fmsi2daadnsd2a2tj0d1kub78_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj7cth2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znrvcmk54tb76d8nom8onh0caoqmc2i38vb68v4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj7cth2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z87nb0d0m04m867fgnij4sg57bbrd0c7c938jmo8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj7cth2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvuq5p6n1ip68471pjecpfs1u8ujjtuv7atuj438_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj7cth2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkheg3agqar0e5p1vktm6vt2qm5nooom98crnom8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj7cth2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znhpmuchg3jc31vksgd77hn59n6r1hfhjr6dakng_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj7cth2bs "DONATE")
---

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmr6ka23qcrt5liv9kaeg6jqdd74ckeojbi599j8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj7cth2bs)
---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi13cus58l4cvou5ndubo1n6pk4p6kvfsn634lh8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9oj1clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo9e9qeep3qtjunko6mkkggvho9s8952vqrd70lg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9oj1clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1djhoe2e7o1rknrd5qnthlnj84av2k5doqls0v0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9oj1clh2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Pro Life Update
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: ICYMI News
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zehaqmadufquqpar8tdfklh55r6ecmul5l1955dg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj6clh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6o2h8grb0s68120e7u6e5tb2ordro9ofgdclpq0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj6clh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqnkkc91f06dk48o8tjtqt26iqatejgni2tek4h8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdgm9pj6clh2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Moment to talk?
body:
I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39172%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WOKeLKsgwRnqIUQys%2fpZrw&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America’s future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39173%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dNbn0jgxcgIlo63m6Bxcwg&sysid=1 "Once you’ve finished
reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund
my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39172%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WOKeLKsgwRnqIUQys%2fpZrw&sysid=1)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family’s business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _“Don’t complain. Do something about it.” _
---
| | | So, that’s exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn’t easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39172%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WOKeLKsgwRnqIUQys%2fpZrw&sysid=1)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn’t know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn’t have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the “kick me” sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn’t know what hit them.

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39172%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WOKeLKsgwRnqIUQys%2fpZrw&sysid=1)
---

Now, I’m running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if every single person _reading this today_ could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>](https://secure.winred.com/team-stand-for-america/support-nikki-now-underdog-tv?sc=PRentalTV&recurring=true&utm_campaign=20240201_PA-YAN2.113737_nikki-haley_t1433358-2667&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=PA-YAN2.113737&utm_content=20240111_moment-to-talk&ex_tid=20240111_PA-YAN2.113737_nikki-haley_t1433358-2667&utm_content=tv-yan2-20240211&xunv=tv-yan2-20240211 "It would mean a lot to me
if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help
me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! ")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39174%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=muDaIqb%2b7ScUX%2bZmH070EQ&sysid=1 "Will you consider making a
one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?")**

---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT TODAY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39185%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bEuY6PImq%2fgr6k0qKAJk8A&sysid=1)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I’m hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help- starting right now.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39186%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fE9fR9I6SNWOnUYNylgtBg&sysid=1 "I need your help –
starting right now. ")**

Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39172%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WOKeLKsgwRnqIUQys%2fpZrw&sysid=1)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [DONATE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39187%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Gk%2brI2yZ3xfAtd2rXkq9GQ&sysid=1)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39188%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VWY7uKkcOxFTL9esNKWe9A&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39189%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hTxAduiI8MBCUEg%2f1f%2bG%2bQ&sysid=1 "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39180%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3cDhzKsyQH8KFZUc9MDN0w&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39181%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YMC0fMT6qtv%2fVsbic8jQ7w&sysid=1 "Will you join me today and
help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39182%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1yOwJb4QihlDrDgLwX%2fUvw&sysid=1 "DONATE")

clean_body: I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. | | | | | | Friend, Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America’s future. Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family’s business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: “Don’t complain. Do something about it.” | | | So, that’s exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn’t easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn’t know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn’t have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the “kick me” sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn’t know what hit them. | Now, I’m running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?" | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I’m hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, "I need your help – starting right now. " Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf.
