name: Nikki Haley
subject: Moment to talk?
body:
I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zan3vroevi6tuqo8gga33pfeh1jq46ql5f97ghsg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o74cph2bs)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4h73mgfvt842k4ojp4jn1uq7n7dp758ejj4ab08_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o74cph2bs "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zviqfhbji9tmbijvs9p9t17p6n5ni4havovr8a50_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o74cph2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za5rjjaqup2jogera7vahjgflepn6r061r1nrlm0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o74cph2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z48j0verdtb4sfrnlpoi46fvcpmrl05in5f8podo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o74cph2bs)
---

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if every single person _reading this today_ could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2r49rv4foiltaac17a7j4qnn8j5fhlljc91t6jg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o74cph2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl5f72o2ks1bv95f3lphhrqfuicc6icjshrl3rvg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o74cph2bs "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?")**

---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn97r8147m917rs6ndpdsmoc3te8gc6g4hfsdoi8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o74cph2bs)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help- starting right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp4hvlg62f5m0e4tmla80v6ad3dhrdadf8fbidpg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o74cph2bs "I need your help – starting right now. ")**

Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgg345gj7jtlu4m4q4t8r2kfeeu6v52pskbtsrb8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o74cph2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9fn36kcqgbq9anoj0j5qi0mjuo9v1rjam1u9ha0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o74cph2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4jbm0245npudkkb8gprmneeokqcvfjnvftegpqo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o74cph2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z62hj99nnqfp4e8mje8656l7huopv2bhndovssn8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o74cph2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3gjb8rpoikrj2phuuarua5jv9ckuemg0d15vue0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o74cph2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znrjfbiqinirfcebu29hi3j0kumtf46tdv3iudj0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o74cph2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp761qpcm5765mb4oh87ltr0oti1ojjh15p9nlcg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o74cph2bs "DONATE")
---

body:

**Look, I know you get a lot of these emails, but this one is different. Let me tell you why ....**

When I was Speaker, every Special Election meant **ALL HANDS ON DECK. **

And the Special Election in New York on Tuesday is no different.

name: David Horowitz
subject: What’s really going on in Israel
body:
...and I don’t know about you, but I choose Civilization.

| | | It’s not Palestine vs Israel. It’s Jihad vs Civilization... **...and I don’t know about you, but I choose Civilization.** You see, the rabid pro-Palestine protesters hate America just as much as they hate Israel. In fact, they would love nothing more than to destroy Israel AND America. _The genocidal bloodlust that fuels Hamas is alive and well right here on our own soil._ **And while talking heads try to tow the line and refuse to accurately report on what’s happening in Israel or right here in America, we’ve been at it for over 30 years now.** My name is David Horowitz, and I’ve been talking about Jihad so long, the Southern Poverty Law Center put me on their bogus “hate list” over a decade ago and they’ve been trying to destroy me and my organization ever since. _But I don’t care what lists they put me on or what they call me._ They can call me a “bigot”... They can call me an “Islamophobe”... **But they can’t call me a LIAR.** I’ve been in the trenches with my colleagues at the Freedom Center, exposing the dark underbelly of Islamic extremism – and how the radical Left has enabled it at home and abroad. And I won’t stop. That’s why I teamed up with some of the most talented and renowned writers in the conservative movement to author _Jihad vs Civilization_ – and why I want to send you a copy right away. But before I send you a copy, I have to ask you something. **[Will you consider giving a generous, tax-deductible gift of $25 or more to the Freedom Center today, so that we’re able to keep producing and distributing our critical work?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdfcr2r7246n8kp4jrk0uj8921enktee94ie0ngg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o71c3h2bs)** This pamphlet is some of the hardest hitting analysis and reporting on Israel, Palestine, Jihad and Western Civilization as a whole. We’ve written plenty of pamphlets individually, but we came together to publish this one because we know just how deep the media is trying to bury the truth... And we didn’t want to skip ANYTHING. We knew we had to pour into this pamphlet with excruciating detail because Islamic militants have been waging war on America and Israel long before October 7th and September 11th. They’ve taken hold of our universities, and they’re quickly gaining ground across our culture. **We’re in a fight for our survival, and we can’t afford to lose.** And there’s no faster way to guarantee our defeat than by underestimating who and what it is we’re up against. **[That’s why the Freedom Center’s work is so important, and why I hope I can count on your urgent gift today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt9i518l54976uoap49fobidsm76gb8k060eh1sg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o71c3h2bs)** And as a thank you for your generosity, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of _Jihad vs Civilization._ I promise you, it doesn’t get more thorough than this. Each page is packed with the research and expertise of seasoned thought leaders – and of course the shocking admissions of Islamic extremists in their own words. _Remember – they can call me lots of things, but they can’t call me a liar._ All I’ve done is tell the truth. All I’ve done is expose their hatred – and their unholy alliance with the radical Left. And I need your help to continue this work. **So please don’t hesitate:[donate $25 or more to the Freedom Center so that my colleagues and I have the resources we need to equip the American people in the fight for our future.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd5m3crkhb9qbtcm6df6u2ojrl4vufcd8n93kpk8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o71c3h2bs)** The Freedom Center has been the Left’s number one enemy for years now because they know just how effective we are. We aren’t a “think tank” – we’re a battle tank. And we won’t win this war without you.
---
Sincerely,
---
| |
---
David Horowitz
---
[**DONATE**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv301e7vb12ocbp1lajveu25s27pljrm46goeaho_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o71c3h2bs)

name: BREAKING Supreme Court News [From House GOP]
subject: Coordinated smear campaign against Justice Thomas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
It’s happening on the SAME DAY as Trump’s ballot removal case began

| |

---
| | | _The Hill: Democrats rip Clarence Thomas for not recusing himself from Supreme Court Trump argument_
* * *

Please listen carefully:

**Top Democrats just launched a coordinated smear campaign against Justice Clarence Thomas on the SAME DAY as Trump 's ballot removal case began.**

They tried forcing Justice Thomas to recuse himself... They tried unleashing partisan investigations against him... They even tried impeaching him...

All of it was designed to remove him from the bench for key cases like this!
---
| | | [HELP US DEFEND JUSTICE THOMAS](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs2rkc545q75nl0p23gon2m3v5v2lbm5bpecmug8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o72c5h2bs "HELP US DEFEND JUSTICE THOMAS")
---
You see, here's the dirty secret:

**If he STEPS DOWN from the bench:** Democrats will hope the Supreme Court would then rule in favor of removing Trump from the ballot and also rake in cash from their Trump-hating donors.

**If he STAYS on the bench:** Democrats get to claim the Supreme Court ruling is partisan, use it to push for packing the Court with Liberal activists, and rake in cash from their Trump-hating donors.

Either way, they see it as a win-win. _**[That's why we're calling all Conservatives to stand with Justice Thomas in the midst of this unprecedented smear campaign and help save our Conservative Supreme Court Majority.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg4fvppdk825aveegbio4nk435b9j1o78k0lhklo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o72c5h2bs "That’s why we’re calling all Conservatives to stand with Justice Thomas in the midst of this unprecedented smear campaign and help save our Conservative Supreme Court Majority.")**_

We could really use your help right now.

Thank you.

- House Republicans

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want to know your thoughts
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znu79ib3dk92mn1907vlvatootrljoq3ap5kkrgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o70clh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs760dgdsh2h6a4tlg4pjsmkckq0um7267n5dt2g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o70clh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpc2qus14g0spghj3quhopk1dhbaei0ut2co8aao_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o70clh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8f0bplost6n7uorca7p0uu84sh37taoio6cpcq0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o70clh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

|

name: David Horowitz
subject: They can call me an Islamophobe but they can’tcall me a liar
body:
It’s not Palestine vs Israel.

| | | It’s not Palestine vs Israel. It’s Jihad vs Civilization... **...and I don’t know about you, but I choose Civilization.** You see, the rabid pro-Palestine protesters hate America just as much as they hate Israel. In fact, they would love nothing more than to destroy Israel AND America. _The genocidal bloodlust that fuels Hamas is alive and well right here on our own soil._ **And while talking heads try to tow the line and refuse to accurately report on what’s happening in Israel or right here in America, we’ve been at it for over 30 years now.** My name is David Horowitz, and I’ve been talking about Jihad so long, the Southern Poverty Law Center put me on their bogus “hate list” over a decade ago and they’ve been trying to destroy me and my organization ever since. _But I don’t care what lists they put me on or what they call me._ They can call me a “bigot”... They can call me an “Islamophobe”... **But they can’t call me a LIAR.** I’ve been in the trenches with my colleagues at the Freedom Center, exposing the dark underbelly of Islamic extremism – and how the radical Left has enabled it at home and abroad. And I won’t stop. That’s why I teamed up with some of the most talented and renowned writers in the conservative movement to author _Jihad vs Civilization_ – and why I want to send you a copy right away. But before I send you a copy, I have to ask you something. **[Will you consider giving a generous, tax-deductible gift of $25 or more to the Freedom Center today, so that we’re able to keep producing and distributing our critical work?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z79ap551uvn077jhutc41l4gvf6dqpvg5n6unnn8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o70cjh2bs)** This pamphlet is some of the hardest hitting analysis and reporting on Israel, Palestine, Jihad and Western Civilization as a whole. We’ve written plenty of pamphlets individually, but we came together to publish this one because we know just how deep the media is trying to bury the truth... And we didn’t want to skip ANYTHING. We knew we had to pour into this pamphlet with excruciating detail because Islamic militants have been waging war on America and Israel long before October 7th and September 11th. They’ve taken hold of our universities, and they’re quickly gaining ground across our culture. **We’re in a fight for our survival, and we can’t afford to lose.** And there’s no faster way to guarantee our defeat than by underestimating who and what it is we’re up against. **[That’s why the Freedom Center’s work is so important, and why I hope I can count on your urgent gift today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq8q8jnfj0jdeopujrd0n69fbimon0fhhalke8g8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o70cjh2bs)** And as a thank you for your generosity, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of _Jihad vs Civilization._ I promise you, it doesn’t get more thorough than this. Each page is packed with the research and expertise of seasoned thought leaders – and of course the shocking admissions of Islamic extremists in their own words. _Remember – they can call me lots of things, but they can’t call me a liar._ All I’ve done is tell the truth. All I’ve done is expose their hatred – and their unholy alliance with the radical Left. And I need your help to continue this work. **So please don’t hesitate:[donate $25 or more to the Freedom Center so that my colleagues and I have the resources we need to equip the American people in the fight for our future.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6a72ckmbbsup1681no7ebr0bbob2tvppiccbshg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim4o70cjh2bs)** The Freedom Center has been the Left’s number one enemy for years now because they know just how effective we are. We aren’t a “think tank” – we’re a battle tank. And we won’t win this war without you.
---
Sincerely,

David Horowitz

You see, the rabid pro-Palestine protesters hate America just as much as they hate Israel. In fact, they would love nothing more than to destroy Israel AND America. The genocidal bloodlust that fuels Hamas is alive and well right here on our own soil. And while talking heads try to tow the line and refuse to accurately report on what’s happening in Israel or right here in America, we’ve been at it for over 30 years now. My name is David Horowitz, and I’ve been talking about Jihad so long, the Southern Poverty Law Center put me on their bogus “hate list” over a decade ago and they’ve been trying to destroy me and my organization ever since. But I don’t care what lists they put me on or what they call me. They can call me a “bigot”... They can call me an “Islamophobe”... But they can’t call me a LIAR. I’ve been in the trenches with my colleagues at the Freedom Center, exposing the dark underbelly of Islamic extremism – and how the radical Left has enabled it at home and abroad. And I won’t stop. That’s why I teamed up with some of the most talented and renowned writers in the conservative movement to author Jihad vs Civilization – and why I want to send you a copy right away. But before I send you a copy, I have to ask you something. This pamphlet is some of the hardest hitting analysis and reporting on Israel, Palestine, Jihad and Western Civilization as a whole. We’ve written plenty of pamphlets individually, but we came together to publish this one because we know just how deep the media is trying to bury the truth... And we didn’t want to skip ANYTHING. We knew we had to pour into this pamphlet with excruciating detail because Islamic militants have been waging war on America and Israel long before October 7th and September 11th. They’ve taken hold of our universities, and they’re quickly gaining ground across our culture. We’re in a fight for our survival, and we can’t afford to lose. And as a thank you for your generosity, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of Jihad vs Civilization. I promise you, it doesn’t get more thorough than this. Each page is packed with the research and expertise of seasoned thought leaders – and of course the shocking admissions of Islamic extremists in their own words. Remember – they can call me lots of things, but they can’t call me a liar. All I’ve done is tell the truth. All I’ve done is expose their hatred – and their unholy alliance with the radical Left. subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you this
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39108%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gmUxoe%2bCBm1rpjz%2fQJEqZg&sysid=1)
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39109%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z3PF4H9OD%2fuehGN374FGGw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world’s elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, “We need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that’s not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we’ll send the Great Reset seminar lectures --absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39100%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NFmfp1C0pu7sYi6rXDPMxg&sysid=1)

Don’t miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Will you help me strike out this liberal lineup?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi88vdbpr1ch45go0vah07v9ahov962sgdligs70_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim6ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl2erc8t12phh4hlekunih1fvddkrk6jpoqslqj0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim6ob6cjh2bs)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfrmd5t098vo7bbppsbrg7j63177vjqs7gabrh70_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim6ob6cjh2bs)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zehp4alq33gbqiust5jdd1gnah9tdmesg8u23fio_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim6ob6cjh2bs)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb1e25okgkccar1heac5nmll3kht3lqpd11q28i0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim6ob6cjh2bs)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuhfbn7tsm8eqnd7l5jft3seogpm16h21qrrms3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim6ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1dqa6qjnh390m7olkbgce0hjocmrgkk2l8qaps8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim6ob6cjh2bs)
---
[**Join My Campaign**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqucbpsak9m66255nhcqeu4juase1qh7fdlmr6bo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim6ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdk31r9cl0s2ghsr2r2n30a5m918c537npmsivjo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cdim6ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | **PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE**
---
PO Box 532389Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389
---
| |
---
|
---

Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Former Speaker Newt Gingrich
subject: This may sound harsh, but I have to say it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm calling on every Republican to step up and do their part. This is CRITICAL and victory is the ONLY option.

|
---
| | | **-A MESSAGE FROM THE DESK OF NEWT GINGRICH-**
Friend,

**Look, I know you get a lot of these emails, but this one is different. Let me tell you why ....**

When I was Speaker, every Special Election meant **ALL HANDS ON DECK. **

And the Special Election in New York on Tuesday is no different.

We must do everything possible to ensure victory.

_**Because keeping this seat will send a message to America that voters are fed up with Joe Biden 's radical socialist agenda, and it will set the tone for victory in November.**__** **_
---
| | | [13X MATCH NOW](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMUT2v3CAQ_DW44wTL17lw8RTL3YtSREqJOLyxkTBn4fXdy7-PuChKkeY1SMwMzOzsj3f_HlJOZfkaNhyokq-Hp4cvNUZe8El-DfVYPQjQXACX0stuHrSDWdkOB-mEs1o7Jbp10FZbC6pXCNHdIhqtjLspJ4xEZwC7NLR_BEgprtoKc7kavIoYA0KvpYs90yJkrHRcaMWK-3nLKYZCGLZLvG9dHlai_WDqjcHEYDownhUvz1Qqzk3BYGrRG7VjTCFzzBgp3Qsvv3hZ2jM1_Uz1oBI2ZGpkYMC8jqmhvsHex38wAxu2-1mIqVG1W22mNZWFqZHqiQzsSZuPYdtDWgpT458pRe-_vfHx-xe4SKlM7zxJrR1o4MYpBhY_PKX58_qXy70QvrLQg1Ml_rdRBvbjLI__ia4O8_5MOafDOqbFsoWUX23SJxf-OwAA__-LrKaJ "Generic Button")

subject: Will you Help me strike out Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MQRTAqp4pfNGedZGGdBMvg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnqyxmP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAyMTFXA3NwY0IKZcNil8hlnn3bY1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MQRTAqp4pfNGedZGGdBMvg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnqyxmP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAyMTFXA3NwY0IKZcNil8hlnn3bY1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MQRTAqp4pfNGedZGGdBMvg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnqyxmP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAyMTFXA3NwY0IKZcNil8hlnn3bY1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MQRTAqp4pfNGedZGGdBMvg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnqyxmP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAyMTFXA3NwY0IKZcNil8hlnn3bY1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MQRTAqp4pfNGedZGGdBMvg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnqyxmP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAyMTFXA3NwY0IKZcNil8hlnn3bY1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.

Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate

The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.~ Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, ~ Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=368e009469014d17b196b5429d90199e&_e=OxTi9QShCdq6hCZzgyN2yIrG0AfVqTNaOkcLe-eg_OmYmwz5YgSb0DkCvwChq_TZB04YwUJfs7zg4xVBMotpUODQFKL-qIFF1sa4VZMkApKqgd9qJAy3UyMDMpq3g26K24LyXqn6tTKhjz-v5cfDqnGuTG6sx4yAWiRKzeO1_pc-6fRE1X7JL2FjPjIfyVXXViVNOfN4rik75wmsedKE7FwMID3ssMAyzrg17N2dU3IWOvYaK8jobZy7c26Ju-Co84lVGxqEg3PIkm7xeN2Ag_Vgh_F-i6nGDUX3Thu8AVQFqHEPY3WGxTJhsHQ25P7ZJ5k18WZQ9XvDbDQrOvQjumQjVn6peul4XK3GkSp3kBQqihatsif4e8umPXFuIxeZs7cJuX8XfzDZUmUOJjYg0Q%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=368e009469014d17b196b5429d90199e&_e=OxTi9QShCdq6hCZzgyN2yIrG0AfVqTNaOkcLe-eg_OmYmwz5YgSb0DkCvwChq_TZB04YwUJfs7zg4xVBMotpUODQFKL-qIFF1sa4VZMkApKqgd9qJAy3UyMDMpq3g26K24LyXqn6tTKhjz-v5cfDqnGuTG6sx4yAWiRKzeO1_pc-6fRE1X7JL2FjPjIfyVXXViVNOfN4rik75wmsedKE7FwMID3ssMAyzrg17N2dU3IWOvYaK8jobZy7c26Ju-CoyqTpoT0d7y-xx_CBQEtFywjGKOli9Lugz7rPvHI5GldfrnqdW_ttpe-jD-jlrXokNkWm-fsoWSI_tCF8sv9srYuZY5TD_ATMRlDtlxkhaLAPpesbcAIJNj3WeJfBRwM4fq9Wz4LiC-8oXDf5yJP2dA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=368e009469014d17b196b5429d90199e&_e=OxTi9QShCdq6hCZzgyN2yIrG0AfVqTNaOkcLe-eg_OmYmwz5YgSb0DkCvwChq_TZB04YwUJfs7zg4xVBMotpUODQFKL-qIFF1sa4VZMkApKqgd9qJAy3UyMDMpq3g26K24LyXqn6tTKhjz-v5cfDqnGuTG6sx4yAWiRKzeO1_pc-6fRE1X7JL2FjPjIfyVXXViVNOfN4rik75wmsedKE7FwMID3ssMAyzrg17N2dU3IWOvYaK8jobZy7c26Ju-Cov0G6AaLBAdRUhruPBPI8Tz-pL_7FlT8Puu6R-ZPSAl1R4ZFzo_FZrnP-gcKALYUNCVAYOTW1F-Xk2gMa3fODgk-mNCwSnDTPm3ME6Bpa18J9ad4uYVL1kDKUa1s3bZDAhOiScNDT_AefwnngQTqOPw%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---

name: Mazi Pilip
subject: Breaking News: New York special election declared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress
body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I’m the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f3782986c3af4cc9926a2b729c8594ee&_e=60aSe23JT5YyCEsO77ajUBvB4cH3QcuFR8vc3cPeaRMeb119ptyefETvCPlStgqYi_jkKjPtyAtug4SZvJ6WjPNtD6ldw4ucV0nGJjUVdJXbA9VmcaZ_rGYFMH0qQb3zr7rhcBPXOgdUJUEMb1PKS2iTX0rIBEyVDshKmi9q0S8IcBMEuE_ndAOoMNjOZiceHCKhKyHJ_OaGWx9FqrtxlilWp5gJcnRvGvfyoHHHgr_7pGOb0ovoTGBcC8RS5F6pk3L32YMAdWSo8Tha6PmRahojU-oE6ihM9UTpQz1EOYEtDfGFwDYVVarnJMMRFrkavLacA7EK9H87Waf1YP1SGCbPxA6ATJcSNUyI6vwbhcy2bY8fVNydLy3eUoOIigyWtLX0_LXomqkWEeopwLKop2qF_HwH7FAt-kejG1U-dEycuiX-8mJiJ2XKDDWrvW2g1d4znaclJDLeNdxeWUPjLv68yZY-rQgq8GElVcUkOhCLQatMDv_ruNS4iNU0PeEgAb8ZHX6pVBajpN0WgzCvNg%3D%3D)
---

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

clean_body: My name is Mazi Pilip- I’m the GOP candidate in the NY special election | | | | | | Friend, I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress. My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short! I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared. If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority. I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family. Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed. They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things. And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials. They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative. And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them. The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me. | I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line. | | Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now. I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority. | | And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word. All the best, Mazi Melesa Pilip GOP Nominee Special Election NY-03 | | | Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress 228 S Washington St STE 115 Alexandria, VA 22314 Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

--- | _Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of a healthy retirement plan. _But [choosing the wrong one](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51ac1ed2310743d2964fd117717aa596&_e=AZG8JoTTUqVj7w-v0fqkoJMvhCXZjGwz9IOVp2xj5WbrNkCNwyrvlk-1I067Hi3MONU7r15AbOScGV-6Voesfam1pDI-M9Qibmof5oRgQJ4J1aa6uK-nY2ZLnLWElpC58HZwBfCgJZm3SEltegweoFNFBFMc1kyvTcM6b4JQZ4MON2pmJWfzG7EYD8oQ6TuEmmlLCbXC8IKbOBh_dlw-Efk-EkjObA61qKvA26WwMI3kEf9Y4kU6jtPVZqfJmqN-6WIEq4tDFhoBaRLLsCWnDrcbk5HcinxRchn17dvdNF9zGSZGGQXJ_K7XUiRgMxoKsceteTfXJUnSHJHlAS35e8Y4tABHhXHl9XnL6LVkLEDyF30q5G5yU69v68oj5C222Yq_x3x69PjsOr9DPepVIAFdDizQ38iS67Yad-nOZlppOTLze8KomJY9GYHsEUQhpKV3T_rgUYKi3qBGKoYaycE7fEo_St1C-zemV7Fr5_Y%3D) could potentially wreak havoc on your retirement. A 2022 Northwestern Mutual study found that 62% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 35% of Americans work with a financial advisor.1 _Why?_ With thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. Plus, it can determine your financial trajectory for years to come. While advisors are prohibited from promising returns, research suggests that people work with a financial advisor: * Feel more at ease about their finances, and * Could end up with 15% more money to spend in retirement.2 _How do I find one?_ SmartAsset’s [no-cost tool](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51ac1ed2310743d2964fd117717aa596&_e=AZG8JoTTUqVj7w-v0fqkoHn4vEa9X13GIjDjOOUixJhmnFUyZ7qRSV3V5jY5F5r_GyxpHRpI6lNhCG21-0nq4NAvXme5VU-7bN1YtYvHfJnQKyqqQMRfU_qAVlj53XJR0LYBocJn6byuETBhc2_FankTbAAN2_fro6EENFbi5qTROStquY6nPNYayq50H_fmLheXIvrrUudvYvxcmpm7JeHx7Cj_Dj78_9UJ97KlJm8vm4h3kiTdOlDaMdVsEhqN4ibpzzvCQ9flBj6bIq158wcoDMcT7GKBZegmW-zjuTcHGXRAGd3U4RNU3lvZrDSM8-dtMIWMfwOwYOIYrjjVtgZLwakbcFTUVqvcmWENy0IBRMZqaiUihih2qCQ_AEXwMY5ara9IEwPdZnY5NQk_lDtUXRZ88cOADy3y_4sLqvV11lT2ePar9P7jEtIbyoO-eToEtVKSVpzghv45j-6-gg%3D%3D) simplifies the time consuming process of finding an advisor. A short questionnaire matches you with up to three vetted financial advisors serving your area, each legally bound to work in your best interest. In many cases, you can be connected instantly to compare and decide on the best fit for you. Ready to know what to look out for? Check out SmartAsset’s list of [seven mistakes to avoid when choosing an advisor ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51ac1ed2310743d2964fd117717aa596&_e=AZG8JoTTUqVj7w-v0fqkoJMvhCXZjGwz9IOVp2xj5WbrNkCNwyrvlk-1I067Hi3MONU7r15AbOScGV-6Voesfam1pDI-M9Qibmof5oRgQJ4J1aa6uK-nY2ZLnLWElpC58HZwBfCgJZm3SEltegweoFNFBFMc1kyvTcM6b4JQZ4MON2pmJWfzG7EYD8oQ6TuEmmlLCbXC8IKbOBh_dlw-Efk-EkjObA61qKvA26WwMI3kEf9Y4kU6jtPVZqfJmqN-6WIEq4tDFhoBaRLLsCWnDrcbk5HcinxRchn17dvdNF9zGSZGGQXJ_K7XUiRgMxoKsceteTfXJUnSHJHlAS35e4fCmsCb7cqgJIOu7LXHuUAt0d4rmK7TQjCSjzYw7Bj5thpWvkNWrFludoJn49RXYiBRorH_Gpa8QYmXsAX3aENULrG929l5iNJqHXqwgy-QU1lrgJp8xUH2n-bLXpzVPIdSDtNuxGQ4UqK_Aa2l3zw%3D)so you can work towards a more comfortable retirement. name: Conservatives Give
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eaa6e24235df400dbde5c096a2434ae4&_e=d5gsu72ximXiAV8ewLFlgu4MiMxLDb3eOd-qSTkK5N0M97TZLLZwICauN2SbB0pz3rHCIIV2jc1z_4jXjkrPw1J2PXUcBdpLFGHrzlE3TZvcBmzReJdfKm2-OY7qzSc_FoEGx_8ACLuufcEEQfnaxzV94KMFt8CMkKC-F00LMxHo8BbJAGhbfwDgtvEQUcq8gePiI-42wGMHXLHFONH-pKw5peAp045PQD0dZkPwyWcC74r-UkHJypv9rmzMoftNE9UmTdQCGI8m9OHlFxqg1Gx7W-mWRUvY17gM8KfX1JTuyND84CvBd52xgCi14DOb). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eaa6e24235df400dbde5c096a2434ae4&_e=d5gsu72ximXiAV8ewLFlgu4MiMxLDb3eOd-qSTkK5N0M97TZLLZwICauN2SbB0pz3rHCIIV2jc1z_4jXjkrPw1J2PXUcBdpLFGHrzlE3TZvcBmzReJdfKm2-OY7qzSc_FoEGx_8ACLuufcEEQfnax22n4YFI5nXaAA20Sehqq_fqgMOFPzQSYaTeLODIM8ThmvoayoRPJ9gloy09numlaAOl9uqsI4ZssZNoO6TElgmt3uURrJT0cI5FUBln_a0Q-4oLgjhFzGHjnjo8TV3B0GTlZ_PXhLRgDg9ZReMV2CLSodt9tFEKeyBHKA9RP7of) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eaa6e24235df400dbde5c096a2434ae4&_e=d5gsu72ximXiAV8ewLFlgu4MiMxLDb3eOd-qSTkK5N0M97TZLLZwICauN2SbB0pz3rHCIIV2jc1z_4jXjkrPw1J2PXUcBdpLFGHrzlE3TZvcBmzReJdfKm2-OY7qzSc_FoEGx_8ACLuufcEEQfnax6fyeWQlxJ5CaEXm8EuKnN2RW4_OfiOM159AIMIFu6vyBJvhAl9BR8kS5iF8CgJSlk7s6hYdohFo_THTifmcqHoMX091PizsA_bnfSXUNiPqeDcqg29nRqKKVZcKLTGXcDnxEBDT1CYbwGfDTsmv8MK0GjI-UgTjFjuGaw75EGdJ) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

name: Sign the Petition (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: If you support the troops, you can't support Trump
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Demand Trump apologize to troops for once again mocking their service and sacrifice](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tefa518c7-b96d-45cb-bbab-49cc897c9eab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f68c38d-202c-430a-9080-c01a6879526d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump has a [history of disrespecting troops](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f7a04e3-6cf9-4e4c-8612-2b9d9c8eed90/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and veterans, and he just did it again. At a campaign rally, he [mocked Nikki Haley's husband](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teab44a3e-ed3b-4eab-9897-576d4f292fcc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) for not being on the campaign trail with her. "What happened to her husband? Where is he?" As Trump well knows, Michael Haley is currently deployed overseas. And while we've got a lot of problems with Nikki Haley, we'd agree with her 100% that, "Someone who continually disrespects the sacrifices of military families has no business being commander in chief." [**Add your name, and demand that Trump apologize to our troops for mocking their service and sacrifice.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2c0e10b-4e7c-4fad-9775-697c9ec85ae0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) And make sure to spread this to friends and family, and remind them that if they support our troops, they can't support Trump.
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e77eb2b-546c-4e39-8ca2-91e7dd0106e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action (P.S. - Want to do something else? How about [helping this January 6th hero cop win a seat in Congress](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5408fc00-39d8-4bb5-b565-bad964492800/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). OR [help this Democrat](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb58d8de4-f16a-4e0c-acea-a044f82dcb62/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) win George Santos' seat!

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f7200a3c6cf43adabec48940d22f99a&_e=3oGEyUki4CCFRAYuKkSqCqOl1Yjub-rMtAggm-Aj8_OVgny3dSXRDcT_GaPdOaIxLrpBaqUyIHQLFkWi_EGXby89Iu1Ely8bNNUe8MAsoKCHGMxQY3pNmOl7vVsiTWHeSwoChndNkl5jAwR0EZysut5hPKol_J5a_fct-6KQSRuBehLWOUwkQrWRNqYVEfFWue3y1ntMrsX7Af699PKVpUIZywYuPWRy1_MMXTXi8bKmXVS4oRHV29SJIXPjCVwZNr4ROCgkwsvCVIS38jFNZgFhzjwO5EuqWq6W2QgsUkpCu_NSG7_y2QAHTeib8r8GO7Fpf-tAs6UGHYgYD7F__1i4W6nDRntA4bkUVWTlnH3d-f_fQFwvLRn2_YPIG5a9juq0iaumkUJPtQGQ24jhqwgFOrf61gPG99cCBqFUPzs%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f7200a3c6cf43adabec48940d22f99a&_e=3oGEyUki4CCFRAYuKkSqCqOl1Yjub-rMtAggm-Aj8_OVgny3dSXRDcT_GaPdOaIxLrpBaqUyIHQLFkWi_EGXby89Iu1Ely8bNNUe8MAsoKCHGMxQY3pNmOl7vVsiTWHeSwoChndNkl5jAwR0EZysut5hPKol_J5a_fct-6KQSRuBehLWOUwkQrWRNqYVEfFWue3y1ntMrsX7Af699PKVpUIZywYuPWRy1_MMXTXi8bKmXVS4oRHV29SJIXPjCVwZNr4ROCgkwsvCVIS38jFNZgPZG5ig_pd2NZh5eGjJdxgCA763d0GVFPooh1H-PzQEowHBtsJuIRmOiGXPY3R6lyXc8er7Op9MR4zzT5QkpIRH1o6PJak3NunlVaFM_tKh13TR7_dFDOhY_HtJ9mZNND9Pf1ia3oONZft23HTP1us%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f7200a3c6cf43adabec48940d22f99a&_e=3oGEyUki4CCFRAYuKkSqCqOl1Yjub-rMtAggm-Aj8_OVgny3dSXRDcT_GaPdOaIxLrpBaqUyIHQLFkWi_EGXby89Iu1Ely8bNNUe8MAsoKCHGMxQY3pNmOl7vVsiTWHeSwoChndNkl5jAwR0EZysut5hPKol_J5a_fct-6KQSRuBehLWOUwkQrWRNqYVEfFWue3y1ntMrsX7Af699PKVpUIZywYuPWRy1_MMXTXi8bKmXVS4oRHV29SJIXPjCVwZNr4ROCgkwsvCVIS38jFNZqvTS5-aQ1cZwxyN2CMGwnBFl2WbplfrXB1eW4KlyaySpXfH5JQ96Myh5ft6J_AFo7XXtzmO70bLQW-ZMEA1yE0JoovdtC9vm7ewhjx6zexv3fYAIx_1ZTP8rkZwMgdDMwZE6NSLIWfCZHn33vYS7A8%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f7200a3c6cf43adabec48940d22f99a&_e=3oGEyUki4CCFRAYuKkSqCqOl1Yjub-rMtAggm-Aj8_OVgny3dSXRDcT_GaPdOaIxLrpBaqUyIHQLFkWi_EGXby89Iu1Ely8bNNUe8MAsoKCHGMxQY3pNmOl7vVsiTWHeSwoChndNkl5jAwR0EZysut5hPKol_J5a_fct-6KQSRuBehLWOUwkQrWRNqYVEfFWue3y1ntMrsX7Af699PKVpUIZywYuPWRy1_MMXTXi8bKmXVS4oRHV29SJIXPjCVwZNr4ROCgkwsvCVIS38jFNZrMuHTgwHzYpKyvUhovIcWADDLFLccDr8mOHDzPmpvMVO93eDY9YLL--jhE3l28iu7FTNQUV8vPLfo-SINhIWtzvqY9w5d0X3sIdjMs2ezDJ2b9K5vFefnUDSV-_zj6Bz8w7wQhhuB5CeZv94tqyHlk%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Defeat Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mhLsiS4jPV3dDin6kz7_iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnq1AkP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAyMTFXA3NwY0IKZcPTs8hloOKq71IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mhLsiS4jPV3dDin6kz7_iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnq1AkP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAyMTFXA3NwY0IKZcPTs8hloOKq71IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mhLsiS4jPV3dDin6kz7_iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnq1AkP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAyMTFXA3NwY0IKZcPTs8hloOKq71IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mhLsiS4jPV3dDin6kz7_iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnq1AkP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAyMTFXA3NwY0IKZcPTs8hloOKq71IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mhLsiS4jPV3dDin6kz7_iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnq1AkP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAyMTFXA3NwY0IKZcPTs8hloOKq71IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mhLsiS4jPV3dDin6kz7_iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnq1AkP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAyMTFXA3NwY0IKZcPTs8hloOKq71IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mhLsiS4jPV3dDin6kz7_iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnq1AkP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAyMTFXA3NwY0IKZcPTs8hloOKq71IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
[**Join My Campaign**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mhLsiS4jPV3dDin6kz7_iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnq1AkP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAyMTFXA3NwY0IKZcPTs8hloOKq71IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mhLsiS4jPV3dDin6kz7_iw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnq1AkP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAyMTFXA3NwY0IKZcPTs8hloOKq71IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ddd3160baa7449c4b7f5386a8778c8a1&_e=Z4jutfx1u-NdQkbnoac_1fS1uIad9NqbzXX8ktI55UUoYcElOfGEIJYsyiBrtfUxRl7dH11bwPKBeb6FPMZ5fIReCSYP35APlmw0KZnHhlVpCeTKNFX6VU8CmzYCDga0MN2604I_Q7L5nBa0HYl43JvqtIGF-_Dt4PHRE7Kblo-NjDYqRX_Qj-CxSY6CbNkcrVjJFzW_M_aIcuMnRc2oLfr_h0WE0RLAjwad0pe08AtrMnARVDxxroiYzVe-89jg0mFNEQZVVNRKgs_cSNGgh66DhCd9YpVM3Q3HW_PYgw_LqdaC78Rl3XM_vH5Ws6n3pm0cZ-Y0r22nYJzYnx1CigIRnAWSWTmQTBZtxRvgyeXPP48MZQTax04d1AZAD5yaVknHql2lxHz1y13SVR3Sqg%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ddd3160baa7449c4b7f5386a8778c8a1&_e=Z4jutfx1u-NdQkbnoac_1fS1uIad9NqbzXX8ktI55UUoYcElOfGEIJYsyiBrtfUxRl7dH11bwPKBeb6FPMZ5fIReCSYP35APlmw0KZnHhlVpCeTKNFX6VU8CmzYCDga0MN2604I_Q7L5nBa0HYl43JvqtIGF-_Dt4PHRE7Kblo-NjDYqRX_Qj-CxSY6CbNkcrVjJFzW_M_aIcuMnRc2oLfr_h0WE0RLAjwad0pe08At4N4qt9YapkLG_YJg7dYqMRi1HRCazCFgTrCwmjSrtioglvnLGeFzFEmKZtVoxeb51aI_akCYhsc71oB9kh4kllptPJLzbelG1H61Kj6fT-TyjtDGvWC9kLdsRjER4II15l7m7VLRu8iEpLdobmvY_lZWBREnwJ0PsW46K3Coj7w%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.

one](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b1368bd9d5c344d39bad4b26e8bb9db7&_e=h58eXbtj7Hf1NzjRqnhFVnmb06dW_G0DthVb9ylWtS2GT2tXIrN3b5DN4JgKhewAPbqmpzb7bqGYydfNH-1VhIZVz1uacdTXA3Oi-bJsF92GuobM66rv1IE7sWss7tNagvT4gdlgRJ-SxSE4OE3_MF8-GdXq-lWCUkb694RkwIklzXRveXmf3RgSlG_1StM_yyDAr-0emiB6PT1HIxM-HvfT6yjMD9-fBVYLCWpQ8swvTQh5iutWnynK2G4qNTrBBB41YM7DNoBFjbd8XsPp7dtYF0ibwid-vy3aHBFfCWaHmCwMlYARPg4VKiVplJfmKSBMH3gyrjGBbvc3Ex8G_HfrGwadXEYgos0WAiqX7A79kInzE7DtT6QxplfXNZGh6ZqefPeDNcpVALVO73LJXyEF35s7dY--FNAgpPxyAejpBgny6ERv68Yb4VI_LJ_GAQkfWWZaJp9B_G5wzzKxl5XEE97hXSRbeobUkKq4FWI%3D) could potentially wreak havoc on your retirement. A 2022 Northwestern Mutual study found that 62% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 35% of Americans work with a financial advisor.1 _Why?_ With thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. Plus, it can determine your financial trajectory for years to come. While advisors are prohibited from promising returns, research suggests that people work with a financial advisor: * Feel more at ease about their finances, and * Could end up with 15% more money to spend in retirement.2 _How do I find one?_ SmartAsset’s [no-cost tool](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b1368bd9d5c344d39bad4b26e8bb9db7&_e=h58eXbtj7Hf1NzjRqnhFVvKi7VX48PRCpB8qdOtkkyAZiZ8PPvShN-79xEADE2q0jIUqc-ycdS5XXp5o1lIoaMICvHxpPOwYXD5pKZq6OJQB2V7RRU9hU-R_QX_a3v1qnESLPK-zRuQWsAEMK-anoJ8dXu9-32wWfSkDE0wev7YA7EXo1njxyJE6AsYjRcEQ-9Gwpyn-CVLpWy1ZEXaFY1mlBsVkTp3hxtOGcfDOmARHQ5LtQFQq0lxJCW0tADoYWrIhH8AnSeZcj8QaUW1YnGzqBYmG1eigY5B1WyKqbnYJvKRqQzP6jsCMrXDeXxYA3mHAO6Pg7gu-qWrlN2qgI8JH4S3Gq8JQAr5hHzmaLZulZjW6bdpLlWTKbuEliP8jesozbUn2Wd_6xL50XGTdN5lhzR9UjTb5Pz4HKgG5NFRpBZU2ty3WGR-Y5-CPXbmqFqF4ZCBNy7kgajPpDTmqdg%3D%3D) simplifies the time consuming process of finding an advisor. A short questionnaire matches you with up to three vetted financial advisors serving your area, each legally bound to work in your best interest. In many cases, you can be connected instantly to compare and decide on the best fit for you. Ready to know what to look out for? name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=026580da051842c1bb6f4231109aeac3&_e=wH4A3szqjJ4vmfJYMxEOMGkWCk2gGxkV5u_4_TfXD9nFfDbLv1rIe0weQCojL5O5TvrdC8v8IHFWREQ3EW2d41wHUDV40V13b1zPGppNn8irdOVcwH9EidHblynWHyjAr2i1AS8Af7H-wO4m9H8QpnLWU94HckoaJIVVK87tg_aMn_wpe2Rr8GS3MXcrA8Ep9JLzZqMqI6donvYcEqlekaWk45EerLNTICQSeaFc679YaFf-XvSSIazOjehuruCEHeqojHOd-SnFsLDDikH7LjWvkZnGU1JSFfQMUSY6fgz8qHPoNjSSQaYwC4yTNkIrfXRok9HZSCsY5EajHD837YS7jcfwl1X6zH-qC2SZ5lsnPl-M_MOrXx57wh2PuqC1ubmzqCQuOjVvvtSx7tJQXNMAq-KW8QeCToFQEnSZUnk%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=026580da051842c1bb6f4231109aeac3&_e=wH4A3szqjJ4vmfJYMxEOMGkWCk2gGxkV5u_4_TfXD9nFfDbLv1rIe0weQCojL5O5TvrdC8v8IHFWREQ3EW2d41wHUDV40V13b1zPGppNn8irdOVcwH9EidHblynWHyjAr2i1AS8Af7H-wO4m9H8QpnLWU94HckoaJIVVK87tg_aMn_wpe2Rr8GS3MXcrA8Ep9JLzZqMqI6donvYcEqlekaWk45EerLNTICQSeaFc679YaFf-XvSSIazOjehuruCEHeqojHOd-SnFsLDDikH7LjkxWCEG0FCnl5PeP5c0RzGaowyi2Cq9DJgEE3ulsqMNiAIt2mtuaVWHvrfelQWaynTHUNMY6ssGYnL7fvpGTESwyvYEjMmeGbyCaOP_xSbOmBNS51DwUo7W7DGcaXO7_nb02K19xmu4H8n109jvETU%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=026580da051842c1bb6f4231109aeac3&_e=wH4A3szqjJ4vmfJYMxEOMGkWCk2gGxkV5u_4_TfXD9nFfDbLv1rIe0weQCojL5O5TvrdC8v8IHFWREQ3EW2d41wHUDV40V13b1zPGppNn8irdOVcwH9EidHblynWHyjAr2i1AS8Af7H-wO4m9H8QpnLWU94HckoaJIVVK87tg_aMn_wpe2Rr8GS3MXcrA8Ep9JLzZqMqI6donvYcEqlekaWk45EerLNTICQSeaFc679YaFf-XvSSIazOjehuruCEHeqojHOd-SnFsLDDikH7LrDzZ2NoZ0JTPz1WZznamZ05SLt-9Hzt3FgzQZCaPB2rRwTjdAjNE0CHbqJSEESTBHPLKBL5J2vWVYb4EqbjnRV8Mb_X_N1gz1yHuUtXyEjIwBbEidbIAz3cXk97QKrKQfchvjZuBuGv_Rkw1FNm7DM%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=026580da051842c1bb6f4231109aeac3&_e=wH4A3szqjJ4vmfJYMxEOMGkWCk2gGxkV5u_4_TfXD9nFfDbLv1rIe0weQCojL5O5TvrdC8v8IHFWREQ3EW2d41wHUDV40V13b1zPGppNn8irdOVcwH9EidHblynWHyjAr2i1AS8Af7H-wO4m9H8QpnLWU94HckoaJIVVK87tg_aMn_wpe2Rr8GS3MXcrA8Ep9JLzZqMqI6donvYcEqlekaWk45EerLNTICQSeaFc679YaFf-XvSSIazOjehuruCEHeqojHOd-SnFsLDDikH7Li0RBT-uS-mirxjsyj3y3LR5wNowpBaNOvx7B125wLfK1isHL7sCEp2A9p8ef6v5fzIMmeDV0X-tTX20Yg9abnGONXaZqscc5SDEy5aPBS0znNPOlEwY-XUiEeW7Wh12xQ17G1O6U5VfqXXOOMx3RzE%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=026580da051842c1bb6f4231109aeac3&_e=djJGovA4w-xCp-zMxjdWbr900cE5FkPKhuj_lCuu_axqY5Ao4-HgMfYbQzhxGVZP8Qi7E0M4CL29EUqE6oPJWwk-Yr974nGo8HKBe2YzgIQGqMFX2I9vFtpQr5kKwA7E6om8bUENQpoxYjsgF7XjjCX3oppJiEOAYgdPsTyxvwqqujGgbprPVbhtuQ_RfhOQajugMAORkakzWHCK59HBWcnYiR2Mq0W-96QvPjdV4qDySYabNWvt38mxHCh5UedYu3tLkpqiNDkS3NlPGvCdWQ%3D%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=026580da051842c1bb6f4231109aeac3&_e=wH4A3szqjJ4vmfJYMxEOMMI93yt3wZw6zFzgg4CF3f47Xe9la8Dl03JJPTVvgz9Dt3KTQ6bMqwf2lxyqlX2ihvmBM8TRpbdGIkPKa2nu8EkEaMycRjgtfH-208km7p0siyoER7jezX45xt0dVE1YUVlcrfJXsC6MT97PUrEMlxIW3a_jiffdMoP0tLnpTmo-TF1MFcuEQqFGvmlG7SJGK5jyBlqPRrmEs4XdtGeJOVs%3D)_

**THIS IS A MESSAGE FROM DONALD J. TRUMP:** Friend, WILL YOU SEND ME A LETTER?
I just wrote a letter to every single member of the _**MAGA MOVEMENT.**_
I want you to read it:
**Dear Patriot,**
**I will always love you for standing with me through every single _WITCH HUNT!_**
**You supported me after they raided my home and arrested me.**
**You stuck with me even when they _REMOVED ME FROM THE BALLOT._**
**Every time they tried to KICK ME DOWN, I knew I could ALWAYS count on your support.**
**It truly means the world to me, so THANK YOU!**

She works around the clock to get better care for our veterans. And she’s demanding transparency and accountability from Big Government. Sounds like a great American, right? Well, that’s not what the Democrats think! They are dead set on defeating Jen this November. Why? Because they know that their path to power requires defeating Jen Kiggans in VA-02.
