name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c49ace6fd7c42ffa72924b6fa7a8e47&_e=Svto4SEWyJ3QN2-yhNIsoZMZJtj-gN0fugY_GsvNe_1pFXb1cYL_skk4d5Wh3JBmHKjJRKOWBGJ3_O_kLqaUsHKnkFcYcUikWCVeZ2YKJJyJqu3tvjisiZ4qEI5r46t270W8ABalXR5Qnqc9uTE9fOhC_TemLPKuKrOtp5keq3yKLx-cfCqTB6Zr9pNQbCWUCsxMKfx0O5GWEi6YcAJdv8r4F2AdvXzH4vN1F8KyCPcCoCxsh-HnCPATZs6vuul5MDb6kzef8LSL8YG31nGycj9eZUHn9Go_Fq6dEO6MJAkjZFva_XHD4FAJXRd8gJqyYy4tuNKJGOUNvkQYGiqNYNQdCpAjymt1zvi_jRd7CZBd0jWrL-POjosZ1AbYGidWu3m_jXAFV4mJTuCSgvDr5g%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c49ace6fd7c42ffa72924b6fa7a8e47&_e=Svto4SEWyJ3QN2-yhNIsoZMZJtj-gN0fugY_GsvNe_1pFXb1cYL_skk4d5Wh3JBmHKjJRKOWBGJ3_O_kLqaUsHKnkFcYcUikWCVeZ2YKJJyJqu3tvjisiZ4qEI5r46t270W8ABalXR5Qnqc9uTE9fOhC_TemLPKuKrOtp5keq3yKLx-cfCqTB6Zr9pNQbCWUCsxMKfx0O5GWEi6YcAJdv8r4F2AdvXzH4vN1F8KyCPcCoCxsh-HnCPATZs6vuul5VPBUaseh_ZnxmSwvGDM_IKzjZ63lw26Xvl138bbACIg7U0oLuSiUniy-e8ROUY16Zf0KZQTKDr3YJ0T0xVhfv1Qh8qTN6Gk_g33FlW_eSr2zVQ9ctFwQK9EPQ6rLxaX37grls9vtcIgm1r30SoJIdQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c49ace6fd7c42ffa72924b6fa7a8e47&_e=Svto4SEWyJ3QN2-yhNIsoZMZJtj-gN0fugY_GsvNe_1pFXb1cYL_skk4d5Wh3JBmHKjJRKOWBGJ3_O_kLqaUsHKnkFcYcUikWCVeZ2YKJJyJqu3tvjisiZ4qEI5r46t270W8ABalXR5Qnqc9uTE9fOhC_TemLPKuKrOtp5keq3yKLx-cfCqTB6Zr9pNQbCWUCsxMKfx0O5GWEi6YcAJdv8r4F2AdvXzH4vN1F8KyCPcCoCxsh-HnCPATZs6vuul5HoVnh1VXmNVGvxVSnqvLx04V3cXCgh-hjzb7SkdjGIyqiwyJq7KQH0LIlD_ZHXThIAkhrlXnuu8Jm5DcZQQ7d3y041zhoKWWEagieTsGaNV4lEk26k5DfITtb-JYN0NogWMEgMKzUe42UeDCPW_-WA%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: This initiative is not merely about economic reform. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox. Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Ted Cruz
subject: I grilled Big Tech CEOs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW-iFhDiXN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW-iFhDiXN

Fellow
Conservative,

A group
of Big Tech CEOs testified before the Senate Judiciary Committee.
The heads of Meta, TikTok, Snap, Discord, and X (formerly known
as Twitter) all appeared.

If you've
been on social media, you may have seen some of the highlights...

I didn't
hold back one bit in calling out these CEOs over a number of
their practices, most importantly the risks their platforms pose
to children and young people and their shameful inaction in many
cases to prevent sexual exploitation of minors.

We must
demand accountability to PROTECT AMERICA'S CHILDREN and I'm
proud to be leading the charge in the Senate.

I'm
writing today to ask you to stand with me in this fight >>>

RUSH
CRITICAL SUPPORT

Mark
Zuckerberg appeared before the committee, and I called him out in
clear terms.

Meta's
record on child sexual exploitation material is ABYSMAL... and
all the while, the liberal corporate media only talks about this
issue on X even though it's a way bigger problem on Instagram.

I also
made sure to get TikTok CEO Shou Chew on record over his
company's censorship of information related to the Chinese
Communist Party. And most importantly, TikTok's pernicious
ability to push harmful content to our young people here in
America.

ENOUGH
IS ENOUGH of Big Tech's failure to act. I will never back down in
this fight.

Thank
you in advance for any support you can send today >>>

For
Liberty,

Ted Cruz

RUSH
$10

RUSH
$25

RUSH
$50

RUSH
$100

RUSH
$250

RUSH
$500

subject: told you so
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6045605c-7f56-41bf-ae56-a346ae34471b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta439bf10-970a-4227-91b7-7adcd7634e52/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Guess what Peter, **I was right.** I’ve been screaming from the rooftops that my friend Josh Riley’s race here in NY-19 is the top race Democrats need to win to take back the House... and finally, folks are catching on. In case you missed the news, Josh just earned a spot on the national Democrats’ highly exclusive ‘Red-to-Blue’ list. Only a handful of races in the entire country made the cut, and it goes to show how competitive and important this race will be. **I hate to say ‘I told you so,’ but I kind of did.** I know Josh has what it takes to win, and I’m thrilled they see it too. [**This is a key moment in his race, and Josh needs our help to keep up the momentum. So today, I’m asking you to split $5, $25, or whatever you can between Josh and Blue Amp Action to help Josh win in NY-19.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc21438e0-1fe1-4b34-bbf0-e74814ed4c22/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d460bd8-0b99-4fea-bfb4-4ee43a860aa0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Let’s be real: there’s no taking back the House majority without flipping districts like NY-19. I know, and national Democrats know, that Josh is just the guy to do the job. Josh was my counsel in the Senate, and he’s the hardest working person I know. Together, we passed bills expanding rights for survivors of domestic abuse and providing new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. (We also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad.) **Josh ran in this district in 2022, and came up short by 1.6% – and he’s going to win this time with our help.** [**So if you’re all-in to take back the House this November, I need you to get serious about Josh’s race. Please donate anything you can (seriously, every dollar helps) to Blue Amp Action and Josh today to send Marc Molinaro packing and get the Speaker’s gavel out of Mike Johnson’s hands.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e49cfff-3ee4-4684-af15-5a3db4e6c895/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks. Al P.S. I look pretty smart now that everyone else is realizing just how important Josh’s race is, huh? [**You can look like a political genius too – donate today!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9143f54c-bbec-4844-b586-ca81010f56ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d731547-3922-4d45-961c-2328de02e02c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

|

| | | | |

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Defeat Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkDFv2zAQRn8NtdE4HiXaGjQ4le0lLgoXSEfiRJ5sFqJskFSC_PtCaLxnfTgc3vv-nO2ZwhTm60-K3KVoU7aDt1dK7_wps7uFcbQIWEtAqZRVle9Mi9udqrhTW9iaplUaqltHvobBsEIFrYFdA2ZsDWokrLUGhip06x9ApRTWTY0bTbtWedOQJ6BWgagh8WMZpuBojvT3nkL53Mxcqqm7lfLIQu8FHgUeM7sl8eYjzIn9xt3jygq_s_wSH-9JLllmnqmwwKPnQe1Qc-No1AM1Qh-XEm2-L8mx0P1Lf5KXw5tAs-LIPixR6P5w_iKO4oPCdRa6_x8Byr70J_v79GNvX1_t5fBmf-3l5XlfnND95SyfxVXq_OMjTFPIZitquEYK0ypele-M_i8AAP__sseCxA)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkDFv2zAQRn8NtdE4HiXaGjQ4le0lLgoXSEfiRJ5sFqJskFSC_PtCaLxnfTgc3vv-nO2ZwhTm60-K3KVoU7aDt1dK7_wps7uFcbQIWEtAqZRVle9Mi9udqrhTW9iaplUaqltHvobBsEIFrYFdA2ZsDWokrLUGhip06x9ApRTWTY0bTbtWedOQJ6BWgagh8WMZpuBojvT3nkL53Mxcqqm7lfLIQu8FHgUeM7sl8eYjzIn9xt3jygq_s_wSH-9JLllmnqmwwKPnQe1Qc-No1AM1Qh-XEm2-L8mx0P1Lf5KXw5tAs-LIPixR6P5w_iKO4oPCdRa6_x8Byr70J_v79GNvX1_t5fBmf-3l5XlfnND95SyfxVXq_OMjTFPIZitquEYK0ypele-M_i8AAP__sseCxA)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkDFv2zAQRn8NtdE4HiXaGjQ4le0lLgoXSEfiRJ5sFqJskFSC_PtCaLxnfTgc3vv-nO2ZwhTm60-K3KVoU7aDt1dK7_wps7uFcbQIWEtAqZRVle9Mi9udqrhTW9iaplUaqltHvobBsEIFrYFdA2ZsDWokrLUGhip06x9ApRTWTY0bTbtWedOQJ6BWgagh8WMZpuBojvT3nkL53Mxcqqm7lfLIQu8FHgUeM7sl8eYjzIn9xt3jygq_s_wSH-9JLllmnqmwwKPnQe1Qc-No1AM1Qh-XEm2-L8mx0P1Lf5KXw5tAs-LIPixR6P5w_iKO4oPCdRa6_x8Byr70J_v79GNvX1_t5fBmf-3l5XlfnND95SyfxVXq_OMjTFPIZitquEYK0ypele-M_i8AAP__sseCxA)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkDFv2zAQRn8NtdE4HiXaGjQ4le0lLgoXSEfiRJ5sFqJskFSC_PtCaLxnfTgc3vv-nO2ZwhTm60-K3KVoU7aDt1dK7_wps7uFcbQIWEtAqZRVle9Mi9udqrhTW9iaplUaqltHvobBsEIFrYFdA2ZsDWokrLUGhip06x9ApRTWTY0bTbtWedOQJ6BWgagh8WMZpuBojvT3nkL53Mxcqqm7lfLIQu8FHgUeM7sl8eYjzIn9xt3jygq_s_wSH-9JLllmnqmwwKPnQe1Qc-No1AM1Qh-XEm2-L8mx0P1Lf5KXw5tAs-LIPixR6P5w_iKO4oPCdRa6_x8Byr70J_v79GNvX1_t5fBmf-3l5XlfnND95SyfxVXq_OMjTFPIZitquEYK0ypele-M_i8AAP__sseCxA)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkDFv2zAQRn8NtdE4HiXaGjQ4le0lLgoXSEfiRJ5sFqJskFSC_PtCaLxnfTgc3vv-nO2ZwhTm60-K3KVoU7aDt1dK7_wps7uFcbQIWEtAqZRVle9Mi9udqrhTW9iaplUaqltHvobBsEIFrYFdA2ZsDWokrLUGhip06x9ApRTWTY0bTbtWedOQJ6BWgagh8WMZpuBojvT3nkL53Mxcqqm7lfLIQu8FHgUeM7sl8eYjzIn9xt3jygq_s_wSH-9JLllmnqmwwKPnQe1Qc-No1AM1Qh-XEm2-L8mx0P1Lf5KXw5tAs-LIPixR6P5w_iKO4oPCdRa6_x8Byr70J_v79GNvX1_t5fBmf-3l5XlfnND95SyfxVXq_OMjTFPIZitquEYK0ypele-M_i8AAP__sseCxA)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkDFv2zAQRn8NtdE4HiXaGjQ4le0lLgoXSEfiRJ5sFqJskFSC_PtCaLxnfTgc3vv-nO2ZwhTm60-K3KVoU7aDt1dK7_wps7uFcbQIWEtAqZRVle9Mi9udqrhTW9iaplUaqltHvobBsEIFrYFdA2ZsDWokrLUGhip06x9ApRTWTY0bTbtWedOQJ6BWgagh8WMZpuBojvT3nkL53Mxcqqm7lfLIQu8FHgUeM7sl8eYjzIn9xt3jygq_s_wSH-9JLllmnqmwwKPnQe1Qc-No1AM1Qh-XEm2-L8mx0P1Lf5KXw5tAs-LIPixR6P5w_iKO4oPCdRa6_x8Byr70J_v79GNvX1_t5fBmf-3l5XlfnND95SyfxVXq_OMjTFPIZitquEYK0ypele-M_i8AAP__sseCxA)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---

clean_body: Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th? | | | | | | Friend, That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate | | | | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | | | Republican Majority PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: =?utf-8?B?RGVmZW5kaW5nIEFtZXJpY2HigJlzIEZ1dHVyZQ==?=
subject: The DEFINITION of a double standard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defending America's Future
body:
They won’t charge Biden, yet they’re endlessly persecuting Trump, Friend...

| | | Friend, This is absolutely unbelievable. And yet somehow, at the same time, we don’t think it’s a surprise to anybody. Photos of President Biden’s stolen CLASSIFIED documents from his time as Vice President have just been released. And they’re just sitting in his garage at his home in Delaware.
---
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qOEvK7GykQhnovBoGjW39A~~/AARclAA~)
---
And you know what’s in these documents, Friend? Information about the Afghanistan troop surge from 2009. Something that could have SEVERE national security implications. **_[But that’s not even the worst part.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qOEvK7GykQhnovBoGjW39A~~/AARclAA~)_** Special Counsel Robert Hur says that there will be **[**NO**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qOEvK7GykQhnovBoGjW39A~~/AARclAA~)** criminal charges placed on Joe Biden. In the report, Hur said that Biden’s memory of taking the documents was severely limited. So, he’s basically just an old man with a bad memory. **[But it’s even worse than that...](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qOEvK7GykQhnovBoGjW39A~~/AARclAA~)** The report states that the most powerful man on earth can’t remember when he was Vice President or even when his own son died. And, yet, he has access to our country’s nuclear codes. They won’t charge Biden for stealing classified documents, yet they’re going after President Trump with everything they’ve got by: **[\- Trying to frame him as a traitor](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qOEvK7GykQhnovBoGjW39A~~/AARclAA~)** **[\- Trying to forcibly remove him from the ballot in Maine and Colorado](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qOEvK7GykQhnovBoGjW39A~~/AARclAA~)** **[\- Trying to do everything in their power from making sure he NEVER sees the Oval Office again! ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qOEvK7GykQhnovBoGjW39A~~/AARclAA~)** Here’s the reality: America won’t have a future if Joe Biden is our President for 4 more years. He can’t be trusted to serve as the leader of the free world. _**[So, Friend, will you chip in to help defend America’s future from corrupt politicians like Joe Biden? Even just $5 can go a long way.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qOEvK7GykQhnovBoGjW39A~~/AARclAA~)**_ Thank you for your support, Defending America’s Future
---

---

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6eca378171af4ee8a008ca71c284c998&_e=kQP_ldX8fkAYGdE4w9CNcaaCXuYpssLb9f2kp6i2FaHd3nGXWn2WHzGw6l8ggz3ckf0urkb0a4wwgm0mw9R_bSrlF0ar9HWRlcdyRQ9ObU6eNyuEb0bxZU58jcpNVsqt2p9gAzwxuep8aNAsGdGeeQouMaBOukqmuwx495a4XVQXsTLR2vAeOkDNWWmdQ7dq_ed9M2mOfimCINXsrp0tWdVGro1paWM2ug7SINZXhToEImGyrNDfTEr1qyr0aeSI0mB__JrHzZgSmsbMWar9KR-UsPTV8YOH7iibq6Lyyi5Oho7BsNyv7KayXnbUIt14RYPT5PoyQImx5sBlycr0y4AIevsAJ0qxSry-aiK2HHi3iU4gRyG-kBZmc56l5qD8w8S5X47PC37S4JnWV7t6Nw%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6eca378171af4ee8a008ca71c284c998&_e=kQP_ldX8fkAYGdE4w9CNcaaCXuYpssLb9f2kp6i2FaHd3nGXWn2WHzGw6l8ggz3ckf0urkb0a4wwgm0mw9R_bSrlF0ar9HWRlcdyRQ9ObU6eNyuEb0bxZU58jcpNVsqt2p9gAzwxuep8aNAsGdGeeQouMaBOukqmuwx495a4XVQXsTLR2vAeOkDNWWmdQ7dq_ed9M2mOfimCINXsrp0tWdVGro1paWM2ug7SINZXhToEImGyrNDfTEr1qyr0aeSIxuSBysLcf3cZa2xEg1NwAaszXl6UD-lPblvV-n6iod26I7ROwzUGMMR93RMRQq3wbEM9flgM6AJFo8h6uHkb4sriuMbrXDXIy1mgtnmc1QrWCJQdzvja1qExMgbhC1EWwORR07m7Ld0kvYac1vAO3A%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6eca378171af4ee8a008ca71c284c998&_e=kQP_ldX8fkAYGdE4w9CNcaaCXuYpssLb9f2kp6i2FaHd3nGXWn2WHzGw6l8ggz3ckf0urkb0a4wwgm0mw9R_bSrlF0ar9HWRlcdyRQ9ObU6eNyuEb0bxZU58jcpNVsqt2p9gAzwxuep8aNAsGdGeeQouMaBOukqmuwx495a4XVQXsTLR2vAeOkDNWWmdQ7dq_ed9M2mOfimCINXsrp0tWdVGro1paWM2ug7SINZXhToEImGyrNDfTEr1qyr0aeSIK3gO4THwibWno4XFm0AHyu_zJhF281NHLvKSGABCxNOF5BvDd5UQ5jEwFtbdmVY2mA1dj8fWO8kOheBWCgfBJ3CXTBYn56G7JoDnMAPo0GNv4FFLj7EXe190QkALEm3Ja4YBEzCGt8xKqrB_KIIUSQ%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Unfortunately, it’s over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
There's no holding out for a Nikki Haley miracle. We are facing a rematch of the 2020 election and it's up to us to do something.
|
---
Friend,

Nevada has weird politics. The state has both a primary and a caucus, but only the caucus determines the nominee. The primary serves more as a vibe check for the will of people. The vibe check primary was between Nikki Haley and ... “none of the above.” Haley received 33.7% of the vote, and “none of the above” earned 60%. She lost to no one, while Trump won the Nevada caucus to the tune of 99.1%. We can’t ignore it anymore—there's no holding out for a Nikki Haley miracle. We are facing a rematch of the 2020 election. The man who incited an insurrection, vows to put the military on our street, wants to pull us out of NATO, and is running on retribution instead of unity, will now undoubtedly be the Republican nominee. It's up to us to do something. [Help us beat Trump in November.](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VVMTW69hNcZhW4GHql26wrb-rW2QY3Nh59nT3ZN4xH9dF3qn9gW7lCdLW6lZ3lHW2ShyK94kqKCdW4Dmqcx36y9t0N3_VLvzVJVlKW24gzkZ2pP0GSW4WVg7F3LJngbN2NsD8cnTwYlW5SCGMP1jZJhhW2lnSg96gNscKTC5rK673ZjFN8MzN8kzqkSnW5frCR-4NZ4DMW7Gm8Kn8KstHGV_j06t54czQnW6w42Xj7wwYwXV_W1lK8Nx30-W4ph8R_35F52fW5jXljB1L5b7-N7L4cqlHJ5STVWTVxQ2-C733W2FyGtq4wFSmXVYRJNT3FNLM-W2jRC5267CKNyW1lgz0M14pYL-W2KRH2Q98BbnKf8wpyPM04) Your contributions go directly to funding strategic ads, billboards, and nationwide campaigns to make sure Trump never returns to the White House. In simpler terms—it puts gas in our tank. Your support means everything to my team and me. Thanks for being a part of our mission. Sarah Longwell

clean_body: There's no holding out for a Nikki Haley miracle. We are facing a rematch of the 2020 election and it's up to us to do something. | Friend, Nevada has weird politics. The state has both a primary and a caucus, but only the caucus determines the nominee. The primary serves more as a vibe check for the will of people. The vibe check primary was between Nikki Haley and ... “none of the above.” Haley received 33.7% of the vote, and “none of the above” earned 60%. She lost to no one, while Trump won the Nevada caucus to the tune of 99.1%. We can’t ignore it anymore—there's no holding out for a Nikki Haley miracle. We are facing a rematch of the 2020 election. The man who incited an insurrection, vows to put the military on our street, wants to pull us out of NATO, and is running on retribution instead of unity, will now undoubtedly be the Republican nominee. It's up to us to do something. Your contributions go directly to funding strategic ads, billboards, and nationwide campaigns to make sure Trump never returns to the White House. In simpler terms—it puts gas in our tank. Your support means everything to my team and me. Thanks for being a part of our mission. Sarah Longwell | | Republican Accountability, 1100 Vermont Ave. NW, Tenth Floor, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ra-pac.org

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: “I just hope both teams have fun”
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lSjsP6bVRgweAmgSICv2VhazK6K66qx99AhUwLiyX-qeYuIx91J3h_OvtqdBjhNASfvDOtmaYa0qBQmESvgvuBCVCi_tdYPJMULLR7E_Lhp73QmbENGZfVC8YukLJ6DkbuiQ5DMQqG9ElDWQRcy0403LFrTVjaFCNlBFFD-Vpz1UuE4HQgoHCCEN6RV3cXfDTjBdP0wFtdenvFz2Y08Iuw==&c=MiwxHtC-smlMe8RktxlwmsvamTfB5j9OCp_AeQTKI02OBRO9yp2yvA==&ch=pQdbGJRcxBYL6c8vHyUJO6EvHGgHQX4LkknAZwjq3jYxsjSocN4M5A==)
---
| | [CLICK HERE to support our campaign.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lSjsP6bVRgweAmgSICv2VhazK6K66qx99AhUwLiyX-qeYuIx91J3h_OvtqdBjhNASfvDOtmaYa0qBQmESvgvuBCVCi_tdYPJMULLR7E_Lhp73QmbENGZfVC8YukLJ6DkbuiQ5DMQqG9ElDWQRcy0403LFrTVjaFCNlBFFD-Vpz1UuE4HQgoHCCEN6RV3cXfDTjBdP0wFtdenvFz2Y08Iuw==&c=MiwxHtC-smlMe8RktxlwmsvamTfB5j9OCp_AeQTKI02OBRO9yp2yvA==&ch=pQdbGJRcxBYL6c8vHyUJO6EvHGgHQX4LkknAZwjq3jYxsjSocN4M5A==)
---
| February 11, 2024

Friend,

Happy Super Bowl Sunday. Have you heard anyone say the phrase "I just hope both teams have fun" today?

My daughter jokingly told me that this morning. It had me thinking, that is the viewpoint of many of our Republican lawmakers on Beacon Hill.

For too long, the Republican Leadership in the Massachusetts House and Senate have played the game of "going along to get along" and making sure they don't fight too hard for our Republican values. God forbid they take a vote that might make their Democrat friends upset.

Here's the thing. I'm not against bipartisanship. I think it's important for lawmakers to work together and deliver results for the people.

However, in a state with veto-proof Democrat supermajorities in both the House and the Senate, combined with a radical leftist activist as the Governor, don't you think it would be nice to show the people of Massachusetts an alternative to the craziness?

In the recent gun grab bill, one of the most extreme gun control bills in the country, the Republican Senate Leader voted WITH the Democrats.

In a recent bill which provides state-funded sex changes to children, members of Republican leadership voted WITH the Democrats, including fellow member of the Republican State Committee Representative Paul Frost.

Speaking of Representative Paul Frost, this member of the Republican State Committee has voted for other Democrat bills in the House such as:
\- a bill giving "free" in-state tuition to illegal immigrants.
\- a bill using tax dollars to pay for abortions.

Does that sound like someone who should be a Republican State Representative AND member of the Republican State Committee?

Absolutely not!

That's why on March 5th, it's so important you vote for conservative candidates for Republican State Committee.

Click this link to find your conservative state committee candidates: [mafreedomslate.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lSjsP6bVRgweAmgSICv2VhazK6K66qx99AhUwLiyX-qeYuIx91J3hwdnibgw6y7V9TOqS6uq--ekcP4nljdBV3gEU8W1RK7Bels8WJZXcVwIi2e4nziajxv5SLZJpPO_8TfD8V-pqyGcZG4CxvYQAg==&c=MiwxHtC-smlMe8RktxlwmsvamTfB5j9OCp_AeQTKI02OBRO9yp2yvA==&ch=pQdbGJRcxBYL6c8vHyUJO6EvHGgHQX4LkknAZwjq3jYxsjSocN4M5A==)
---
| We need to elect a Republican State Committee who will actually fight for Republican values, and not have the mindset of "simply hoping both sides have fun."

When we elect a conservative Republican State Committee that actually fights for Republican values, we can get to work electing Republican State Representatives and Senators who actually fight for our values.

Do you want to join the fight? Please respond to this email, and I will connect you with candidates near you who need your support.

[CLICK HERE TO DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lSjsP6bVRgweAmgSICv2VhazK6K66qx99AhUwLiyX-qeYuIx91J3h_OvtqdBjhNASfvDOtmaYa0qBQmESvgvuBCVCi_tdYPJMULLR7E_Lhp73QmbENGZfVC8YukLJ6DkbuiQ5DMQqG9ElDWQRcy0403LFrTVjaFCNlBFFD-Vpz1UuE4HQgoHCCEN6RV3cXfDTjBdP0wFtdenvFz2Y08Iuw==&c=MiwxHtC-smlMe8RktxlwmsvamTfB5j9OCp_AeQTKI02OBRO9yp2yvA==&ch=pQdbGJRcxBYL6c8vHyUJO6EvHGgHQX4LkknAZwjq3jYxsjSocN4M5A==)

Join our team, [consider donating to our campaign,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lSjsP6bVRgweAmgSICv2VhazK6K66qx99AhUwLiyX-qeYuIx91J3h_OvtqdBjhNASfvDOtmaYa0qBQmESvgvuBCVCi_tdYPJMULLR7E_Lhp73QmbENGZfVC8YukLJ6DkbuiQ5DMQqG9ElDWQRcy0403LFrTVjaFCNlBFFD-Vpz1UuE4HQgoHCCEN6RV3cXfDTjBdP0wFtdenvFz2Y08Iuw==&c=MiwxHtC-smlMe8RktxlwmsvamTfB5j9OCp_AeQTKI02OBRO9yp2yvA==&ch=pQdbGJRcxBYL6c8vHyUJO6EvHGgHQX4LkknAZwjq3jYxsjSocN4M5A==) and encourage your friends and family to vote for Diehl and Boss for Republican State Committee on March 5th.

As always, thank you for your support. Enjoy the game today!

clean_body: | | | | == | | == | February 11, 2024 Friend, Happy Super Bowl Sunday. Have you heard anyone say the phrase "I just hope both teams have fun" today? My daughter jokingly told me that this morning. It had me thinking, that is the viewpoint of many of our Republican lawmakers on Beacon Hill. For too long, the Republican Leadership in the Massachusetts House and Senate have played the game of "going along to get along" and making sure they don't fight too hard for our Republican values. God forbid they take a vote that might make their Democrat friends upset. Here's the thing. I'm not against bipartisanship. I think it's important for lawmakers to work together and deliver results for the people. However, in a state with veto-proof Democrat supermajorities in both the House and the Senate, combined with a radical leftist activist as the Governor, don't you think it would be nice to show the people of Massachusetts an alternative to the craziness? In the recent gun grab bill, one of the most extreme gun control bills in the country, the Republican Senate Leader voted WITH the Democrats. In a recent bill which provides state-funded sex changes to children, members of Republican leadership voted WITH the Democrats, including fellow member of the Republican State Committee Representative Paul Frost. Speaking of Representative Paul Frost, this member of the Republican State Committee has voted for other Democrat bills in the House such as: \- a bill giving "free" in-state tuition to illegal immigrants. \- a bill using tax dollars to pay for abortions. Does that sound like someone who should be a Republican State Representative AND member of the Republican State Committee? Absolutely not! That's why on March 5th, it's so important you vote for conservative candidates for Republican State Committee. Click this link to find your conservative state committee candidates: == | We need to elect a Republican State Committee who will actually fight for Republican values, and not have the mindset of "simply hoping both sides have fun." When we elect a conservative Republican State Committee that actually fights for Republican values, we can get to work electing Republican State Representatives and Senators who actually fight for our values. Do you want to join the fight? Please respond to this email, and I will connect you with candidates near you who need your support. == Join our team, == and encourage your friends and family to vote for Diehl and Boss for Republican State Committee on March 5th. As always, thank you for your support. Enjoy the game today! Geoff Diehl Donate here: == Checks can be mailed to: Geoff Diehl & KathyJo Boss 10 Village Way Whitman, MA 02382 | | == | | | | | | | | | | RealPolitic Partners | 10 Village Way, Whitman, MA 02382 | | Sent by mailto:info@geoffdiehl.com powered by

body:

|
---
| | | **[Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is running for president to change the way we do politics](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=clear_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=1)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=clear_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
We have the two most unpopular people running for president in modern history.
Americans deserve more than choosing the lesser of two evils.
The Democrat and Republican presidents go back and forth, taking turns in power, but nothing changes. It’s no wonder 8 out of 10 Americans say we’re on the wrong track.
That’s why half of U.S. voters no longer identify with any political party.
RFK Jr. is running for president to change the way we do politics and make a difference for Americans like you.
The question everyone asks, or at least thinks about asking, is this: Can an independent candidate be elected president of the United States?
Absolutely, yes! [And with your help and support, RFK Jr. will be the first independent president since George Washington.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=clear_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=3)
RFK Jr. has a clear path to victory. Here’s why:
Under our electoral system, the candidate with the most votes in a state wins all its electors.
What happens if, on election day in Pennsylvania, for example, the results look like this:
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=clear_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=4)
From this example, RFK Jr. would receive ALL of Pennsylvania’s 20 electoral votes!
This is very doable.
Three-quarters of Americans believe Joe Biden is too old to govern effectively.
Donald Trump faces multiple civil and criminal trials.
Both Biden and Trump have “favorability” ratings that are deep in negative territory.
The American people are ready for a different way. And that’s why RFK Jr. is running to be your next president.
But we can’t do this alone. [Will you help show the rest of America how much support we have?](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=clear_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=5)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=clear_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=11)

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Speaker Mike Johnson: SPECIAL ELECTION MEMO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi for Congress
body:
This is everything you need to know right now

| |
---
| | | **FROM THE DESK _OF_ SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON**
Friend,

This is Speaker Mike Johnson, and I apologize if I'm catching you at a bad time, but I wanted to quickly connect with you on the NY-03 Special Election happening in a matter of days.

As you may already know, our GOP candidate is Mazi Pilip.

She was born in Ethiopia during a time of intense antisemitism, and was then evacuated to Israel. She went on to become a soldier in the IDF before coming to America the right and legal way.

Mazi is pro-family, pro-law enforcement, and pro-border security -- she has my complete and total endorsement.

But what she doesn't have is a rolodex filled with Hollywood billionaires and Wall Street bigwigs cutting big checks like her left-wing opponent does.

And that's why I'm reaching out to you today.

I'm doing everything I can to support Mazi and keep this seat red. I have to -- _**our House Majority depends on it.**_

I've contributed to her, I've asked Republican members of Congress to contribute to her, and now I'm asking you.

So if you can, and only if you can, please join me in supporting Mazi today.

---
| | [SUPPORT MAZI PILIP](http://links.redwavepolitics.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cda30776ad854accbb22becf1f8ed58f&_e=HFf2wns2gZsJ6cbKde0WImQn3Ae5MqlutJggXVxxplPqxjN-O251Dhe8onSmPVCZ_3FlzE_wFvUunj_LUazhBL9TEUe2k4gSvQ5cHo4TOUuy0jx4nXVriS3Mo2i2I0Fo310ASqrMPF-PXVJ8G92KrCPKecDjA-vwKbf6DzUzgZzbXlLQoWvTmYsCCztEHaves_2LTEeHaUagUpZhOVv6vNnWG1C-kP1pN1QmamPLQw5zPrzlRaJ9dr0YLirSo4_kP5F169A8fricRCzNtq4QnXcsRqZXctTEg3eA9UuMlBlFANkzlS7PUw2JQMLsxPUVzb-YkJAlnKWiRzB4z7TDp0GwgVppZ0xFD-iuZJcsae1K39kxnAtPKaVE9XX9JDmNvLG8ynUOpPCaSx4cE7ggZlt4R82aQMHXt7BHNZgpo6q2zH-NEJk3ADmVaa-LudQU)
---

Be it $5 or $20, this race is going to be won and lost at the grassroots level, so every dollar is extremely critical and greatly appreciated.

I hope I can count on you to step up and help today.

Thanks again,
Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e1af375b5d7b44b38149aa23e40c7eb6&_e=mIQ0FD2jTh2MQMaFiUcxwcr-vtjq9yPywnxf9Uu_BF_CP19RkPltVq0oFyUoFs2g50dSPHbJI62kt-66lLySkGnxvJ8F4iD8Inj15WT9TU7QNMCVE-JQG96VDGtu79wWIpOEPgH97WXxPGElsL3DnuHrqzAClFBZfdxH_T4HrnwFF86K3hS9GGyiNbCI59-8AKr1d7BC0eVnnBfiiR9FZhdkjrcHFBhQAncHO2rJBt3AbY8bpbYJw3ITC1udiIcXkNtaxZumtYegN_EyZIN1pQjuCpxTQrA0S-3ppO383RkrrKnlDq9S0e9-TJO1XqL8PRtVF7HCPpRafGQKBJLM_fBCIfHIJhS-txxHsYPV1L0-YSEL8GZNeIQYSmbh61p-n66gjnaMiSgRxoDOlVludA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e1af375b5d7b44b38149aa23e40c7eb6&_e=mIQ0FD2jTh2MQMaFiUcxwcr-vtjq9yPywnxf9Uu_BF_CP19RkPltVq0oFyUoFs2g50dSPHbJI62kt-66lLySkGnxvJ8F4iD8Inj15WT9TU7QNMCVE-JQG96VDGtu79wWIpOEPgH97WXxPGElsL3DnuHrqzAClFBZfdxH_T4HrnwFF86K3hS9GGyiNbCI59-8AKr1d7BC0eVnnBfiiR9FZhdkjrcHFBhQAncHO2rJBt3AbY8bpbYJw3ITC1udiIcX-bc1hfCNXNzy2Z6wXTH-Tt54M0GEkTtkNogDKkTPcWfA_1yNppUSyxxs1hVQBxY7H8wDcFW_QVF4LxgyhS7OIQZA3YGwKhhBXGTnhRYaag5i3dVphkFS4MbJQiEqs7261m6oNYsz6ZTvxL3LRYdIHg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20Editors=20at=20Broad=20+=20Liberty?=
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: How the Super Bowl Unites the Nation | Medical Aid Denied to Delco Inmate Hours Before Death + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week.

Good morning, and welcome to Broad + Liberty's Weekly Reads.

What We’re Hearing: “The popular saying is especially true and applicable to state legislators: Those who fail to learn from history are doomed to repeat it.” - Sen. Kristin Phillips-Hill (R-York)

Subscribe to our daily email list (https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/subscribe?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a3b749423c&utm_source=www.d3playbook.com&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=sample-broad-liberty-daily-update-2-9-2024) and get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox.

** 1. The Super Bowl's Communal Allure
------------------------------------------------------------

By Jeff Hurvitz

“In an age of tribalism, when individuals tend to retreat to their own comfortable corners, the Super Bowl stands as a holdout. It is a throwback to the days when a large segment of the country’s population was affixed to one event at the same time. That it has reached a pinnacle of attention is a culmination of a process that tracks its growth from rather rudimentary origins.”

Why It Matters. “At one time, there were countless national TV shows that reached vast audiences. They drew tens of millions of viewers into a communal experience. With the proliferation of countless choices in both traditional media, pay cable and streaming channels and social media, audiences enjoying the same experience at the same moment on a super-large scale are quite rare.”

Quotable. “An extremely heterogeneous audience whose members need have nothing in common beyond receiving identical messages at about the same time.” – Sydney Head, author, Broadcasting In America, describing a mass audience.

Continue Reading (https://broadandliberty.com/2024/02/09/jeff-hurvitz-the-super-bowls-communal-allure/)

** 2. Medical services denied to Delco inmate 18 hours before suicide attempt in 2022
------------------------------------------------------------

By Todd Shepherd

“Pam Langworthy says she’s at peace with the 2022 death of her son, Patrick. But she also has questions — some things don’t seem to add up or sit well. All of that is true for her at the same time.

With numerous scrapes with police in his history, Patrick was admitted to the George W. Hill Correctional Facility in Delaware County on June 8 for a parole violation.

Patrick Langworthy died by suicide in June 2022. According to an incident report (https://www.documentcloud.org/documents/24407600-langworthy-cir-wm?utm_source=www.d3playbook.com&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=sample-broad-liberty-daily-update-2-9-2024) obtained by Broad + Liberty through a source, at about 1:47 p.m. on the afternoon of June 15, a correctional officer at Delco’s George W. Hill Correctional Facility found Langworthy “sitting on the cell floor with a ripped bed sheet around his neck and tied to the bottom bunk.”

Why It Matters. “In an email, Warden Laura Williams is inquiring with the administrator for Wellpath, the company that provides medical services to the prison. The email subject line is “Interruption of Services,” and the email contains a spreadsheet attachments of the same name. The spreadsheet notes that for Langworthy, there was a request for some kind of medical services or intervention at about 8:45 p.m. on the 14th — or about sixteen to seventeen hours before his suicide attempt.”

Quotable. “It’s very confusing when you look at that and if his medical condition was bad enough that they wanted him to get some medical treatment for whatever reason – it just seems odd to me,” Pam said.”

Continue Reading (https://broadandliberty.com/2024/02/08/exclusive-medical-services-denied-to-delco-inmate-18-hours-before-suicide-attempt-in-2022/)

** 3. Lightning Round
------------------------------------------------------------
* Carbon tax repeal effort reignited (https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/mNI1PUhx4feUsWfHGxEW2yeT0reO4NtoEKggPd7_ubTBeitVKafTvZ02spU3kVWjM9-UA4YvOjqW5F3accZh9DqAMM4zMg_lcrSBetT4rT6hBxnH8-vEizaBHA2P7A-EVEaG4QxIjHTa1VSKahmOnUNzDO6pHBvJjM8ftq-2Fj0clj0QBxnlt4NCNOH0YKtHPgNiKLUrakv9f9lZoZz_MG0WT6VmOCw6kK1ZCVIRsBa7L7BvD5ckgk_RKig7_2zMTq-5seYPPc2ysYZjwLQ-GQbG1GVeneeZMitf4dvD3QuEGd-QKb5Ha-IxJ2k4jamR/43p/E_twoHZ8R-mIxhZ15dCNuA/h24/ybSYJCDFottZFRSM8h2YOd7TFjG1XR5t8pdlX7CN2Ig)
* Shapiro proposes $48.3 billion budget (https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/mNI1PUhx4feUsWfHGxEW2yeT0reO4NtoEKggPd7_ubTBeitVKafTvZ02spU3kVWjM9-UA4YvOjqW5F3accZh9DqAMM4zMg_lcrSBetT4rT70LjQ9kxOcVoNBakkrZac6q_qxjjnkZdGvAQWxN5upT_1DZgslHDepv2Ri7zMZyxekCXUY39GknTHu0zjWfjA41hseRqnC_FzUG5Q_1E5xFrM_TWOfIFGxOWwhH3uv4H9MUn_J59-r8LEoMMk4KSi1-8FEOfbtVrQFUqlyg5r0EuYs4gXun64eBCwnZNvzFNBP7a8e9ES5s05fHQKssJRQ/43p/E_twoHZ8R-mIxhZ15dCNuA/h25/oKbzLZ5DgTFRur_KVPsMgnc4C_vhBWwox_DWFRTfYkg)
* Sen. Kristin Phillips-Hill: Lavish spending requests will mean higher taxes on all Pennsylvanians (https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/mNI1PUhx4feUsWfHGxEW2yeT0reO4NtoEKggPd7_ubTBeitVKafTvZ02spU3kVWjM9-UA4YvOjqW5F3accZh9DqAMM4zMg_lcrSBetT4rT41tFvrsY1tE2w03Dffbe1MiWKUEJe6QegzfS71lXWBEpRH7VFfsCJ8jXyAWtwKNVmcxANvauYxJEGiAVH684J1ENNCNdElXdkCqNYkD08qO1OsZZOtPQZ5tt2AVegCnHDb4OxQOqlzeUggkAaR91B67mA6htY0UG0eKvFORv_uVZkPwOps_o1w5Qqj0vdlOLkDiZpYbIfvgWAcDcTgVh2u/43p/E_twoHZ8R-mIxhZ15dCNuA/h26/NIIKUMK2o7x6B-jFdquBPZSiE54qLwXJJCKsWZo7lJQ)
* Exclusive: County investigators not notified after 2022 inmate suicide at Delaware County prison (https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/mNI1PUhx4feUsWfHGxEW2yeT0reO4NtoEKggPd7_ubTBeitVKafTvZ02spU3kVWjM9-UA4YvOjqW5F3accZh9DqAMM4zMg_lcrSBetT4rT5udoxy_fc1B1XdCntNVSZRoTHpAwsWKuw26HrDJhjkkWBuT-ZTKQKs02r9OQ2gABK_VwYGfEySnyaEemfXr0D6WaxY012aCF6gp-_KaR1Tj_UUyo1XMSwIKa9HflPkQyMlRy7zV720UuNIqSe60bd-wSlHAM1Tyn1qXCbxZMIFackOKWHkbe-UwDy-_Fwbfm6o7FP3EO-94pSqZSzt-mJn/43p/E_twoHZ8R-mIxhZ15dCNuA/h27/sYYB4CivqZvko5BUWynU8qwLkyrNjSl61yd5eBPAIK4)
* Andy Bloom: Don’t Swift boat this campaign (https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/mNI1PUhx4feUsWfHGxEW2yeT0reO4NtoEKggPd7_ubTBeitVKafTvZ02spU3kVWjM9-UA4YvOjqW5F3accZh9DqAMM4zMg_lcrSBetT4rT6X14SNr2Moy8CFGcQ9mCLtpuA-6t5gBzEMezaAa34oYqNtsWAMxR5qMLrWdyKRjjxC9UUTz4_PxcnrdkfQvviJI_w7Ou2WMui71MtidC0K60tIyJO03y7lPJU9NqUtBf9amRsUCT9J7oYltbgBDSDJ8R5HxUmX_ki4H4Os_EQEsSxsHWMVcp_PHH9PwfOOGiGYc1yXvqBHEeWxXIcXscPF/43p/E_twoHZ8R-mIxhZ15dCNuA/h28/EKnc7XRTtQD-WJRiDie1QGky73GbWcPyc5okBzGdGnk)

What We’re Reading...
Good news for Pennsylvania Republicans? It's not that common lately, but this week in POLITICO, Charles McElwee wrote that from Reading to Allentown to Hazleton, Pennsylvania's "Latino Belt" is a rare bright spot for the GOP (https://www.politico.com/news/magazine/2024/02/09/latinos-pennsylvania-politics-00139944) . "In Pennsylvania, as in many other states, Latinos have traditionally voted Democratic by large margins. But in places like Hazleton and elsewhere in the Latino Belt, there are growing signs that those habits are fraying."

Broad + Liberty is funded exclusively by readers like you.

Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. As the 2024 elections draw near, please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject matter, please let us know in the contribution form or at editors@broadandliberty.com (mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com) .

As always, gifts made to Broad + Liberty are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at Broad + Liberty

subject: This one pasta helps blood sugar
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=6zs1j7skt6bmn2rn8d8b25itbazoyq9l3jditwi9i41j21cqmxs4ypfa46f41rzrh3nae0ej17mkr3w5nkqqtzsfvbvu8dmd8f8k5m3i856quj1r16&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| | | |
# 1 of these pasta dishes can HELP your BLOOD SUGAR... Can you spot it?
| | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=8hjq6wshzwc8c5eu1vyvt9eqksvgczkox93bllgd6g4it9lpz6hzig59134og2vn2pd2ipvxnbo1rcvgdvmy7odgiz5s8qvt1jhmcqzxkvazky0ffici812i0ilyt880ju686sfm7qzsbln65uldy3msc9xafj0rei6zvwggy7x825lcehgc2wc7s8eynmavjvcidj0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=s8ppel)
---
Look closely at the three pasta dishes above...
One has been slightly tweaked without changing the taste... it still uses traditional pasta... it has no weird substituted ingredients... this tweak can be done to any pasta meal, and it can help improve your blood sugar by blocking excess sugars from getting into your cells—reducing the risk of blood sugar spikes...
[This one pasta trick](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=8hjq6wshzwc8c5eu1vyvt9eqksvgczkof1afxpujfj07j57a4vhrtw2sb5l8iuizegrlr9c501f3dx134nrmyso9aylw1jxuektnm5kmfhofp2gc9kz3qogqqfejfkpcq6bsy07c576zyu7ppboeeqonw9ks3l8mwh8pwtckzl5t1lbqo3xjwja1x95963xvq10w8p4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=s8ppel) can be done at home or at your favorite Italian restaurant.
This means you can eat your favorite pasta dish without the worry of unhealthy blood sugar... mac-n-cheese, spaghetti with Sunday sauce, lasagna, pasta salad, beef stroganoff... whatever your favorite pasta dish is, you can now eat it with this one pasta trick.
And best of all, researchers have conducted 8 separate studies proving this pasta trick works.
In this video, Dr. Marlene Merritt shows you the simple, [30-second pasta trick for healthy blood sugar.](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=8hjq6wshzwc8c5eu1vyvt9eqksvgczkp0g9j6d74slhvp0rkxih729lap8g4klm0vn4hk5iaaqm63runt3vl1viasyfzhszwvl3nfj8lb70kdvayc0vmwaxiecy96avrgh8b1vy62lbgv13wxhbfkbq6qmn7q1s5ogm3xqz2bcbc1fr1hnp53mxhc9ti0iuugum7afh&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=s8ppel)
| [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=8hjq6wshzwc8c5eu1vyvt9eqksvgczkp8yh0e4hn42cgeha939gkylii1nb11rzp9dfet238ocd8r9lvfhazszt38yzdalbymlbopavawub460uv62rtd0pr6zrwvqb5nvdjt30y0e91rvldg22h50s18mzka3a04fnfynv6du9l1z4bqv4oxzvbh9guhbrumlvh59h&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=s8ppel)
---
**Does this trick work with other carbs? YES!** This 30-second trick works great with all high-carb foods... breads, potatoes, cakes, and cookies. Just use the same pasta trick [revealed in this video](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=8hjq6wshzwc8c5eu1vyvt9eqksvgczkpsrs4puvtd5y68civwygc7bg3bqvj3i0c08ualk9e138md4se6zfnhd1u0ythuuda20nojrgprgp9wtory4najo4jww8hi4gge8n5iyr1kwe8o2hl28rinnti2n0bk5hgiepvz8rmf9g81sgojchw40tw0m75cuotdsfuxbv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=s8ppel) with all your favorite carb-heavy foods and protect your blood sugar.

[Privacy Policy](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=242gqb98bo13ghboa2d286ierk3i29nxh5ov8zzz8paefso030jqsfbbulxyypg58e1bafo910obcisqchcuntjf8tdymx9zc4slphf4yqogqs52vkyzmrl7bzwip459sugxwreq8z156s2bw95e7y8ot8njt54v8udgifp2xf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=s8ppel) / [Advertise with us](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=12w3f0jlkr7sp1pr8rvf3lt0bfh9j7p1p58gre6tp6qf75awpv00vpttrtahnoyomzvg6xgials6h9vsyf2oqnq8q7rhdv2qitbh6p895bb1wz4hqo7xtqf4zdiy7bkkruotz4dbipyn4pkm80kbgicsq37f2bbqtkxr&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=s8ppel)

subject: Texas has never elected a Black Senator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz and become the first Black Senator from Texas – and I need your help.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78797504/454503453/1682731468?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3458-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2YwYzY4OC1lNmM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfIJhYnDhi5CU-Cp7p2m5ERyCnpqMIS-_8fnchWZYBw=)
Friend, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz and become the first ever Black Senator from Texas. [**If you’re already with me, will you split a donation between me and Jacky Rosen to help power our grassroots campaigns? →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78797505/454503454/1682731468?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3458-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2YwYzY4OC1lNmM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfIJhYnDhi5CU-Cp7p2m5ERyCnpqMIS-_8fnchWZYBw=)
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78797506/454503455/1682731468?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3458-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2YwYzY4OC1lNmM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfIJhYnDhi5CU-Cp7p2m5ERyCnpqMIS-_8fnchWZYBw=)
---
All the way back in 1870, Hiram Rhodes Revels, a pastor and State Senator from Mississippi, was elected as the first Black U.S. Senator. Since then, we've come a long way as a country. **But representation – like our democracy – is a work in progress, and I believe we can do better.**

Black Americans have long faced far _too many_ obstacles like: discrimination, lower pay, higher job instability – not to mention the racist voter suppression laws that Texas Republicans like Ted Cruz have championed, which make it harder for certain folks to vote.
**The bottom line is this: It's essential that our government reflects the people it represents. **
I'm ready to defeat Ted Cruz this November and fight to build a more perfect union for my boys and every kid in Texas. But unlike Ted Cruz, I don't have corporate special interests footing the bill for my campaign.

clean_body: I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz and become the first Black Senator from Texas – and I need your help. | | | = Friend, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz and become the first ever Black Senator from Texas. = | | = All the way back in 1870, Hiram Rhodes Revels, a pastor and State Senator from Mississippi, was elected as the first Black U.S. Senator. Since then, we've come a long way as a country. But representation – like our democracy – is a work in progress, and I believe we can do better. Black Americans have long faced far too many obstacles like: discrimination, lower pay, higher job instability – not to mention the racist voter suppression laws that Texas Republicans like Ted Cruz have championed, which make it harder for certain folks to vote. The bottom line is this: It's essential that our government reflects the people it represents. I'm ready to defeat Ted Cruz this November and fight to build a more perfect union for my boys and every kid in Texas. But unlike Ted Cruz, I don't have corporate special interests footing the bill for my campaign. To win, I need a massive movement of grassroots supporters to step up and join me in this fight.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation split between Colin Allred and Jacky Rosen will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I'm so grateful to have you fighting with me. – Colin | * By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: State Democrats prepare for upcoming races while Republicans attack LGBTQ+ representation… and everything else you need to know in the states.
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, February 11th, 2024 | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGZy8uzjP7lQns4eM7mQr18nbBTscuYL22isIY29FSQLcV6mr91eEUVyemsu9wrmEdKfUol6ra6mgPDPO5Av17eb5uUWRn6kpL6hFH2hpW8ZQEIDyUKQMKZRhcob4Hsg9KvprybiDgkVg1PQK8DdD1vXNu2KPpbFE24FDAcTK2CYWPTeHNjGauuyDwIxAPygtBcZA7ZIH6fsp96FmwZraiuHnChTGRZqOjdjExX8Bm9pIlaFDprWJR6ObvbIupPud_skXYm8JpCg9D_HrcVK-zT9BPVBmrZlwjEJZwz8W29KlfielwN10IwRVHcE20I5ndBzwikMaD6Vh2V6helSKh_sLDXQpsmLJH2QNBxA9FsXmORoz2wgz7Hp4iv48X9d90tnERl-Lc0Qo2YqEH7jL-L80m-sXQQDL8wZXAyorGNiPOzOieHxqnd35oHseWS_7EPcKFO5V8bRZGs_C2fvirjem3c8YfehnT3y9XmS0V07zTq3eGcjOeN4izCuPqYLaAU/43r/DuL_f4KAS-G1FlFo2C_7BA/h0/F--YlLtF92RQEWyMvzbPRsTSAfaXf5Ilp-Oo7hOY19U)
---
1️⃣ **_Florida:_ State Supreme Court will hear abortion ballot measure case **
In Florida, the state’s supreme court is reviewing a proposed ballot measure to enshrine abortion in the state’s constitution. [This marks the final step the proposed measure will undertake before appearing on the ballot → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDDUV27dB1SLFWpo-Uwox6EM4x8Z-u268AVIePN0X_HlYMpi9gpVMch_e8vj2Ga-qYUUNLu7UjR_zWsMWXKDVKUwd_ZZFn1baWUylqNFqAA3HTAIL2vjMMBr40arFMwEHYxTlVs9hfV_5xg_NnXOFcuU6O7dHXqS3DPtr0WvWAnskn_W7USrFDVu22i5JJf_OYYgw5JLRW_tPdU-4q7hiDxoQ2LPzxmzej9bfFyhppPzro0Z1ofeLPnJNnWkhwzrea26aRZ-r96KLWcg9xRkgl8CEhbEUkkfKfhpuiQDNGEFfrwhEuYV-dinkmJiX3ddvskzLHt1RpU9cAG1vHqmu3q05chm_TRd23xzdX6r8Hvrx-2vw27uBTcs_FjqTjdj31IktZP_zWDD6UT9qAmwN-tlBU7o5KtYOuzKJNH3sjXacOr1ND7i4pS00ePpO9bdi0UrzP9pXYfqlQC6a33Azz6QVy1hmqS8yo53in_r5nsXjO6DyaJBYLOfu-Z_J3cGMUHz3mxT-yKvs4-r6fD253rPspmEZAA-IoviFgY3kZvNB0gDtG9vQ4K_FYc96TcMeLMBQv45mQVydGB9SRVfOJcz7gLXQWSzwtmyjXCgSGHZi/43r/DuL_f4KAS-G1FlFo2C_7BA/h1/zmU6Trde3L96GylNHfZFBLiXyvV7DPXow_4c7EI8-YI)

2️⃣ **_Oklahoma:_ Republicans hope to ban the celebration of Pride Month **
In Oklahoma, Republicans proposed a bill to prohibit state agencies from celebrating Pride Month – a time designated to honor and uphold LGBTQ+ visibility and existence. [**This is Oklahoma Republicans’ latest attack on LGBTQ+ freedoms and is among the over 50 anti-LGBTQ+ bills proposed in the state so far this year →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEvBrroImTsrPwD3k3T4tQ4gZl2Dl9Z8qQfnZXzLQ0oxqEuHWhGIvQz8lh7WhdsVvudEBHVqW_e2DtmrIx4ZTz7B-QUXt_QrdgwnPd-7luCGmHwC9vt8u4bpGDMyBC8NdmJ2BTZ12lGzxkGqvTiu758OR_DIkT1osbZCrwMrEk9KkEFLuytdhC6UDLZBtcxKEhga_YOnuh348V8Wi0bEKYyQPoCqkkUxCrSCVGgey2kvlmA2rvHyjj41_ur487h_W7px8icgaVSa86R-uFKUzigPT1VOcXxdTwzfyt6K06XtvvJusLNTjWepnyFXIHjCu_t6BGXcEtkRt_xsXEw-HLzqXDNd_7ip256IDnYsyHfnhYz8kb7ukXHlabahKIkWQbJr4i1VowMAjS97-HQat_ABW3FNZhgcPqYRpPspVmaW7gtI2p1ANHJ0gJWCTc-c15Gx_QtgCBOfiv8po-6wtRDf_CBOryBrHDm534YMcFcSSG_cHcFcO9OcWLfW3i3zmoMuIywLfHBnjt7dfrC_8I7_F3CCNWy-BVeuw4lo6H19dpPQhfcorjxtD6Zp9wxu57aDomHkOsr9J-q80lJOFLA0GBbjIIH6-vJgn1WEDGCtORy9zC2oYV0FtrI-v2eyJ7IEYywU04ehBmBxq3owHmE/43r/DuL_f4KAS-G1FlFo2C_7BA/h2/9A7j-vjI0ssN8O7I7VrELDQo_5bl54AnQ7r9Lj5hS7w)
3️⃣ **_Virginia:_ Democrats pass assault weapons ban in both chambers **
In Virginia, Democrats used their newly won majorities in the House and Senate to pass an assault weapons ban. [**Virginia Dems have committed to enacting new gun safety measures that will make our communities safer →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDDUV27dB1SLFWpo-Uwox6EOSj-f2GB18S5Jyd3qa9145xpBINlOHrrbodS78I2osx4i8bCtPgC5IJX8_ZkooUvIZYtmU6Y00CgSXITqMr-TD5B0R-0EV4RUL5EgP0zr7Xw2BMecrD6P7oYCbs_cRR1cseDPGrRWZ9ZcLbYqBAXV_i8__kXssRMPIgFm9gF7riDJfxBH3n967OXmnkOJv_NDuU_lh_heZfeY0VDSvf-M00XN6rtrTcy22oU8ftGdVJq3Ewqkx-2bTctV5CQZDFWvKtZdWoDhkWviy7OMYRp46FcnWWvhQWc7merFY70VxRUtV14SIYcpaL2c78UhS81KXMlFpRxljVhqNTc9yk1km6Bsl7MLuNlBkvTOlK-PapbvlTqnAWo3tqAh4a8Va-lcz-AGHEUvjhZYhTEZQ9wJfje1AN8WYoFgLZ74Ml4OK2VsXyG3nnM3Qt8Q36oUVLNebXudEuK0i0l6cn2QDYrWWJ1LR1LfCudBV8PAgc-EF0fmkmCbhPIdpi5XiHUusyUxelxecg1ZQLbvl4ieLpDYn0vC3E9RETOzRkepCKIF8CGw7RiY3ksp245muI91-Y_KyrDQqTl-iEayavNf_NhzE8VZJv2HZQZfnHwYSAyaIPw/43r/DuL_f4KAS-G1FlFo2C_7BA/h3/fD9zBxqsawldSI0g-t__lp3R7-cA2FxXoqrHyt8s-xo)
4️⃣ **_Missouri:_ State Senate votes against adding exceptions to the state’s abortion ban in cases of rape and incest **
In Missouri, the state Senate delivered a crushing blow to abortion access when they voted against adding exceptions for rape and incest to the state’s existing total abortion ban. [**This marks the latest example of a GOP-held legislature using its power to implement life-threatening abortion restrictions →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXTEBokwJ0izHXMWrpJl2hHxa7smB-ZQFjWxPWz8ru1cicPUKra_XLrb6q3lCNMHB9URRa8D9ZyLE8QTxBllWcBYf8XLDfFD-7zg429QldO4PbNSziXfg-HVTXrXwoxahMCNnMEi8X8NZmLBJpb0yXY9jcmK_RjtwWGCm8a8ol3QJ-yesRMJ92l44C-u3-zv_AaFS_611g0c3bTSbUsPalvfk6Qj-4ytTwYznooVaRE567hssKtmr2OoZJJHIb8bqBbakjfMmXzz8HIBIMQIhEFJTykjiYrJy4QqCtiaZ1ZnCHLV8jKD3KKHKIkRpfytALZkGX50RlIHO5KvQsn7sTe4R7lTeJipEz-dm4lvozYcD0H6hSdGZa1O8LscB8s-Ol_vFIgGbKo6LPm9T81ryPIP3XCY0gINh16zX7zR_B6pKXUlUzVdVM5mQwrVEkLWAOvkoB75nt2l51dPbDyDVT8NnPrnRAkT3Gh0AbPs3h2ayAJS2WXqYzvIw1YnyUUgVwMNtU8jO0eTHDKompc_riCTV1edV8tGg25ZKTTRhMmKw0NC61tjhaCgOam8i2enYWIJ9Jez40zLptIxMcnG2gISBXvQrsb8zqr0trEXdCRrcZ2h7OqnsJf0uBnTfM3fkliRj-7h1vSrY-fMVdxe9peU/43r/DuL_f4KAS-G1FlFo2C_7BA/h4/wg3xibffeGcpN60oV1Bph_TdC5HWQVK891Xh8FTnSfQ)

clean_body: Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, February 11th, 2024 | | | | | 1️⃣ Florida: State Supreme Court will hear abortion ballot measure case In Florida, the state’s supreme court is reviewing a proposed ballot measure to enshrine abortion in the state’s constitution. 2️⃣ Oklahoma: Republicans hope to ban the celebration of Pride Month In Oklahoma, Republicans proposed a bill to prohibit state agencies from celebrating Pride Month – a time designated to honor and uphold LGBTQ+ visibility and existence. 3️⃣ Virginia: Democrats pass assault weapons ban in both chambers In Virginia, Democrats used their newly won majorities in the House and Senate to pass an assault weapons ban. 4️⃣ Missouri: State Senate votes against adding exceptions to the state’s abortion ban in cases of rape and incest In Missouri, the state Senate delivered a crushing blow to abortion access when they voted against adding exceptions for rape and incest to the state’s existing total abortion ban. 🗳️ Special Elections: Over the next few months, Democrats are facing over a dozen special elections in key states like Pennsylvania and Michigan, so **** | | ---|---|--- | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Russell's iPhone
subject: America is tired of the lifetime politicians
body:
I was the first to sign the Term Limit Pledge
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F31GPwnVLXXujgCYcPXdifImupCZzzRu7uSo3742z_uO_K1kr6lsVMzio70I19_Y8lIt1szdkQh1-d7UVkKIbrfkgb_S704MtK_MybWR0EkfWuzsQxtjjY9HXY7IVc92J2XvzcYQyn2bg5iobdEsEu5KbsThXaEjWUNy7t4TbNlDZmwYsSOZgLUVS6ire2oq2AiVYPA5aF_ecMEXwAvtpCcwJ0ik8b3yOd3KgbK6D-BhCZs2bO4b3Zqu3qd5vnKx-pXTz2NRviNhtJIG9PSg-Bt0mH99Qp513E9ST8ktVOQksYvCXr_U9g==&c=6HQ7yo-M5E9eYaDO5tGjE6VQ4LhpgZgkCjXCvlCx3wJFH-B-f8tB3A==&ch=3ZWsePf02yKvPIYAxOlN8RXzVk8EYkk9LZx0Ld_GRpJ1KhEJwRh7lA==)
---
| If Joe Biden's press conference showed us anything, Peter, it showed how badly we need term limits for our leaders up in Washington.
Between being a Senator, the Vice President under Obama, and the current President, Joe Biden has been in leadership for OVER 50 years!
That is absurd and that is why I fully support term limits.
The American people are tired of dealing with the lifetime politicians in Washington. They want new faces, new ideas, and are tired of the status quo in Washington.
I not only support term limits but that is why I was the FIRST candidate in my race to sign the Term Limits Pledge.
[Join me in supporting term limits for our leadership in Washington.>>> ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F31GPwnVLXXujgCYcPXdifImupCZzzRu7uSo3742z_uO_K1kr6lsVMzio70I19_Y8lIt1szdkQh1-d7UVkKIbrfkgb_S704MtK_MybWR0EkfWuzsQxtjjY9HXY7IVc92J2XvzcYQyn2bg5iobdEsEu5KbsThXaEjWUNy7t4TbNlDZmwYsSOZgLUVS6ire2oq2AiVYPA5aF_ecMEXwAvtpCcwJ0ik8b3yOd3KgbK6D-BhCZs2bO4b3Zqu3qd5vnKx-pXTz2NRviNhtJIG9PSg-Bt0mH99Qp513E9ST8ktVOQksYvCXr_U9g==&c=6HQ7yo-M5E9eYaDO5tGjE6VQ4LhpgZgkCjXCvlCx3wJFH-B-f8tB3A==&ch=3ZWsePf02yKvPIYAxOlN8RXzVk8EYkk9LZx0Ld_GRpJ1KhEJwRh7lA==)

| A note from Russell...
The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. New Hampshire families know that our current leadership in Washington is failing us and have forgotten the 'Live Free or Die' values that we all pride ourselves on in New Hampshire. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington.
Thank you.
-Russell

clean_body: I was the first to sign the Term Limit Pledge | | | | == | If Joe Biden's press conference showed us anything, Peter, it showed how badly we need term limits for our leaders up in Washington. Between being a Senator, the Vice President under Obama, and the current President, Joe Biden has been in leadership for OVER 50 years! That is absurd and that is why I fully support term limits. The American people are tired of dealing with the lifetime politicians in Washington. They want new faces, new ideas, and are tired of the status quo in Washington. I not only support term limits but that is why I was the FIRST candidate in my race to sign the Term Limits Pledge. == | | == | Sent from Russell's iPhone | == | Follow Russell on Social Media: | == == == | == | A note from Russell... The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. New Hampshire families know that our current leadership in Washington is failing us and have forgotten the 'Live Free or Die' values that we all pride ourselves on in New Hampshire. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington. Thank you. -Russell Peter \- Forward this message to 5 FRIENDS AND FAMILY MEMBERS and help us raise awareness for our mission to achieve a better future for New Hampshire. name: Team Slotkin
subject: The messy tale of the Michigan GOP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1122%2E135344%2EF_cCmI)

Team,
The Michigan Republican Party is a hot mess. Here’s a quick summary of the last few months:
2024 kicked off with Kristina Karamo at the helm of the state party. You may remember Karamo: she was the Republican Nominee for Secretary of State in 2022 and believes abortion is “child sacrifice” and “a very satanic practice.”
The infighting has been intense, culminating in multiple votes to remove Karamo as chair. Her main rival for the position is Pete Hoekstra, Trump’s ambassador to the Netherlands, who recently said he welcomes candidates for party positions who believe in QAnon.
Trump weighed-in to support Hoekstra, as did one of our opponents, former Congressman Mike Rogers, QAnon notwithstanding.
With less than a month till the presidential primary here in Michigan, this fight between the dueling leaders of the Michigan GOP is bound to heat up.
In other words, we’re up against a far-right GOP here in Michigan – a party that has proven over and over they will kiss Trump’s ring and do whatever it takes to make sure he wins the state. As Elissa has said, we can’t fix the Republican Party, much as we wish we could. But what we can do is defeat these extremists at the ballot box over and over again, until the Party of Lincoln decides to walk another path.
[**Can you chip in $3 to help us defeat these Republican extremists (again) and help Elissa keep Michigan blue?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240211-1-30&t=2&akid=1122%2E135344%2EF_cCmI)
