name: Terry Schilling, American Principles Project
subject: APP’s thoughts on Bud Light and the Super Bowl
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bUbcu0DKFmfAw_Ueylr01pwJThprGQVIijq9bLXtWjaY5aVar_i5qvUf-300b_dPFxDbtnmyBWLgTGkwzee3mSz-elzs-bL2DgvAocswMk8s3ASfI-csPF0kxl3-v7xdGsgqybJJmdqGUFGe5KBs0i6MQoMYXBoTmelwMHAdSZhokwrboS42d1v7lhkvyZn_wlFUhPUpS-R1H9X2pVzKx5bNshNCKIEu&c=wTJJ3AxGzhaYQj4mDdZucYZySArCTzcUu6e0uH4RhsUHNBhGsV_7rQ==&ch=QpaPGf1d04aonfjpb5bY1UGUzZbkiNf-DoUZPkvo8Hcw0zDMdYGsPA==)
---
Greetings!,
Prepare yourself. Tonight, you are going to view a lot of Bud Light commercials.
This is the result of a full-court press by the brand to resurrect its image after partnering with Dylan Mulvaney to shove the transgender industry down our throats.
And it's not just limited to the Super Bowl -- Bud Light has partnered with Dana White and UFC, they have sponsored formerly canceled comedian Shane Gillis, and they are now hosting a fundraiser for Donald Trump.
American Principles Project has not received any funding from Bud Light, or its parent company, InBev, but I am still encouraged by this shift.
Simply put, we won. Parents won, APP won, and importantly, our kids won.
Together, we dealt so much damage to Bud Light that they were forced to fire the vice president responsible for the Mulvaney campaign, fund the Trump campaign, and spend hundreds of millions earning back parents' business.
Even more impressive was the tenacity of this boycott. If you recall, Bud Light didn't immediately fire their VP -- they hemmed and hawed and even doubled down, hoping the problem would go away.
It didn't -- parents were relentless, and it made a difference.
[We have made so much progress pushing the transgender agenda away from our kids, but this industry is also relentless. Please consider a donation to help American Principles Project continue passing laws that protect our kids from gender ideology. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bUbcu0DKFmfAw_Ueylr01pwJThprGQVIijq9bLXtWjaY5aVar_i5qvUf-300b_dPFxDbtnmyBWLgTGkwzee3mSz-elzs-bL2DgvAocswMk8s3ASfI-csPF0kxl3-v7xdGsgqybJJmdqGUFGe5KBs0i6MQoMYXBoTmelwMHAdSZhokwrboS42d1v7lhkvyZn_wlFUhPUpS-R1H9X2pVzKx5bNshNCKIEu&c=wTJJ3AxGzhaYQj4mDdZucYZySArCTzcUu6e0uH4RhsUHNBhGsV_7rQ==&ch=QpaPGf1d04aonfjpb5bY1UGUzZbkiNf-DoUZPkvo8Hcw0zDMdYGsPA==)
[Chip in $25, $50, $100, $250, or more!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bUbcu0DKFmfAw_Ueylr01pwJThprGQVIijq9bLXtWjaY5aVar_i5qvUf-300b_dPFxDbtnmyBWLgTGkwzee3mSz-elzs-bL2DgvAocswMk8s3ASfI-csPF0kxl3-v7xdGsgqybJJmdqGUFGe5KBs0i6MQoMYXBoTmelwMHAdSZhokwrboS42d1v7lhkvyZn_wlFUhPUpS-R1H9X2pVzKx5bNshNCKIEu&c=wTJJ3AxGzhaYQj4mDdZucYZySArCTzcUu6e0uH4RhsUHNBhGsV_7rQ==&ch=QpaPGf1d04aonfjpb5bY1UGUzZbkiNf-DoUZPkvo8Hcw0zDMdYGsPA==)
And when you watch those Bud Light ads air, raise a glass and know our team will be right there with you, toasting to a major win for American families.
---
| For the family,
Terry Schilling President American Principles Project

---
[Can the Super Bowl ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bUbcu0DKFmfAw_Ueylr01pwJThprGQVIijq9bLXtWjaY5aVar_i5qvUf-300b_dPA8NLDbOkyLCzLgf_GVM6kuaFief1RCj1adekiMGj97xV5cjER83E9jIv2pLKO_D4mJQfILRfwUE2hJPtk9MsP9np5BCwqUOOnu06xA8mpA72sYJEcvdeWTeCBdiCTsJxRGx0sxWmBfnQcSaCT-jn3Q==&c=wTJJ3AxGzhaYQj4mDdZucYZySArCTzcUu6e0uH4RhsUHNBhGsV_7rQ==&ch=QpaPGf1d04aonfjpb5bY1UGUzZbkiNf-DoUZPkvo8Hcw0zDMdYGsPA==) [Save Bud Light?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bUbcu0DKFmfAw_Ueylr01pwJThprGQVIijq9bLXtWjaY5aVar_i5qvUf-300b_dPA8NLDbOkyLCzLgf_GVM6kuaFief1RCj1adekiMGj97xV5cjER83E9jIv2pLKO_D4mJQfILRfwUE2hJPtk9MsP9np5BCwqUOOnu06xA8mpA72sYJEcvdeWTeCBdiCTsJxRGx0sxWmBfnQcSaCT-jn3Q==&c=wTJJ3AxGzhaYQj4mDdZucYZySArCTzcUu6e0uH4RhsUHNBhGsV_7rQ==&ch=QpaPGf1d04aonfjpb5bY1UGUzZbkiNf-DoUZPkvo8Hcw0zDMdYGsPA==)
Anheuser-Busch is spending big on advertising to lure back customers as Bud Light sales continue to suffer nearly a year after Dylan Mulvaney campaign
After nearly a year of [suffering sales](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bUbcu0DKFmfAw_Ueylr01pwJThprGQVIijq9bLXtWjaY5aVar_i5qvUf-300b_dPvZDVgdU-KayLMvPXceieF6gB_xO_cdvNKW2dvZQMG6hlZnpVIcwpCf2dTl0SV7Juxd8Az4knBE9DFn0ers9C5Yu5b-NPK9iDugOjdDdKG_yEjV6TMULCHyMDYvz2DgwfSVw__gdjXyroFXQsKueUZgymRtY03y0bmRTpxShLoeHLQ8XTxAMLlQ==&c=wTJJ3AxGzhaYQj4mDdZucYZySArCTzcUu6e0uH4RhsUHNBhGsV_7rQ==&ch=QpaPGf1d04aonfjpb5bY1UGUzZbkiNf-DoUZPkvo8Hcw0zDMdYGsPA==) since Bud Light's fateful partnership with transgender activist Dylan Mulvaney, the beleaguered brand is still looking to make a comeback.
Parent company Anheuser-Busch InBev is spending big on [Super Bowl](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bUbcu0DKFmfAw_Ueylr01pwJThprGQVIijq9bLXtWjaY5aVar_i5qvUf-300b_dPhKziK1RNhKEEAiolr31SkOmR4KSRi-qSzNKDSNjGxGvIDH9E7plqbRFI9GGlIGXmJtCqVtdWoYKK3nVdznITJSpHETCCyJzqzsIbx6R0JdJhZzHyh7COa7351QwtHz1vh5H1R60n3ir-Vby9rFG0RA==&c=wTJJ3AxGzhaYQj4mDdZucYZySArCTzcUu6e0uH4RhsUHNBhGsV_7rQ==&ch=QpaPGf1d04aonfjpb5bY1UGUzZbkiNf-DoUZPkvo8Hcw0zDMdYGsPA==) ads and forming new partnerships in an effort to rekindle Americans' affinity for the beer that reigned as top-seller in the U.S. for more than two decades before its fall.
While Bud Light may not be restored to its former glory any time soon, one expert believes it does have an opportunity for redemption, and the strides the company is making now are going in the right direction.
Terry Schilling is the president of the American Principles Project, a group that likens itself as the special interest arm of the American family.
He says the reason [Bud Light](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bUbcu0DKFmfAw_Ueylr01pwJThprGQVIijq9bLXtWjaY5aVar_i5qvUf-300b_dPWVmFSRcE8zEwol4EMBHwS-cLqSb2KsU3EaVZeqk2Z9SXhz3LKDFX5Uo2KhSAbOkAyOYlpDhH_I7B-JH2MgXvIB9kRqff1Cx5Ky6fbTwcXzROZfw-D-KxPQ==&c=wTJJ3AxGzhaYQj4mDdZucYZySArCTzcUu6e0uH4RhsUHNBhGsV_7rQ==&ch=QpaPGf1d04aonfjpb5bY1UGUzZbkiNf-DoUZPkvo8Hcw0zDMdYGsPA==) received so much backlash is that frustration had already been building among much of the American public over radical cultural change being pushed by the media and elite levels of our institutions. So when Bud Light -- a brand everyday Americans loved -- decided to "push" those changes, too, it presented the first opportunity for consumers to respond and strike back.
"Bud Light does this thing with Dylan Mulvaney that is so against their customer base -- the people that made that company successful and profitable -- it is a finger in their eye," Schilling told [FOX Business](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bUbcu0DKFmfAw_Ueylr01pwJThprGQVIijq9bLXtWjaY5aVar_i5qvUf-300b_dP8_kn7SvSgSJS99qNaLhXb_-MLbfGHLVVy6vsygTVcKfN_tO1U7tklypMWkCuiGElte7DYaHt1F-qajxIlct6WA==&c=wTJJ3AxGzhaYQj4mDdZucYZySArCTzcUu6e0uH4RhsUHNBhGsV_7rQ==&ch=QpaPGf1d04aonfjpb5bY1UGUzZbkiNf-DoUZPkvo8Hcw0zDMdYGsPA==) in an interview. "Bud Light became the cultural whipping boy for stepping in it, and they deserved it."
Schilling pointed to the messaging that came out from Bud Light's former marketing vice president at the time, who revealed her agenda to transform what she viewed as the fraternity boy-type image of the brand to appeal to other audiences.
"It failed in an incredible way," Schilling said. "So now the question is, can they repair their image? I do think they can repair it, and frankly, I hope they do, because Bud Light and Budweiser are important American institutions. It's important that we have brands that we're proud of, and I really do hope that they turn this around."
Schilling said Bud Light, so far, is making the right moves to return to its original branding that was so successful in the past. He praised the company for its recently-announced partnerships with comedians [Shane Gillis](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bUbcu0DKFmfAw_Ueylr01pwJThprGQVIijq9bLXtWjaY5aVar_i5qvUf-300b_dPGlaU5x5yfAE7gwotH7FOdtmpO0rHA98pjAZfZH0RBLy36ehUIyY2ShPOAsH7HZg6Ft_yP2FaQ3YRPrV1tmqNSVE08W3hLUAn6SYG9EIdsp8PvGvNHTpwazfudr5xgaZq75gbAe8-QoHVtIPw-7zED9nGqQ2PWARlLTbqnk6hocK1hNp2y1kg94a_For8D-Z8QU7BC6rTaXaQrbN-RXZX8Q==&c=wTJJ3AxGzhaYQj4mDdZucYZySArCTzcUu6e0uH4RhsUHNBhGsV_7rQ==&ch=QpaPGf1d04aonfjpb5bY1UGUzZbkiNf-DoUZPkvo8Hcw0zDMdYGsPA==) and Kam Patterson, saying they are in line with what Bud Light customers expect.
Schilling says the American people are forgiving, but customers will be watching closely, so if Bud Light "steps in it" again with another mistake, it would be "the death knell," and the brand would be "unsalvageable" at that point.
He believes Anheuser-Busch and its brands deserve another shot and believes the American people will give it to them -- eventually.
"I think the big message is to stay out of the culture war. Serve your customer base, serve your clients and respect them," he said, asking rhetorically, "Was it worth it?"

---

Sent by [terry.schilling@americanprinciplesproject.org](mailto:terry.schilling@americanprinciplesproject.org)

It's important that we have brands that we're proud of, and I really do hope that they turn this around." Schilling said Bud Light, so far, is making the right moves to return to its original branding that was so successful in the past. He praised the company for its recently-announced partnerships with comedians == and Kam Patterson, saying they are in line with what Bud Light customers expect. Schilling says the American people are forgiving, but customers will be watching closely, so if Bud Light "steps in it" again with another mistake, it would be "the death knell," and the brand would be "unsalvageable" at that point. He believes Anheuser-Busch and its brands deserve another shot and believes the American people will give it to them -- eventually. "I think the big message is to stay out of the culture war. Serve your customer base, serve your clients and respect them," he said, asking rhetorically, "Was it worth it?" | | | | | | | American Principles Project | 2800 S Shirlington Rd Ste 901, Arlington, VA 22206-3601 | | | Sent by mailto:terry.schilling@americanprinciplesproject.org

name: Rep. Jim Banks
subject: I have some big news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
body:
Join me >>

| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=bf5284b294ab442b95e760fc53c36e81&_e=qghuvwzqUI8_YqUZAGkA3hUtkv7DrL8Q--dnEq47kwACiAGqVYaOInQ0bnM5Lknk62R2ldGAn_iHIBkG7P9NfThMWGhquU3b6uT-o3Q94JO8mA4Yio4vCJukSZLNDYAgvMwAqEC8KSS79mpjG2_oUXcg7_SLyPWKH6F9piIOTlXAm9OrFgfslTlmo-FYAUDGk4ih38SD-MWil4iu8EgApEpCeHNOQlNDutLXD76oW8qOCQmlPmjylv0LtK7TsZqD40qiAm6kPG6ftXlvCdw0CIyzI2a8X6S6jAHiAs4lw-zNp6B1vuT2LXTQTkmOAUfGHPjUbvbmclLSoJZyhMsox5v0XdvvjYC2pl4Cn2ifc9BimyGCR12Bsab48Gl_tnkuQZHSUkzOYW8wzptwac3-3Q%3D%3D)
---
Dear friend,

**_It’s officially Election Year - my campaign to represent the great State of Indiana in the U.S. Senate in 2024 is in full swing._** In the Senate, I intend to protect your freedom, defend our conservative values, and put America first. As we begin this journey together, I want to share my story:

I grew up in a working-class household in Columbia City, Indiana. My father was a factory worker and my mother worked in a nursing home. We often lived paycheck to paycheck, and I was raised in a trailer park for many years.

[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=bf5284b294ab442b95e760fc53c36e81&_e=qghuvwzqUI8_YqUZAGkA3hUtkv7DrL8Q--dnEq47kwACiAGqVYaOInQ0bnM5Lknk62R2ldGAn_iHIBkG7P9NfThMWGhquU3b6uT-o3Q94JO8mA4Yio4vCJukSZLNDYAgvMwAqEC8KSS79mpjG2_oUXcg7_SLyPWKH6F9piIOTlXAm9OrFgfslTlmo-FYAUDGk4ih38SD-MWil4iu8EgApEpCeHNOQlNDutLXD76oW8qOCQmlPmjylv0LtK7TsZqDejL3IUkipFJHxIZLwGxZGlie3T6OP8X-RcJ_crUqGmwC26NCt7uOplVmJQy_sh3L3wbBa8RdOFF6Gjd9TpMjrkuRGMVSpWHmpegDwAWTgMP9uDSdwKVH12hzXlXKo_BysQ0PVzJ1TnKD7YVfoq5qiQ%3D%3D)
Growing up, my parents taught me the values of hard-work, personal responsibility, and service to our community. My father voted for Democrats much of his life, but now, like many Americans, recognizes that the Republican Party is the true party of the working class.

I was the first in my family to attend college. At Indiana University, I met my wonderful wife, Amanda, who has been the biggest blessing in my life. She keeps me grounded and ensures our family stays true to our conservative values every day.

Coming from a humble background, I felt a calling to give back to my community. As such, after serving on a county council, I became a member of the Indiana State Senate in 2010. During my time in office, I took a leave of absence while I was deployed to Afghanistan as a Navy Reserve Supply Corps Officer.

[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=bf5284b294ab442b95e760fc53c36e81&_e=qghuvwzqUI8_YqUZAGkA3hUtkv7DrL8Q--dnEq47kwACiAGqVYaOInQ0bnM5Lknk62R2ldGAn_iHIBkG7P9NfThMWGhquU3b6uT-o3Q94JO8mA4Yio4vCJukSZLNDYAgvMwAqEC8KSS79mpjG2_oUXcg7_SLyPWKH6F9piIOTlXAm9OrFgfslTlmo-FYAUDGk4ih38SD-MWil4iu8EgApEpCeHNOQlNDutLXD76oW8qOCQmlPmjylv0LtK7TsZqD4ZAetkgaOcV0MF5F7eV9CpCMR5FXpXbF58XteVErdKcz6J7qM91RHaHU_lyuy7vfRaohhPcoK30Jmg-yoDYTYJyfMqMUSFLdHBzwxdkQ5ZlvkFg5EmdfJ6Hej9-8up3841st6SZCcr8debhNvHmdKQ%3D%3D)
Serving my country abroad reinforced my resolve to defend the freedoms and values that make America great. As an Afghanistan War veteran, I know what it means to fight for our country and our values.

[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=bf5284b294ab442b95e760fc53c36e81&_e=qghuvwzqUI8_YqUZAGkA3hUtkv7DrL8Q--dnEq47kwACiAGqVYaOInQ0bnM5Lknk62R2ldGAn_iHIBkG7P9NfThMWGhquU3b6uT-o3Q94JO8mA4Yio4vCJukSZLNDYAgvMwAqEC8KSS79mpjG2_oUXcg7_SLyPWKH6F9piIOTlXAm9OrFgfslTlmo-FYAUDGk4ih38SD-MWil4iu8EgApEpCeHNOQlNDutLXD76oW8qOCQmlPmjylv0LtK7TsZqDC49su00TK-jXzFhbXIyC67wZvKxjJnlNFQY9hVXt18TOUmFQZcojF_w4YtkOzeQuP7IaFAXCjiS2Kw8zqu_ymG0W-5_2Zt2BRfsPeOraiJoZc9etieYc6h96PUcHx-e0VnOTDIg8e3Z8jGkPeDV86w%3D%3D)
During my time in Afghanistan, my wife stepped up to fill in for me in the State Senate. I am blessed to have a family dedicated to serving the American people.

Amanda and I started a family back in 2009. We’ve been blessed with three beautiful daughters, Lillian, Elizabeth, and Joann, who inspire me each day. I am fighting for our country because I am fighting for their future. I want my daughters to grow up in a country where they are safe and can thrive.

[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=bf5284b294ab442b95e760fc53c36e81&_e=qghuvwzqUI8_YqUZAGkA3hUtkv7DrL8Q--dnEq47kwACiAGqVYaOInQ0bnM5Lknk62R2ldGAn_iHIBkG7P9NfThMWGhquU3b6uT-o3Q94JO8mA4Yio4vCJukSZLNDYAgvMwAqEC8KSS79mpjG2_oUXcg7_SLyPWKH6F9piIOTlXAm9OrFgfslTlmo-FYAUDGk4ih38SD-MWil4iu8EgApEpCeHNOQlNDutLXD76oW8qOCQmlPmjylv0LtK7TsZqDEvQD1qmBWsYfqBFxKZ-6zRjbbrtHgthR3aqwYnpglZ0gIFaICKZgHKvkIWOmr1wjHjb1u4OdIBJqDzU0j9f2xyoCiISiLx8tA5bvmlfY1agZfrE9LwlutI-LIlid4brVli4_O7Hf82MgXcHiEO7WYA%3D%3D)
Since 2016, I have chosen to continue my service career by representing Indiana’s 3rd district in the U.S. Congress. During my time in the House, I have been a consistent conservative voice dedicated to upholding and protecting the conservative American values that make our nation great. I was elected chair of the Republican Study Committee, the largest caucus of conservatives in the House of Representatives, and have collaborated with strong leaders, like President Trump, to put America first - and he’s already endorsed my campaign!

[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=bf5284b294ab442b95e760fc53c36e81&_e=qghuvwzqUI8_YqUZAGkA3hUtkv7DrL8Q--dnEq47kwACiAGqVYaOInQ0bnM5Lknk62R2ldGAn_iHIBkG7P9NfThMWGhquU3b6uT-o3Q94JO8mA4Yio4vCJukSZLNDYAgvMwAqEC8KSS79mpjG2_oUXcg7_SLyPWKH6F9piIOTlXAm9OrFgfslTlmo-FYAUDGk4ih38SD-MWil4iu8EgApEpCeHNOQlNDutLXD76oW8qOCQmlPmjylv0LtK7TsZqDjBey8B9DhHrSle7XK1iEUD0GXoVrGpcUulwTurtbz6YzkcVbSlihLyyjb1maYGY_0Yd3svFOX_IMuI8KzTSi8QdIVVi_RY1csj_SGojxTh_HvUI0LXIZv8ns4S0uzTbkWXMlPYibqk8E1hVBGixLRA%3D%3D)
As the next Senator of Indiana, I intend to continue defending hard-working Americans and refuse to let the radical Left crush our values and destroy our country. My congressional record of fighting for strong families, limited government, and tighter spending speaks for itself. We have a great country worth defending, and I intend to do just that.

As your next Senator, I will fight to balance the federal budget, protect our Southern border, stand up to China, and defend our children against the Left’s woke ideology. **But, I need support from strong, grassroots conservatives like YOU to ensure our movement makes it all the way to Washington.** [**_Will you join us in preserving the American Dream?_**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=bf5284b294ab442b95e760fc53c36e81&_e=qghuvwzqUI8_YqUZAGkA3hUtkv7DrL8Q--dnEq47kwACiAGqVYaOInQ0bnM5Lknk62R2ldGAn_iHIBkG7P9NfThMWGhquU3b6uT-o3Q94JO8mA4Yio4vCJukSZLNDYAgvMwAqEC8KSS79mpjG2_oUXcg7_SLyPWKH6F9piIOTlXAm9OrFgfslTlmo-FYAUDGk4ih38SD-MWil4iu8EgApEpCeHNOQlNDutLXD76oW8qOCQmlPmjylv0LtK7TsZqDZLH1khWH48OegW_j77leJv-NS3MQI5zpb85b-xHUJDoKljpiMn0OpwfLbXyTpnU6uA1WOrvi9BnFf1F4H_Pk77X8FkcJsTHmZs_LoZMJ9-eiVtr5OmVo6R7Gxku6RvAV93-DDG0n-AFJgYJmuI83hw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Join me >> | Dear friend, It’s officially Election Year - my campaign to represent the great State of Indiana in the U.S. Senate in 2024 is in full swing. In the Senate, I intend to protect your freedom, defend our conservative values, and put America first. As we begin this journey together, I want to share my story: I grew up in a working-class household in Columbia City, Indiana. My father was a factory worker and my mother worked in a nursing home. We often lived paycheck to paycheck, and I was raised in a trailer park for many years. Growing up, my parents taught me the values of hard-work, personal responsibility, and service to our community. My father voted for Democrats much of his life, but now, like many Americans, recognizes that the Republican Party is the true party of the working class. I was the first in my family to attend college. At Indiana University, I met my wonderful wife, Amanda, who has been the biggest blessing in my life. She keeps me grounded and ensures our family stays true to our conservative values every day. Coming from a humble background, I felt a calling to give back to my community. As such, after serving on a county council, I became a member of the Indiana State Senate in 2010. During my time in office, I took a leave of absence while I was deployed to Afghanistan as a Navy Reserve Supply Corps Officer. Serving my country abroad reinforced my resolve to defend the freedoms and values that make America great. As an Afghanistan War veteran, I know what it means to fight for our country and our values. During my time in Afghanistan, my wife stepped up to fill in for me in the State Senate. I am blessed to have a family dedicated to serving the American people. Amanda and I started a family back in 2009. We’ve been blessed with three beautiful daughters, Lillian, Elizabeth, and Joann, who inspire me each day. I am fighting for our country because I am fighting for their future. I want my daughters to grow up in a country where they are safe and can thrive. Since 2016, I have chosen to continue my service career by representing Indiana’s 3rd district in the U.S. Congress. During my time in the House, I have been a consistent conservative voice dedicated to upholding and protecting the conservative American values that make our nation great. I was elected chair of the Republican Study Committee, the largest caucus of conservatives in the House of Representatives, and have collaborated with strong leaders, like President Trump, to put America first - and he’s already endorsed my campaign! As the next Senator of Indiana, I intend to continue defending hard-working Americans and refuse to let the radical Left crush our values and destroy our country. My congressional record of fighting for strong families, limited government, and tighter spending speaks for itself. We have a great country worth defending, and I intend to do just that. As your next Senator, I will fight to balance the federal budget, protect our Southern border, stand up to China, and defend our children against the Left’s woke ideology. But, I need support from strong, grassroots conservatives like YOU to ensure our movement makes it all the way to Washington. | Sincerely, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2024 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://links.news4patriots.org/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b5f644788f3f4cfd93e2229e2503cb40&_e=oyj6jMCwNeM_qqIg7ESfQCFHMnjp729CiNz9Ddsy4zZjQiz56ttmgdrGJvOyjN-_KDFXToXs40ip-ItEiCoANw6HQj1582SFzLsh75B9B8i7Kin4YrT-VuRNKCXrCLKn4oObTlZMuLluhjIk4-GoD9j3W4jEnMh7PRcMYDip9Bz8jPibnSJcQjwZnKs33urow9DCxJQa1F__5_Z4xWvOMYUhNX3kXPKfmLEqYP6YP6E6FNHx8tCCpkJ2tZrPt_A9wlp8dOZt4tmQkGQmIz6PrUrlHoJW-Go6ak6lpJqX0aF8DFzYM7HtMrqgGnjjz0sfBdoClgygeJgRk8DGJbSv5TirT2X69FHv5n5qVosfGEmbCIp5VXMgyz5DP5chblX16OVIfT_7aSstVNvmaQFn1A%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJx8kM_qozAUhZ8m7iL5Z6ILF7_W2mGgZShlZhliclMDRiXGKczTDw5dz_a7l8P5zq-bvpkwhfl1NxHanLJOc9aD0-OSFs0IE5gwTKmmhWuFYo7LAlqqiJJSck6LsbWcC28bL2VtoALWcDV4Ppi6qS00RhShPXIIo5QKUQlR1rTyThJmLQXOPSBBzAQpb2UeIcG6D1OwZs5gYmmXWEztmPO6If6FWI9Yv4HdE5RmBrfk4wOx3pnfweGj9TvkP9gnALdEbGHOkI47EU7VXOCKNBUWyho8UGJwwyhUFWuY9wrxfs9Rb8ueLCDenborflzuiMkDR3Bhj4h3l9uHWBNXE14z4t3HkOhTd9Xdt_6sv_8868flrn984efjWaTWre8wTWGTCgnyiiZM_-Tyf1f_GwAA__-wMoGN)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJx8kM_qozAUhZ8m7iL5Z6ILF7_W2mGgZShlZhliclMDRiXGKczTDw5dz_a7l8P5zq-bvpkwhfl1NxHanLJOc9aD0-OSFs0IE5gwTKmmhWuFYo7LAlqqiJJSck6LsbWcC28bL2VtoALWcDV4Ppi6qS00RhShPXIIo5QKUQlR1rTyThJmLQXOPSBBzAQpb2UeIcG6D1OwZs5gYmmXWEztmPO6If6FWI9Yv4HdE5RmBrfk4wOx3pnfweGj9TvkP9gnALdEbGHOkI47EU7VXOCKNBUWyho8UGJwwyhUFWuY9wrxfs9Rb8ueLCDenborflzuiMkDR3Bhj4h3l9uHWBNXE14z4t3HkOhTd9Xdt_6sv_8868flrn984efjWaTWre8wTWGTCgnyiiZM_-Tyf1f_GwAA__-wMoGN)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJx8kM_qozAUhZ8m7iL5Z6ILF7_W2mGgZShlZhliclMDRiXGKczTDw5dz_a7l8P5zq-bvpkwhfl1NxHanLJOc9aD0-OSFs0IE5gwTKmmhWuFYo7LAlqqiJJSck6LsbWcC28bL2VtoALWcDV4Ppi6qS00RhShPXIIo5QKUQlR1rTyThJmLQXOPSBBzAQpb2UeIcG6D1OwZs5gYmmXWEztmPO6If6FWI9Yv4HdE5RmBrfk4wOx3pnfweGj9TvkP9gnALdEbGHOkI47EU7VXOCKNBUWyho8UGJwwyhUFWuY9wrxfs9Rb8ueLCDenborflzuiMkDR3Bhj4h3l9uHWBNXE14z4t3HkOhTd9Xdt_6sv_8868flrn984efjWaTWre8wTWGTCgnyiiZM_-Tyf1f_GwAA__-wMoGN)**
---
| | [](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJx8kM_qozAUhZ8m7iL5Z6ILF7_W2mGgZShlZhliclMDRiXGKczTDw5dz_a7l8P5zq-bvpkwhfl1NxHanLJOc9aD0-OSFs0IE5gwTKmmhWuFYo7LAlqqiJJSck6LsbWcC28bL2VtoALWcDV4Ppi6qS00RhShPXIIo5QKUQlR1rTyThJmLQXOPSBBzAQpb2UeIcG6D1OwZs5gYmmXWEztmPO6If6FWI9Yv4HdE5RmBrfk4wOx3pnfweGj9TvkP9gnALdEbGHOkI47EU7VXOCKNBUWyho8UGJwwyhUFWuY9wrxfs9Rb8ueLCDenborflzuiMkDR3Bhj4h3l9uHWBNXE14z4t3HkOhTd9Xdt_6sv_8868flrn984efjWaTWre8wTWGTCgnyiiZM_-Tyf1f_GwAA__-wMoGN)

Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Grateful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| My team shared a birthday card with me with thousands of signatures.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1979%2E35263%2E4fOOFQ)
Hi Peter, I woke up to a wonderful surprise this morning! My team shared a birthday card with me with thousands of signatures and kind messages from the grassroots supporters that keep this campaign running. I’m facing my toughest reelection race yet this year, and I’m so grateful to have such a passionate team of supporters by my side. Normally, this is where the message would stop. But the truth is, my team hasn’t stopped reminding me that Senate Republicans’ #1 candidate could jump into our race any day now — _quite the birthday gift, I know..._ They insist we need to boost our fundraising numbers, since we’ll be at an instant cash disadvantage once he enters the race thanks to his virtually unlimited campaign war chest. **[Peter, I’m hoping you can help me out this morning by making a donation. I’d be so grateful for any amount you can afford to pitch in today.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-feb24.S4bXxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240211_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1979%2E35263%2E4fOOFQ)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-feb24.LnIHXA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240211_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1979%2E35263%2E4fOOFQ)

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ac7eb99fb0e84328bb6302aeae7ebd65&_e=IJOvRGt581vCqqX91aiXfbYZxulRlmNl0rlJdKIZ4w_E-WmS9FcZBnUn-NcweH8_KT8urUsI9lgT7FA8St9pSuBuq5PHdnsVr8oEfyq_P6EXxmbo87QctHG-mLzst8NxvPZoyyfmuq9bYjqvvjpNgjwjqJCtt2dNf_krBe7eM2rLHwocc_L1YPKriq1Rd5uuQ4azZx5zU6RE_AGitUF-b3njb9iedqMQI2DbbnME-IvGVN8WgQDOzgXUlpQvcbseavjcT2WL5foADsvsSgc-jjfT7SFd1G6FbO_9-JUqzzi4_asiKx9XBUFh2kk68yH3Wdx03QgeKJcD5obktkmFjWONCa3C6CkqWUCbXSGjQ5KwIcjUZNA2Fki9814QY1WJRSkQpUQs_6bHQ6NTE-N_Wg%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ac7eb99fb0e84328bb6302aeae7ebd65&_e=IJOvRGt581vCqqX91aiXfbYZxulRlmNl0rlJdKIZ4w_E-WmS9FcZBnUn-NcweH8_KT8urUsI9lgT7FA8St9pSuBuq5PHdnsVr8oEfyq_P6EXxmbo87QctHG-mLzst8NxvPZoyyfmuq9bYjqvvjpNgjwjqJCtt2dNf_krBe7eM2rLHwocc_L1YPKriq1Rd5uuQ4azZx5zU6RE_AGitUF-b3njb9iedqMQI2DbbnME-IvGVN8WgQDOzgXUlpQvcbseo3p0BusBeGa2xvPUcl5H5NCPxI7F4ZPq6HjdD8eLCTyaTbhi-UN0_bFf9W22IwxAp3U_RvopDEki6ossb8uhdrEMN2zBByhM-2w8j_theREh7GN3eJjRm-jdcw6Lquh_rB7NZ-t_HyJnBkI8q95w0A%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ac7eb99fb0e84328bb6302aeae7ebd65&_e=IJOvRGt581vCqqX91aiXfbYZxulRlmNl0rlJdKIZ4w_E-WmS9FcZBnUn-NcweH8_KT8urUsI9lgT7FA8St9pSuBuq5PHdnsVr8oEfyq_P6EXxmbo87QctHG-mLzst8NxvPZoyyfmuq9bYjqvvjpNgjwjqJCtt2dNf_krBe7eM2rLHwocc_L1YPKriq1Rd5uuQ4azZx5zU6RE_AGitUF-b3njb9iedqMQI2DbbnME-IvGVN8WgQDOzgXUlpQvcbsebSzl_I12JL5XzFUGnJEjsYi3StDvKzFAWp3hNJhzlsBUz4Hd6SnJwexnvLjRLKuMi0585lxDn-iNISWN7dgrkWc3J2e7h6y7Nlrm0PwfV_FchnYchHzvMe-hqITN-6f06LLhb68jX6Kf7qF562AEHQ%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: This initiative is not merely about economic reform. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox. Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

Fellow Conservative,

In 2021, the Senate Veterans Affairs Committee **approved more than $70 million in federal funds to pay for healthcare costs incurred by illegal migrants.** More recently, the Committee approved more than $90 million to care for migrants crossing our border illegally.

Democrats charged the Department of Veterans Affairs with administering health care services to **illegal migrants** due to the sophisticated network of hospitals and clinics that were built to serve our veteran communities in all 50 states.

**My opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, is the Committee’s chairman.**

**Every time an illegal migrant is cared for at one of our nation’s VA facilities, our veterans pay the price.**

t’s time to stop prioritizing illegal migrants over American service members.

[**STOP THE THEFT
SIGN MY PETITION->**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=df3cd12e6ae8400d94eba080f189b260&_e=9iLnkawbxs0DNNqWurFvO_IgdOIfYE5UV2aWtQd2HbQEoFttQO-sfAZ2Wx4BUKruJjSU8SiEFfOfvgFPJdkJV9XE-tp3VnagaMS5OJ1BjOSMtUpzPcXCyBogT0fNxnwbZ_XlGfqPRawzsnb8OELMxDgfHz79SroSJwHDNH3K7w-vH-_qHNjFfL4QOQJNvBtOIm8a9nWUDbJ6g-fJuuYbqpzHXO_YLKdtWjNnQEPNch0oIF6O9b9Smv37zsO6R_UCA6-9RBslBJAeISsPzbg8vnUbJkD4FyXDwtoGI8qjRFOnyK7etco1ySktu_xzdvx5bz2zx6n_rA6lXOyhNTQQh9BAgF37_fy3E5KYXkjCoH0DqIWE4ZgDIBnOtBuDdg-_lrNLXhJRxlG6uFKMTA3okRJegHd6j3LCOPFGipPUvmUik1tTKpOqtPKlYCbyLgWx_RgDaQ1Y-i-j4XD3nAaXDHGyn8pHcwJE98ePbUPRmQVBXRP9IeM1o3cM4nQo1Yek)

**This Democrat-funded program** has created a backlog of veteran claims surpassing 378,000. Thanks to my opponent and Joe Biden, it’s reasonable for a veteran on the backlog list to expect _**they may never get the care**_ they need due to the president of the United States and Senate Democrats prioritizing illegals over veterans.

**Fellow Conservative, don’t you think it’s a double standard that President Biden and Democrat Jon Tester are eligible to see the best doctors in the world at Walter Reed Medical Center just outside of DC – WITH NO WAIT TIME – while illegal migrants are given priority over veterans at VA facilities?**

clean_body: Thanks to Democrat Jon Tester, illegal immigrants are being given access to VA health care services before Veterans | | Fellow Conservative, In 2021, the Senate Veterans Affairs Committee approved more than $70 million in federal funds to pay for healthcare costs incurred by illegal migrants. More recently, the Committee approved more than $90 million to care for migrants crossing our border illegally. Democrats charged the Department of Veterans Affairs with administering health care services to illegal migrants due to the sophisticated network of hospitals and clinics that were built to serve our veteran communities in all 50 states. My opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, is the Committee’s chairman. Every time an illegal migrant is cared for at one of our nation’s VA facilities, our veterans pay the price. t’s time to stop prioritizing illegal migrants over American service members. This Democrat-funded program has created a backlog of veteran claims surpassing 378,000. Thanks to my opponent and Joe Biden, it’s reasonable for a veteran on the backlog list to expect they may never get the care they need due to the president of the United States and Senate Democrats prioritizing illegals over veterans. Fellow Conservative, don’t you think it’s a double standard that President Biden and Democrat Jon Tester are eligible to see the best doctors in the world at Walter Reed Medical Center just outside of DC – WITH NO WAIT TIME – while illegal migrants are given priority over veterans at VA facilities? demanding my opponent and Joe Biden forgo their government-funded healthcare services until every veteran who needs to be seen by a doctor is taken off the waitlist. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate P.S. If this news makes your blood boil like it does mine, let me know by to strip Democrats of their health care until this program is defunded. | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Democrats keep crushing it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Our message is working.

Our message is working.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/3145?t=1&akid=1820%2E4767699%2Ez_5lDt)
Our values are American.
Our politics... Republicans begrudgingly celebrate and take credit for. I was in South Carolina when the Republican governor was talking about the new electric vehicle investments in his state — investments signed into law by Joe Biden — a part he left out of his speech.
But that's the character and decency of the Democratic Party. That we support people even if they didn't support us in the election.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/3146?t=2&akid=1820%2E4767699%2Ez_5lDt)
So let's go Democrats. If we organize and all play our part, we're going to win the White House, hold the Senate and take back the House in 2024.
Gavin Newsom
* * *
🛟 Hi. Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy.
If everyone reading this donated just $20, we could support every “Red State” party across the country and give Democrats a chance to win EVERYWHERE. [**If that sounds worth it and important to you, please donate $20 to the Campaign for Democracy today. Thank you.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-feb24?refcode=em240211&refcode2=1820_4767699_z_5lDt&akid=1820%2E4767699%2Ez_5lDt)

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: I want to personally thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friends,
A couple of days ago, my team and I celebrated the 1 year anniversary of The Long Run! Today, I wanted to reach out personally to express my gratitude.
I want to thank every single one of you — for believing in me, this team, our candidates, and the power we have to make a difference.
When I launched The Long Run, I was hoping to make a significant impact in races up and down the ballot across the country. However, I did not anticipate the vast support I would receive for this cause. Together, we have impacted the outcomes of races across the country.
In Wisconsin, our work helped to elect Justice Janet Protasiewicz to the Wisconsin Supreme Court, flipping the majority liberal for the first time in 14 years. And across the country, we've supported countless candidates — from Senate and House races down to local races like City Controller and Attorney General.
We have put in the work, and it has paid off. And it would not have been possible without your continued support. Thank you.
As we approach the November election, I hope you will help us maintain our momentum so we can continue supporting changemaking candidates up and down the ballot.
[**So I am asking: Can you please contribute $3 to The Long Run today? Every donation will help us support candidates up and down the ballot as we approach November.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240210-1-tt&t=1&akid=5198%2E196590%2E8A9eN4)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.I_T5QN&amount=3&refcode=em240210-1-tt&t=20&akid=5198%2E196590%2E8A9eN4)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.iVDKI-&refcode=em240210-1-tt&t=21&akid=5198%2E196590%2E8A9eN4)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.0ufIZo&refcode=em240210-1-tt&t=22&akid=5198%2E196590%2E8A9eN4)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.SGdEqN&refcode=em240210-1-tt&t=23&akid=5198%2E196590%2E8A9eN4)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.OE_EdI&refcode=em240210-1-tt&t=24&akid=5198%2E196590%2E8A9eN4)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240210-1-tt&t=25&akid=5198%2E196590%2E8A9eN4)
Over the past year, we have seen a lot as a country and a movement. We have seen the reemergence of MAGA extremism on the national stage and the consequences of a Republican-led House majority.
But we have also seen how powerful this grassroots coalition can be — and it's just the beginning. Together, we can create real change this November.
Let’s go!
Mandela
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240210-1-tt&t=26&akid=5198%2E196590%2E8A9eN4)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=5198%2E196590%2E8A9eN4). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=28&akid=5198%2E196590%2E8A9eN4)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: The Missouri I grew up in taught us to take care of one another
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
That’s something Josh Hawley could never understand. Let me explain.
#
Peter,
There’s a reason why Josh Hawley could never understand the Missouri I know.
**Please let me explain:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43692?refcode=em20240211-4792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4792%2E614464%2EplOXsD)
On the right is Joshua Hawley. While his banker daddy was sending him to a fancy prep school miles from his hometown, my family and I were relying on our neighbors to survive bankruptcy and medical bills in mid-Missouri — in a community where people took care of each other. That’s us on the left.
When Hawley graduated from law school, he joined one of the world’s most elite corporate law firms. I joined the Marine Corps to pay back the community in Missouri that took care of me and my family. And when he was climbing the ladder to become another corrupt politician, I was serving my country — and then working to prevent the pointless overseas wars that make us less safe.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43692?refcode=em20240211-4792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4792%2E614464%2EplOXsD)
While Josh Hawley aligned himself with the same giant corporations who’ve spent decades attacking Missouri workers and shipping away our jobs, I’ve been fighting to take back power for American workers and small businesses.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43692?refcode=em20240211-4792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4792%2E614464%2EplOXsD)
And when Hawley voted against relief for veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits, I stood up alongside thousands of veterans to hold him accountable.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43692?refcode=em20240211-4792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4792%2E614464%2EplOXsD)
**The Missouri I grew up in taught us to take care of one another.** To do your duty. To serve and sacrifice for your fellow Missourians.
**Josh Hawley doesn’t know that Missouri — and on January 6th, 2021, he showed us the only thing he’s learned is how to be a fraud and a coward.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43692?refcode=em20240211-4792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4792%2E614464%2EplOXsD)
Josh Hawley hasn't just abandoned our state and our values. He's embarrassed himself and all of Missouri. And embarrassing Missouri... That’s something I can't let go.
**Missourians deserve a US Senator who will stand up and fight for them — and unlike Josh, I'm ready to serve.** If you’re ready to help us make sure every Missouri voter knows it before they vote on Election Day, I need your help:
**[Will you chip in any amount you can afford to our campaign right now so we can get our message in front of voters? The only way we’ll be able to flip this Senate seat is if we build a powerful grassroots movement, and support from real people like you is the best way we can do it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43692?refcode=em20240211-4792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=4792%2E614464%2EplOXsD)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43693?refcode=em20240211-4792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=4792%2E614464%2EplOXsD) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43693?refcode=em20240211-4792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=4792%2E614464%2EplOXsD) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43693?refcode=em20240211-4792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=9&akid=4792%2E614464%2EplOXsD) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43693?refcode=em20240211-4792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=10&akid=4792%2E614464%2EplOXsD) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43693?refcode=em20240211-4792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=11&akid=4792%2E614464%2EplOXsD) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43693?refcode=em20240211-4792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=12&akid=4792%2E614464%2EplOXsD) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43692?refcode=em20240211-4792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=4792%2E614464%2EplOXsD)
---
If we keep working together, we can take back power for working Missourians and everyday people all across the country.
Thanks for all your help,
— Lucas

If you’re ready to help us make sure every Missouri voter knows it before they vote on Election Day, I need your help: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: If we keep working together, we can take back power for working Missourians and everyday people all across the country. Thanks for all your help, — Lucas | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

subject: YOU have what it takes to help us WIN in November

body:
Share your insight with the GOP.
[](http://links.spiritofpatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=27c38b586e0d479f931d639e16adfeb7&_e=w2hcSZWGKCWQCrE_IOGnGS1f7jYdXEbPvt3trvHe7yD7I4As-eXqZSOIonz0DeuGzc8hpZHf1IJ0wgbwgoFcJH-KaJWELCcYMRmV4kBZxcsEgsi1I8nJcEr3q3BiZjRyu0H06l61fK_m86WVdRBmEzAHFSsQvGHKu_C9RRLoxe3uYJJRgR-m-QijpNUu0rvcsvUOYyxtZI_frOZ7ApBDZIKOo30zVRnn9MOCNNb1uQusubau9TIVCAQUzsPj8eSvyH3XmOWMQocJCygqSpl8gePRokH5a9ousxKx-GE2QfxsL-pWo1twr50cKyC9bNzFwBRQkAVkD16f9rGwLkilfG5DlzstBdMtHtsrR9GpuFzKJjTuEgaln08raemkfHjYUMpf2VMS0bsqPgBnPfedBsv6wz5nrUHMwxLgNi9kICdYSlMznJsYpYlTQ7l7ChMvStClcaLAMgF32gbXYlAETk-plZYw6ul8cPao0XVkgjQUchdgK3Ifv7HtB14WofIk) **** ****

Fellow American,

When Ronna McDaniel asked if I knew any true American Patriots who should be trusted to complete the **[2024 Party Platform Audit,](http://links.spiritofpatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=27c38b586e0d479f931d639e16adfeb7&_e=w2hcSZWGKCWQCrE_IOGnGS1f7jYdXEbPvt3trvHe7yD7I4As-eXqZSOIonz0DeuGzc8hpZHf1IJ0wgbwgoFcJH-KaJWELCcYMRmV4kBZxcsEgsi1I8nJcEr3q3BiZjRyu0H06l61fK_m86WVdRBmEzAHFSsQvGHKu_C9RRLoxe3uYJJRgR-m-QijpNUu0rvcsvUOYyxtZI_frOZ7ApBDZIKOo30zVRnn9MOCNNb1uQusubau9TIVCAQUzsPj8eSvyH3XmOWMQocJCygqSpl8gePRokH5a9ousxKx-GE2QfxsL-pWo1twr50cKyC9bNzFwBRQkAVkD16f9rGwLkilfG5DlzstBdMtHtsrR9GpuFx2rojjZy8gHVveXYzjJaddcZ2AGbnJtLYAe83HVtaRxnpEvEaoZr5OyjpfsslFMwnwu_2YXQ78u07l23HdkGTW2Yx876Jv9_NuGUcxgaT19G-IxhMebKbgzEdGkcXtyIQ6vnP11SMvPyXhY2eMAx6t "2024 Party Platform Audit,")** your name came to mind right away.

[](http://links.spiritofpatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=27c38b586e0d479f931d639e16adfeb7&_e=w2hcSZWGKCWQCrE_IOGnGS1f7jYdXEbPvt3trvHe7yD7I4As-eXqZSOIonz0DeuGzc8hpZHf1IJ0wgbwgoFcJH-KaJWELCcYMRmV4kBZxcsEgsi1I8nJcEr3q3BiZjRyu0H06l61fK_m86WVdRBmEzAHFSsQvGHKu_C9RRLoxe3uYJJRgR-m-QijpNUu0rvcsvUOYyxtZI_frOZ7ApBDZIKOo30zVRnn9MOCNNb1uQusubau9TIVCAQUzsPj8eSvyH3XmOWMQocJCygqSpl8gePRokH5a9ousxKx-GE2QfxsL-pWo1twr50cKyC9bNzFwBRQkAVkD16f9rGwLkilfG5DlzstBdMtHtsrR9GpuFya1SyT-2OmmmD2dhW2Iddq0hCQZ6VYikwgb9BFkZnjiTeRHjQ62_DnKokilyXgVVvQtKxvFklD5c_B9AJ3bLAkXZLcqs96SzDk8Xxs31oJIqna2f7X5NlNaoAfiHxDM-TYTikVR9GI1Akk8g5ciHGa)

If we're going to retire Joe Biden, we need every area of the Country represented, and I'm looking for the most politically active Patriot to represent your area in our **[2024 Audit](http://links.spiritofpatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=27c38b586e0d479f931d639e16adfeb7&_e=w2hcSZWGKCWQCrE_IOGnGS1f7jYdXEbPvt3trvHe7yD7I4As-eXqZSOIonz0DeuGzc8hpZHf1IJ0wgbwgoFcJH-KaJWELCcYMRmV4kBZxcsEgsi1I8nJcEr3q3BiZjRyu0H06l61fK_m86WVdRBmEzAHFSsQvGHKu_C9RRLoxe3uYJJRgR-m-QijpNUu0rvcsvUOYyxtZI_frOZ7ApBDZIKOo30zVRnn9MOCNNb1uQusubau9TIVCAQUzsPj8eSvyH3XmOWMQocJCygqSpl8gePRokH5a9ousxKx-GE2QfxsL-pWo1twr50cKyC9bNzFwBRQkAVkD16f9rGwLkilfG5DlzstBdMtHtsrR9GpuFw8ZEt5SGUVR0KmFgkbWO9rw8iMhbM9f0G-eEqc948xrFmZSYekZEVBFbPKnxon7V_vkMQnoqvpx3gVychW04qYnQBzGCyNmt8uUTLahxzWajvK83fIsJdMlHyY9fyMdGDGrFMlV24gnrM4FmkSQ9B9 "2024 Audit")**.

That's why I came to you first, Fellow American. Based on your impressive record of grassroots support, I trust YOU to play a key role in our efforts to take back the White House.

**[Please complete the 2024 Republican Platform Audit immediately so we can start implementing your feedback.>>](http://links.spiritofpatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=27c38b586e0d479f931d639e16adfeb7&_e=w2hcSZWGKCWQCrE_IOGnGS1f7jYdXEbPvt3trvHe7yD7I4As-eXqZSOIonz0DeuGzc8hpZHf1IJ0wgbwgoFcJH-KaJWELCcYMRmV4kBZxcsEgsi1I8nJcEr3q3BiZjRyu0H06l61fK_m86WVdRBmEzAHFSsQvGHKu_C9RRLoxe3uYJJRgR-m-QijpNUu0rvcsvUOYyxtZI_frOZ7ApBDZIKOo30zVRnn9MOCNNb1uQusubau9TIVCAQUzsPj8eSvyH3XmOWMQocJCygqSpl8gePRokH5a9ousxKx-GE2QfxsL-pWo1twr50cKyC9bNzFwBRQkAVkD16f9rGwLkilfG5DlzstBdMtHtsrR9GpuFwi60YiAFxWLXXsJlsN-xyHPvLtDpTNAqQwAjhSIVHtqNpC9nWvDyOqkbRkCDyxK2cvjSVnoBzpZNL-6vGVgN0t5RFM5kvc86-xv7zrAPlMsb6hPUi5F3P-YzWDhVLyCe0FVk1K_VrP8luOHF6t86p0 "Please complete the 2024 Republican Platform Audit immediately so we can start implementing your feedback. >>")**

All the way back in 1870, Hiram Rhodes Revels, a pastor and State Senator from Mississippi, was elected as the first Black US Senator. Since then, we've come a long way as a country. **But representation – like our democracy – is a work in progress, and I believe we can do better.**

Black Americans have long faced far too many obstacles like: discrimination, lower pay, higher job instability – not to mention the racist voter suppression laws that Texas Republicans like Ted Cruz have championed, which make it harder for certain folks to vote.

[The bottom line is this: It's essential that our government reflects the people it represents.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78811235/454539285/918550791?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240211_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU1NTUwZTdmLWY1YzgtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GrT0Hmxv43SnVTXM4I8QlITScY1BQyNt_pidTL8LJoU=)

body:
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
#
Derek -
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Derek.

Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful election ads out there and flipped races for Democrats.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It got the PACT Act across the finish line. It forced Tommy Tuberville to step down. It defeated Trump, took back the Senate, and held the line in the House. And it will lead to more big victories this November.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $25. Some give more, many give less. But with Trump attacking Gold Star Parents and insulting the service of our Veterans and the Fallen, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and defeating these liars and hypocrites in the most important election cycle in modern American history — the one we’re in right now.
[**If helping VoteVets run some of the most effective election ads of the cycle, ads that win races seems worth $5 to you, we’re humbly asking you to make that donation before midnight tonight. We need you. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb24.ZR8EG7&refcode=em240211-1-30&t=1&akid=24888%2E3013755%2EYpagdn)

Derek - When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind. It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line. Like you, Derek. Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful election ads out there and flipped races for Democrats. It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It got the PACT Act across the finish line. It forced Tommy Tuberville to step down. It defeated Trump, took back the Senate, and held the line in the House. And it will lead to more big victories this November. But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation to support our work. The Super Bowl is today, and right-wingers refuse to let people enjoy things

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78812152/454541466/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGVhYTk4YjctZjZjOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lOKP7lDM3SoKI_p7eEs5AO2goO-B4n84jGCnoaUFMM4=&emci=cbaa98b7-f6c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=deaa98b7-f6c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
It’s Super Bowl Sunday, and while many will tune in to watch the game (okay, and maybe the commercials), Taylor Swift will undoubtedly draw in a host of new watchers as she cheers on boyfriend and Chiefs’ tight end Travis Kelce.
The storyline is straight out of a rom-com, and people are living for it. Which means the right-wing is working hard to make it weird. Just take a look at some recent headlines:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78812153/454541467/-593472309?refcode=20240211_EM_TaylorSwift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGVhYTk4YjctZjZjOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lOKP7lDM3SoKI_p7eEs5AO2goO-B4n84jGCnoaUFMM4=)
A Pentagon asset. A Biden plant to rig the big game. And a “psy-op” – whatever the hell that means 🤨
[**While Taylor Swift can _Shake It Off_ like she always does, here at COURIER we know what this type of misinformation does to our democracy. That’s why we’re committed to calling out right-wing conspiracy theories with free, fact-based coverage in 10 battleground states across the country. If you support our Fearless journalism, can you chip in $13 now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78812154/454541468/-593472309?refcode=20240211_EM_TaylorSwift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGVhYTk4YjctZjZjOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lOKP7lDM3SoKI_p7eEs5AO2goO-B4n84jGCnoaUFMM4=)
With 185 million Americans not trusting the mainstream media, they’re turning to social media.
As the bananas _“Taylor Swift is a deep state operative”_ story shows, total reliance on your socials to get the news can leave you vulnerable to right-wing lies and conspiracies.
So here’s how they do it, Peter, if you’re... _Ready For It_ :
* Moments _(like the Super Bowl)_ or people _(like Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce)_ become online and offline trending topics.
* Right-wing influencers want to keep the audiences (and money) coming, so they make up insane conspiracies to drive social media engagement.
* People without access to reliable news read and share this misinformation with their friends and families until the conspiracies get so big that they take on a life of their own.

**This pattern is how Taylor Swift’s romantic life became a “psy-op” and it’s how Donald Trump convinced more than half of all Republicans that Democrats stole the 2020 elections. **
**COURIER was founded to meet people where they are – on their social media feeds and in their email inboxes – and to fight right-wing misinformation with the truth.** We build out our newsrooms in “news deserts,” where reliable local news coverage is hard to come by. We provide factual, local news for free.
We fight for democracy and we’re damn proud of it.
[**If you have _Bad Blood_ with right-wing misinformation campaigns and want to fight back, please give $13, or however much you can to help us keep the presses running in our newsrooms.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78812155/454541469/-593472309?refcode=20240211_EM_TaylorSwift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGVhYTk4YjctZjZjOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lOKP7lDM3SoKI_p7eEs5AO2goO-B4n84jGCnoaUFMM4=)

Fellow Conservative,

In 2021, the Senate Veterans Affairs Committee **approved more than $70 million in federal funds to pay for healthcare costs incurred by illegal migrants.** More recently, the Committee approved more than $90 million to care for migrants crossing our border illegally.

Democrats charged the Department of Veterans Affairs with administering health care services to **illegal migrants** due to the sophisticated network of hospitals and clinics that were built to serve our veteran communities in all 50 states.

**My opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, is the Committee’s chairman.**

**Every time an illegal migrant is cared for at one of our nation’s VA facilities, our veterans pay the price.**

t’s time to stop prioritizing illegal migrants over American service members.

[**STOP THE THEFT
SIGN MY PETITION->**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=9b58799b621a452d8551524541821df4&_e=i16TlgZQXRe6se5c2vFmlUjOkjtZonBIoS3WU32kimcNnmXUgnNs09jenTEEMZEb-aAvez6wpC-6bINMrQfxE4PKQtRlA2NU54w_4kJpaIrTvSWspqCoozWYxhmbs7JktEpt8ddc4qXSdjuQeFYriNUlIBSkLlyCzIgczyLO5YrZeGitPbQcWBzVqB9h1KEkOVPhUZvO996ApfU2lstqKAXIBYUZLXQvxBWEPZ45oeIdLXkGVfyLXS1J83XNKYqsLiK9PY5avnIyAcezXUsCuJ3mbC-mkGe_FvTWLvgfA6Js2Uvbr6dP5ejvTTe4nCu_yiEyFojm7aLn7yHDQLzv6SIntG9wk48VqdfZgDbGYMr8Vn2g_QlmrOCkO2BybD-taM4eMvZUUJGveEheG32-mQCZ1ecNpUJ6YiH5UPEEwxHmsECdzLETPvZXvSSChIelXaT-T0Hgv2XlNkYhK6RrKhBUNJ9HLNJDt9DChBMTZ0qfEJHESxDUW5Q3qmaqwm02)

**This Democrat-funded program** has created a backlog of veteran claims surpassing 378,000. Thanks to my opponent and Joe Biden, it’s reasonable for a veteran on the backlog list to expect _**they may never get the care**_ they need due to the president of the United States and Senate Democrats prioritizing illegals over veterans.

**Fellow Conservative, don’t you think it’s a double standard that President Biden and Democrat Jon Tester are eligible to see the best doctors in the world at Walter Reed Medical Center just outside of DC – WITH NO WAIT TIME – while illegal migrants are given priority over veterans at VA facilities?**

**[Sign my petition](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=9b58799b621a452d8551524541821df4&_e=i16TlgZQXRe6se5c2vFmlUjOkjtZonBIoS3WU32kimcNnmXUgnNs09jenTEEMZEb-aAvez6wpC-6bINMrQfxE4PKQtRlA2NU54w_4kJpaIrTvSWspqCoozWYxhmbs7JktEpt8ddc4qXSdjuQeFYriNUlIBSkLlyCzIgczyLO5YrZeGitPbQcWBzVqB9h1KEkOVPhUZvO996ApfU2lstqKAXIBYUZLXQvxBWEPZ45oeIdLXkGVfyLXS1J83XNKYqsLiK9PY5avnIyAcezXUsCuJ3mbC-mkGe_FvTWLvgfA6Js2Uvbr6dP5ejvTTe4nCu_yiEyFojm7aLn7yHDQLzv6SIntG9wk48VqdfZgDbGYMreTzvBYOrPau4ruYnbssvyHaUGlKJk4U42jp3GuztzigP8HSrgxwxHzkTD9vclxg-Pg0CNb6hkNv-eN6IKvWirkEaHb3fSJPA7yn5Trcgqy2ojrs86F9ncYhu_If4Bi04LifHKH8ZieohIHD9JIX_g)** demanding my opponent and Joe Biden forgo their government-funded healthcare services until every veteran who needs to be seen by a doctor is taken off the waitlist.

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: AIPAC's war chest
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

New reports show AIPAC’s war chest only continues to grow day by day since
last October, and they’re preparing to use it to try and unseat the Squad
this year.

The Lever reports that internal documents show the right-wing lobby group
now has at least $90 million to spend against our progressive incumbents.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240211.DvIEhB&refcode=em20240211-33251&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=33251%2E1203867%2EkTxoQf ]The Lever: Inside The Israel Lobby's New $90 Million War Chest

That obscene amount of money came from “a cross-section of the U.S. elite,
including pro sports teams owners; heads of private equity firms; real
estate titans; a Maryland congressman now running for the U.S. Senate; the
former CEO of Victoria’s Secret; the co-founder of the dance-exercise
company Zumba; and the creator of Squishmallows.” According to Rolling
Stone, they also received $11 million from billionaire OnlyFans owner
Leonid Radvinsky and his wife.

It’s beyond clear: AIPAC is funded by millionaires and billionaires,
corporate interests, as well as Trump and other GOP mega-donors, and they
want to wipe out our progressive Squad from Congress in order to maintain
the status quo and push a pro-war agenda.

Not on our watch. We’ve taken on the AIPAC network before and won when we
elected Squad members like Jamaal Bowman and Summer Lee, and through the
power of grassroots fundraising, we can do it again to re-elect them this
year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240211.DvIEhB&refcode=em20240211-33251&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=33251%2E1203867%2EkTxoQf ]Please, if you can afford to, pitch in a contribution of
$3 or more today to help Justice Democrats fight back
against AIPAC and protect the Squad →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240211.DvIEhB&refcode=em20240211-33251&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=33251%2E1203867%2EkTxoQf ]Contribute $3

We appreciate each and every dollar you give to fuel our critical work and
defend our progressive movement.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=33251%2E1203867%2EkTxoQf ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=33251%2E1203867%2EkTxoQf ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240211-33251-footer&t=1024&refcode2=33251_1203867_kTxoQf&akid=33251%2E1203867%2EkTxoQf

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=33251%2E1203867%2EkTxoQf

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Tom Suozzi
subject: The special election is on Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
and I need your help
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2e34133-3caa-4090-8324-f12d58d77e4d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1fb489c-a5b7-4729-92a9-03c246bece46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi Peter, it’s Tom Suozzi. Blue Amp Action asked me to reach out with an important message. I’m writing to ask for your support so we can win the NY-03 special election on Tuesday. [**I really need everyone reading this to chip in $10 right away. Let me explain why. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T743e2b11-6006-4ae0-b766-d05a763a29f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) With under 1 week left until this critical special election, polling is in the **margin of error** and far right outside groups are spending **nearly $5 million** against me in these final days. Early voting is already under way and we’re running out of time to make our final push to voters. Peter, we can’t afford to fall short here. The whole nation will be watching NY-03. Climate change, immigration reform, gun safety, reproductive rights–all of it is at stake on February 13. As the nation looks to Long Island to see which way we will go, we’ve got to make it clear–**we need a government that can solve our problems and get things done!** [**So Peter, I’m humbly asking–with so much on the line and the whole nation watching, will you rush a split donation right away to help me win this special election and elect Democrats around the country?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf3869a93-ae64-40cb-8d82-3e73b0bbb6df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T851d152f-9368-46d9-af11-a5e4471a0e08/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you so much for your support. It means the world. Best, Tom Suozzi
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---

We’re in this race for the long haul. But it’s going to be tough.
With all the chaos in Washington, Montanans deserve someone who will crack down on the special interests and corruption in Washington, not play political games and cut backroom deals. We need to fight to lower costs for hardworking families, create good-paying union jobs, and ensure rural communities have what they need, like reliable internet and hospitals within driving distance.
Folks, I’m not a career politician. I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. **I still farm the same land my grandparents homesteaded 100 years ago, and I try every day to do what’s right for the people of Montana and across the country.**
Because of that, I don’t have much patience for the fancy billionaires and shady super PACs a lot of other politicians rely on. Instead, I depend on grassroots supporters like you.
That’s why I’m so grateful you even opened this email. Emails like this one make up a big part of our budget. $5 here and $10 there goes a long way in a campaign like ours.
**So, here’s the part where I ask:** **[_Can you make a split contribution of $25.62 (our average online donation) today to Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and my campaign to meet our weekly fundraising goals and hold our Senate majority? Your donations keep me fighting for regular folks in Washington and will help us respond to the onslaught of out-of-state money coming in to attack my record._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78815267/454547903/1318177582?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=25.62&refcode=jtk790-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmYxYWNlNjYtZjljOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iAShUFl9YxqJzhlTs1hoNdIOeIl7OqSZL5tIGnRQP8s=)**

So, here’s the part where I ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = We’re close to the finish line, and your support right now really helps me out. — Jon | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

We’re running TV ads in battleground states (maybe you saw some during the Grammys on Sunday), hiring key staff on the ground, and building the organizing networks that will be essential to defeating Donald Trump in November. Thanks for your support, Team Joe and Kamala

name: Lacey (Katie Porter Campaign Manager)
subject: Look at this new mail that aims to keep Katie out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Adam Schiff is using his campaign funds to boost Republican Steve Garvey and keep Katie out of the general election.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37500%2E3422442%2Eel9PU3)
Derek, this is a dangerous game. **Adam Schiff is using his campaign funds to boost Republican Steve Garvey** and keep Katie out of the general election. Just look at this mail he’s sending to registered Republicans. ⬇️

Because of California’s “jungle primary” system, the top two vote getters in March’s primary will advance to the November general election. **Polls show that Adam Schiff has the lead, while Republican Steve Garvey and Katie Porter are tied for second.**
Adam would rather run against Steve Garvey than Katie Porter. But he’s playing a dangerous and deceptive game. Reporters and pundits are saying Adam’s ploy to choose his own opponent could end up increasing Republican turnout, swaying down-ballot races in favor of conservatives.
Look, Derek, I hate to have to ask again, but we’re at real risk of losing. The good news is we’re only narrowly behind, and our message is resonating with voters. **[Is there anything you can give today to help us ramp up our ads program and win this race?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240211-1?refcode=em20240211-37500&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37500_3422442_el9PU3&akid=37500%2E3422442%2Eel9PU3)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240211-1?refcode=em20240211-37500&refcode2=37500_3422442_el9PU3&akid=37500%2E3422442%2Eel9PU3)
Thanks so much,
Lacey M.
Campaign Manager
Katie Porter for Senate

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240211-37500&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=37500_3422442_el9PU3&akid=37500%2E3422442%2Eel9PU3)**

body:
