| | | Fellow Conservative, Ted Cruz here. I’m reaching out today about an opportunity to make a positive impact on Texas and our Nation. We’re kicking off the most high-stakes election year we’ve ever faced. We only have nine months to STOP the Democrats from flipping Texas blue and holding on to their power in the U.S. Senate. **Now more than ever, I need your help to save Texas and take back the Senate. Will you please consider becoming a Cruz Monthly Donor?**

It means the world to me and my entire campaign staff! For Liberty, Ted Cruz

body:
Rep. Casar led a thirst strike for workers’ rights on the steps of the U.S. Capitol. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvruOrP4-9KAp9ETekv8R0aTWu3knNxgdBNQFQVZ4COVgRtforn04BZncov_dY8bjitI3esPr4tVTIhyRN6d9JarNQTWtSiNreEeRwNay87M3HQ9VacPLk35VoBryhwNXa_fqi8lq6DFYuac-Q1FOAqvDNDYixRHbpOHCTfmyiBY_8QJPf_WoVQrTnkHY0Sh-O/43r/7fhXXI9FQMKVW9gxo5Gi_Q/h0/q6r8HBYjj6LEd7WZOzWGG9HG-bnIKs5EFzIkEDjYKxQ)

Friend, **One of my most steadfast allies in Congress, from ceasefire to immigration to labor rights, is Rep. Greg Casar (D-TX).** Greg has been with us in the ceasefire movement from early on. He found that 80% of Democrats in his district support a ceasefire—and he’s listening to his constituents. We need more Congressmembers like Greg, who actually represent the people. A former labor organizer, Greg regularly joins picket lines with striking workers. Like me, he’s a child of immigrants, and he’s a champion for immigrant rights in his home state of Texas. He led a thirst strike last summer on the steps of the U.S. Capitol, at the same time that his governor was taking away workers’ rights to a water break. Right-wing groups are ready to spend millions of dollars against champions like Greg. [**Split a contribution between me and my colleague Rep. clean_body: Rep. Casar led a thirst strike for workers’ rights on the steps of the U.S. Capitol. | | | Friend, One of my most steadfast allies in Congress, from ceasefire to immigration to labor rights, is Rep. Greg Casar (D-TX). Greg has been with us in the ceasefire movement from early on. He found that 80% of Democrats in his district support a ceasefire—and he’s listening to his constituents. We need more Congressmembers like Greg, who actually represent the people. A former labor organizer, Greg regularly joins picket lines with striking workers. Like me, he’s a child of immigrants, and he’s a champion for immigrant rights in his home state of Texas. He led a thirst strike last summer on the steps of the U.S. Capitol, at the same time that his governor was taking away workers’ rights to a water break. Right-wing groups are ready to spend millions of dollars against champions like Greg. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Greg Casar | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for fighting by my side and supporting our allies. We’re making sure Congress represents working people and marginalized communities, as we advocate for dignity for everyone. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Feb 10, 2024 Subject: One of my most steadfast allies in Congress: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Congressional allies in our ceasefire movement need our help. My colleague, Congressman Greg Casar (D-TX) , co-sponsored our Ceasefire Now Resolution early on, and was among the first few members of Congress to demand a ceasefire. He has signed onto letters to President Biden urging a ceasefire, and he recognizes the importance of safety and sovereignty for Palestinians. He found that his constituents overwhelmingly support a ceasefire, and he’s listening to them, unlike so many of our colleagues in Congress who are disconnected from the American people. Like other ceasefire champions, Rep. Casar could be targeted by right-wing, anti-Palestinian groups. Greg is also a long-time ally in demanding a humane immigration system, fighting back in Texas against cruel anti-immigrant policies. Remember: most Senate Democrats voted this week to support cruel immigration policies like separating families, ending asylum protections, and mass deportations. That legislation didn’t pass, but it marks a dangerous time for our immigrant neighbors. We need champions in Congress for immigrant rights. A son of Mexican immigrants and a former labor organizer, Greg also regularly joins striking workers on picket lines. Last summer, Rep. Casar led a thirst strike on the steps of the U.S. Capitol in solidarity with workers across the country, calling for a federal workplace heat standard. He’s advocating for workers’ wages and well-being over corporate profits. Unlike many of our colleagues in Congress, Greg and I recognize marginalized people as human beings. We know everyone deserves dignity. In a time of rising hate and dehumanization, our voices in Congress are essential. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Greg Casar | | | | | | | | | Together, we must send our progressive champions back to Congress. We will keep uplifting the voices of marginalized communities and fighting for the transformative changes we all deserve. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Qasim Rashid
subject: My first job out of college exploited me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY QASIM FOR CONGRESS]
body:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/9?t=1001&akid=35161%2E120265%2E8vWwS5 ]Qasim for Congress

Friend,

What is a politician’s integrity worth? I’ve told you from the beginning
that I refuse to be corrupted by corporations and special interests, which
is why I’ve committed to running a 100% people-funded campaign.

However, a lot of politicians don’t seem to agree. They’ll cash campaign
checks from Amazon, Walgreens, Pfizer and dozens of others despite the
harm those companies cause to working people.

But, I want to hear from you on this. Do you think that politicians should
accept massive campaign contributions from corporations and special
interests?

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/sign/QR-IL-11_EMAIL_100424_ENG_Kaplan/?t=1002&akid=35161%2E120265%2E8vWwS5 ]YES

NO

I HAVE MORE TO SAY

I want to tell you a story. One of the most exploitative companies I ever
worked for was my first job out of college, it was a company called Kaplan
University. I was a frontline associate, and I knew something wasn’t quite
right, but when you’re low income, have college debt, and are just getting
out of Section 8 housing, you’ll take any job you can get.

The company wouldn’t let us log our overtime hours, and made us come in
early and stay late without logging in.

Now I know that wage theft accounts for $50 billion in stolen wages from
employees annually.

Not long after I left, I got a settlement check in the mail for wages
stolen from me by Kaplan University. It therefore did not surprise me at
all that not long after that, Kaplan also settled a massive lawsuit for
stealing from students as well.

This is what corporate corruption looks like. What makes that corruption
even worse is that politicians further enable it by taking corporate
funding.

Kaplan is ultimately owned by Amazon, and Amazon corporation funds
hundreds of politicians on the federal level every single year – including
my opponent, Bill Foster. And you can guess how many times he’s called out
Kaplan University for their corruption, wage theft, and exploitation of
former employees and students: zero.

With so much at stake, I want to hear what you think. Do you think that
politicians should be accepting massive campaign contributions from
corporations and special interests?

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/sign/QR-IL-11_EMAIL_100424_ENG_Kaplan/?t=1003&akid=35161%2E120265%2E8vWwS5 ]YES

NO

I HAVE MORE TO SAY

Thanks for telling me your opinion,
Qasim

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1004&akid=35161%2E120265%2E8vWwS5
Update Your Information: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/update-your-info/
Unsubscribe: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=35161%2E120265%2E8vWwS5

[PAID FOR BY QASIM FOR CONGRESS]

#
Hey — Did you see Tina’s note the other day about fighting for our reproductive rights? With Donald Trump pledging to go after abortion access across the United States, Tina is raising alarm bells to make sure voters know the stakes of this election. **[If you support her efforts to protect abortion from far-right politicians, sign on to her petition today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78819386/454555947/285505299?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20240211_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Mzk1ZWQ0My1mZmM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0eFpLCBoRmAZ2u9-62OcX-rSt4OIZIIC894E4Ox9pRA=&emci=6232913d-ffc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=8395ed43-ffc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78819387/454555948/285505299?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20240211_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Mzk1ZWQ0My1mZmM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0eFpLCBoRmAZ2u9-62OcX-rSt4OIZIIC894E4Ox9pRA=&emci=6232913d-ffc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=8395ed43-ffc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=6227932)

_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Tina Smith
Date: February 8, 2024
Subject: We can’t wait_
Folks,
I’m doing whatever it takes to restore reproductive rights because they are under assault like we’ve never seen before.
As Donald Trump clears the path to the Republican presidential ticket, he is doubling down on his radical stances on reproductive rights.
His team is _already_ preparing executive orders to unilaterally rip away abortion access from millions of American women.
It makes me sick that politicians like Trump think they should make decisions about a woman’s own health care.
**As the only Senator to have worked at Planned Parenthood, I know the importance of fighting for reproductive justice, especially as we see these rights stripped away day by day.**
We need to make some big changes — and I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to pass crucial legislation like the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ and the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_.
We can’t wait any longer to enshrine abortion rights into federal law. I’m willing to do whatever it takes to get it done.
**[If you agree, please add your name in support of these pro-choice laws. We simply can’t afford to wait.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78819388/454555949/285505299?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20240211_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Mzk1ZWQ0My1mZmM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0eFpLCBoRmAZ2u9-62OcX-rSt4OIZIIC894E4Ox9pRA=&emci=6232913d-ffc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=8395ed43-ffc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=6227932)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78819389/454555950/285505299?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20240211_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Mzk1ZWQ0My1mZmM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0eFpLCBoRmAZ2u9-62OcX-rSt4OIZIIC894E4Ox9pRA=&emci=6232913d-ffc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=8395ed43-ffc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=6227932)

clean_body: | Hey — Did you see Tina’s note the other day about fighting for our reproductive rights? With Donald Trump pledging to go after abortion access across the United States, Tina is raising alarm bells to make sure voters know the stakes of this election. | Thanks for joining Tina in these efforts, Team Tina \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Tina Smith Date: February 8, 2024 Subject: We can’t wait Folks, I’m doing whatever it takes to restore reproductive rights because they are under assault like we’ve never seen before. As Donald Trump clears the path to the Republican presidential ticket, he is doubling down on his radical stances on reproductive rights. His team is already preparing executive orders to unilaterally rip away abortion access from millions of American women. It makes me sick that politicians like Trump think they should make decisions about a woman’s own health care. As the only Senator to have worked at Planned Parenthood, I know the importance of fighting for reproductive justice, especially as we see these rights stripped away day by day. We need to make some big changes — and I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to pass crucial legislation like the Women’s Health Protection Act and the Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act. We can’t wait any longer to enshrine abortion rights into federal law. I’m willing to do whatever it takes to get it done. Thank you for making your voice heard. I’m proud to have your support as we fight to protect reproductive rights from far-right politicians. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

Fellow Conservative,

In 2021, the Senate Veterans Affairs Committee **approved more than $70 million in federal funds to pay for healthcare costs incurred by illegal migrants.** More recently, the Committee approved more than $90 million to care for migrants crossing our border illegally.

Democrats charged the Department of Veterans Affairs with administering health care services to **illegal migrants** due to the sophisticated network of hospitals and clinics that were built to serve our veteran communities in all 50 states.

**My opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, is the Committee’s chairman.**

**Every time an illegal migrant is cared for at one of our nation’s VA facilities, our veterans pay the price.**

t’s time to stop prioritizing illegal migrants over American service members.

**This Democrat-funded program** has created a backlog of veteran claims surpassing 378,000. Thanks to my opponent and Joe Biden, it’s reasonable for a veteran on the backlog list to expect _**they may never get the care**_ they need due to the president of the United States and Senate Democrats prioritizing illegals over veterans.

**Fellow Conservative, don’t you think it’s a double standard that President Biden and Democrat Jon Tester are eligible to see the best doctors in the world at Walter Reed Medical Center just outside of DC – WITH NO WAIT TIME – while illegal migrants are given priority over veterans at VA facilities?**

name: Lily Tomlin
subject: Hey there, join me and Jane for a night you won’t forget 💌
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Good fun and good trouble for a good cause.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78820122/454558202/1328794144?refcode=ea.39db99ae-ffc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.39db99ae-ffc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5ZGI5OWFlLWZmYzgtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HSGaunrole2exXvHevGK6LzXXqkXABamV1_Jx-gsCik=&emci=8b6eeae6-99c6-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=39db99ae-ffc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=4823105)
---
One of the things I admire most about Jane is her unrelenting passion for activism. So I was thrilled when she asked the cast of Grace and Frankie to put on a special Galentine’s Day Virtual Cast Reunion and live table read to benefit the crucial work that the Jane Fonda Climate PAC does. | [**GET YOUR TICKETS**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78820124/454558203/-1609412982?amount=24&refcode=ea.39db99ae-ffc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.39db99ae-ffc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5ZGI5OWFlLWZmYzgtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HSGaunrole2exXvHevGK6LzXXqkXABamV1_Jx-gsCik=)
---
**Climate change is the emergency of our lifetimes, but Jane is right when she says that action is the best antidote to climate despair.**
Jane and I have always put our principles into action, and we’re not slowing down anytime soon. So join us for a night of activism, camaraderie, and Grace and Frankie nostalgia. **Doesn’t matter if you’re a Grace and Frankie fan, a superfan, or if you’ve never seen an episode — you won’t want to miss it.**
**[Get your tickets now for a night of good friends, good fun, and good trouble for a good cause>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78820125/454558205/-1609412982?amount=24&refcode=ea.39db99ae-ffc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.39db99ae-ffc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5ZGI5OWFlLWZmYzgtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HSGaunrole2exXvHevGK6LzXXqkXABamV1_Jx-gsCik=)**
I can't wait to see you there.
Lily Tomlin

clean_body: Good fun and good trouble for a good cause. | One of the things I admire most about Jane is her unrelenting passion for activism. So I was thrilled when she asked the cast of Grace and Frankie to put on a special Galentine’s Day Virtual Cast Reunion and live table read to benefit the crucial work that the Jane Fonda Climate PAC does. | = Climate change is the emergency of our lifetimes, but Jane is right when she says that action is the best antidote to climate despair. Jane and I have always put our principles into action, and we’re not slowing down anytime soon. So join us for a night of activism, camaraderie, and Grace and Frankie nostalgia. Doesn’t matter if you’re a Grace and Frankie fan, a superfan, or if you’ve never seen an episode — you won’t want to miss it. = I can't wait to see you there. Lily Tomlin = P.S. Did you buy your ticket already? Thank you! It may take a few days for our system to update, but we have your contribution recorded. See you on the 13th! | = | = Follow the Jane Fonda Climate PAC: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Team Feuer
subject: The debate made one thing clear:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MIKE FEUER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Mike Feuer for Congress [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78820589/454560004/1100932385?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2024.02.11_B1_PostDebate_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWUxMjdmMTQtMDFjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2hLjVFYlEWIJxAZQvlWyi0PdOOrPsFQ02IF-n62ocko=&emci=76b834c3-b7c7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=9e127f14-01c9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=13691217) | Friend, Yesterday's 30th Congressional District Debate made one thing absolutely clear: **Mike Feuer is the BEST candidate in this crowded race to succeed Adam Schiff and take our country's greatest challenges in Congress.** From protecting our democracy to addressing homelessness, Mike has the experience and drive needed in this critical time in our history. name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: The plot to sabotage my father’s campaign goes deeper than you could ever imagine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
It’s all preplanned| | | Peter, This email is going to be a little longer than normal. **[But I need you to read all of it.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=db77f855cb724ca581afa7d07a2629cf&_e=IqbkDPk3aYa98jEUjshGczW420i1Ha0mVtEt6q2u_Ymb_dgq4Rjk4ISyvIa5Dfn1opujPko2ShnH1hBr4d9f9LQGf7WdwAeLHXH6vPiW0ep1NwqKpE7hwrSHGDcx66bd4PH9X7xD-PxnKZavo_UWlj8Zr8IPbZcAUZ8tFNdqp9pem5NoX17h0S57nt_qzNJ9JUWes4o0daCGfrHEcXXgxvUalCseENqbGyIw8I6ztiqJorzmqKhbk7nKsmg1yWHbf7RP9d2gKL2-EURF6MZ4bTrabiGdzczBf9AllyKa1kDRxJy-Z9Ol5mhalaOdjxgYep1GrSYu1vrHtNe1NTlcXSBEq7jjmk-6oiIYWIdkzhcLaBFvn62MrHTzH9rdK083plAodwQPHEbHFRSI01TZ5IdhLn4lSuUt6iOjUa56qlcreMRBnJ1xvYn-BDLXvaQv5-IyG9ntyKIK84HCMcwXoLk9aYwz-zWJG3ypWsNCkag%3D)** Ever since my father descended from the golden escalator in Trump Tower on June 16th, 2015, the Deep State has been out to get him. No Presidential candidate in American history has ever faced such intense opposition from corporate special interests, neoliberal elites, and unelected government bureaucrats. **[— They illegally spied on his campaign](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=db77f855cb724ca581afa7d07a2629cf&_e=IqbkDPk3aYa98jEUjshGczW420i1Ha0mVtEt6q2u_Ymb_dgq4Rjk4ISyvIa5Dfn1opujPko2ShnH1hBr4d9f9LQGf7WdwAeLHXH6vPiW0ep1NwqKpE7hwrSHGDcx66bd4PH9X7xD-PxnKZavo_UWlj8Zr8IPbZcAUZ8tFNdqp9pem5NoX17h0S57nt_qzNJ9JUWes4o0daCGfrHEcXXgxvUalCseENqbGyIw8I6ztiqJorzmqKhbk7nKsmg1yWHbf7RP9d2gKL2-EURF6MZ4bTrabiGdzczBf9AllyKa1kDRxJy-Z9Ol5mhalaOdjxgYF_CcCron2UG3IlQUDMyG8zFMg7RvylHJKzMKwfFZn4Y7k0MVnlSqXdcnaY8M7BdTmKZdYXxPfKtA6LzwVT4J_nAPm6BSTOYd_GoLFiaROEPKPsmCJ4GN7ApMt2zi1-vJkruOfP8JEI25yShxtZ7raVDXvunA8ffqNpFmqwvE2mQ%3D)****[— They created the Russia Hoax to undermine his candidacy](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=db77f855cb724ca581afa7d07a2629cf&_e=IqbkDPk3aYa98jEUjshGczW420i1Ha0mVtEt6q2u_Ymb_dgq4Rjk4ISyvIa5Dfn1opujPko2ShnH1hBr4d9f9LQGf7WdwAeLHXH6vPiW0ep1NwqKpE7hwrSHGDcx66bd4PH9X7xD-PxnKZavo_UWlj8Zr8IPbZcAUZ8tFNdqp9pem5NoX17h0S57nt_qzNJ9JUWes4o0daCGfrHEcXXgxvUalCseENqbGyIw8I6ztiqJorzmqKhbk7nKsmg1yWHbf7RP9d2gKL2-EURF6MZ4bTrabiGdzczBf9AllyKa1kDRxJy-Z9Ol5mhalaOdjxgYzxju44DWT1--R91aUSPco33G9pXidbUiRFWsJl5kUtYeJvy_uUOCjWr3PZRd9Yp2t4FVncGgBKu4xpY2yA46Pog8SsY9LlvQerd0R0aLP7HxmsH9HVUVQBo6C4ZaNacPfGjIpu3lNwea1EVE5eBuawbIOnA_EY_bx8vTHH92d-g%3D)****[— They pressured the Electoral College to unconstitutionally throw the election](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=db77f855cb724ca581afa7d07a2629cf&_e=IqbkDPk3aYa98jEUjshGczW420i1Ha0mVtEt6q2u_Ymb_dgq4Rjk4ISyvIa5Dfn1opujPko2ShnH1hBr4d9f9LQGf7WdwAeLHXH6vPiW0ep1NwqKpE7hwrSHGDcx66bd4PH9X7xD-PxnKZavo_UWlj8Zr8IPbZcAUZ8tFNdqp9pem5NoX17h0S57nt_qzNJ9JUWes4o0daCGfrHEcXXgxvUalCseENqbGyIw8I6ztiqJorzmqKhbk7nKsmg1yWHbf7RP9d2gKL2-EURF6MZ4bTrabiGdzczBf9AllyKa1kDRxJy-Z9Ol5mhalaOdjxgYOxGgU2oFsV5--UQNYV5UfgzE_W089VvYYLeNJiQsfrwz9eNVbMC6CY-IE8J9lcDBD6wUs7yr5M7yQEPxlsMh3Mr38jGI1MCzXWO9H2qHScv2c96BVALsvSw2kERmzjWlGgroYC7T6yBCFrCecCJF12yo7zzz10M7ZuBVezH6VZ8%3D)** Despite the Deep State pulling out every dirty trick in the book, **[the American people would not be silenced.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=db77f855cb724ca581afa7d07a2629cf&_e=IqbkDPk3aYa98jEUjshGczW420i1Ha0mVtEt6q2u_Ymb_dgq4Rjk4ISyvIa5Dfn1opujPko2ShnH1hBr4d9f9LQGf7WdwAeLHXH6vPiW0ep1NwqKpE7hwrSHGDcx66bd4PH9X7xD-PxnKZavo_UWlj8Zr8IPbZcAUZ8tFNdqp9pem5NoX17h0S57nt_qzNJ9JUWes4o0daCGfrHEcXXgxvUalCseENqbGyIw8I6ztiqJorzmqKhbk7nKsmg1yWHbf7RP9d2gKL2-EURF6MZ4bTrabiGdzczBf9AllyKa1kDRxJy-Z9Ol5mhalaOdjxgYYxUhGIK3c_WqH0PqQZawOtbfaLvtdLznDzXltiMONZNHf1q2pS5EC5HAbvDGC-KZYLXCZ_wFUL5X4M1V2GxqmeYVdFyGOARckjdby_CeiFXbCAiQ8LZVD1WFvZClRJIYlQb9w4C-p0aXvJuTHytXLvWwPH3bRMuoJRoa7YF4kvc%3D)** The 2016 election marked a turning point for working-class patriots across the country, who rose up and sent a message to the corrupt establishment that _they weren’t going to take it anymore._ **My father’s ensuing first term in office was one of the most successful of all time. It’s no wonder why the Deep State is so scared of him returning to the White House.** Make no mistake, Peter. The bogus criminal charges, hysterical 14th Amendment lawfare attacks, and mainstream media censorship campaigns are all coordinated. **[The Biden Administration is leading a third-world-like effort to silence and jail its biggest domestic political opponent ahead of this November’s election.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=db77f855cb724ca581afa7d07a2629cf&_e=IqbkDPk3aYa98jEUjshGczW420i1Ha0mVtEt6q2u_Ymb_dgq4Rjk4ISyvIa5Dfn1opujPko2ShnH1hBr4d9f9LQGf7WdwAeLHXH6vPiW0ep1NwqKpE7hwrSHGDcx66bd4PH9X7xD-PxnKZavo_UWlj8Zr8IPbZcAUZ8tFNdqp9pem5NoX17h0S57nt_qzNJ9JUWes4o0daCGfrHEcXXgxvUalCseENqbGyIw8I6ztiqJorzmqKhbk7nKsmg1yWHbf7RP9d2gKL2-EURF6MZ4bTrabiGdzczBf9AllyKa1kDRxJy-Z9Ol5mhalaOdjxgYhMSxokphwCekUFEvuADGAHmyyGH1Fzt8KGDmsZu3hQ-YL67i_xPUbDOr81m75JFs1iy9W6hpkgDaf3jMa5ZMT_RwqyL5d_gGtlRHKl0FgzQEu1CS7FyOalaZKm4XSpF2qXwsaaLec21K3xY7dj9PLjT8pjuYanyD8934pelPgjc%3D) ** 2024 marks the final battle to save this nation from complete and total annihilation. Luckily, the path to victory is clear: Every single American patriot must unite behind Donald J. Trump in order to overcome the monumental effort to sabotage his return to the Presidency. I’m not asking you to commit anything more than you can afford, Peter. _But my father and our Party at large desperately need grassroots supporters to step up and help us compete with the far-Left’s billionaire backers._ Even a small contribution of $50, $35, or $10 would go a long way toward victory. **[Far too much is at stake here for any of us to sit on the sidelines. This could be the last election in the history of America if we don’t meet the moment. Please consider making a generous financial contribution today to help my father RETURN to the White House and ensure the GOP reclaims the Majority in the United States Senate.>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=db77f855cb724ca581afa7d07a2629cf&_e=IqbkDPk3aYa98jEUjshGczW420i1Ha0mVtEt6q2u_Ymb_dgq4Rjk4ISyvIa5Dfn1opujPko2ShnH1hBr4d9f9LQGf7WdwAeLHXH6vPiW0ep1NwqKpE7hwrSHGDcx66bd4PH9X7xD-PxnKZavo_UWlj8Zr8IPbZcAUZ8tFNdqp9pem5NoX17h0S57nt_qzNJ9JUWes4o0daCGfrHEcXXgxvUalCseENqbGyIw8I6ztiqJorzmqKhbk7nKsmg1yWHbf7RP9d2gKL2-EURF6MZ4bTrabiGdzczBf9AllyKa1kDRxJy-Z9Ol5mhalaOdjxgYFCUdKAtjPXrzszC0W5JzVb9XmSGkwpflWntbHFWyPQsMeaj1yg8oXJHLgvWVT7MyBkjBpgZ5WhPsU7z6HvEQVUtwi06LI6If38mz7wROQvsE9Aus7OioJdSPprH47cezdfMztHh6iCh4Jsp0LqgDB1BYN6IMrThYDdVaBsgVjzM%3D)** Thank you,

clean_body: It’s all preplanned| | | Peter, This email is going to be a little longer than normal. Ever since my father descended from the golden escalator in Trump Tower on June 16th, 2015, the Deep State has been out to get him. No Presidential candidate in American history has ever faced such intense opposition from corporate special interests, neoliberal elites, and unelected government bureaucrats. Despite the Deep State pulling out every dirty trick in the book, The 2016 election marked a turning point for working-class patriots across the country, who rose up and sent a message to the corrupt establishment that they weren’t going to take it anymore. My father’s ensuing first term in office was one of the most successful of all time. It’s no wonder why the Deep State is so scared of him returning to the White House. Make no mistake, Peter. The bogus criminal charges, hysterical 14th Amendment lawfare attacks, and mainstream media censorship campaigns are all coordinated. 2024 marks the final battle to save this nation from complete and total annihilation. Luckily, the path to victory is clear: Every single American patriot must unite behind Donald J. Trump in order to overcome the monumental effort to sabotage his return to the Presidency. I’m not asking you to commit anything more than you can afford, Peter. But my father and our Party at large desperately need grassroots supporters to step up and help us compete with the far-Left’s billionaire backers. Even a small contribution of $50, $35, or $10 would go a long way toward victory. Thank you, | | Donald Trump Jr. Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Governor Abbott is fighting to stop the federal government's war on American energy and keep Texas a global energy leader. Can we count on you to help him FIGHT BACK against President Biden's anti-energy policies?

Texas is a pro-energy state - indeed, we are THE #1 energy state in the nation. But since President Biden took office, he has pushed an anti-energy agenda that threatens to weaken our state's energy agenda.

**The men and women who work in the energy industry help power our lives, and they are vital to our booming Texas economy. Governor Abbott won 't stand idly by as the Biden Administration pushes strict regulations that jeopardize affordable energy prices and the livelihoods of hardworking Texans. **

By joining Governor Abbott today and **[voicing your support](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=36a5943069e5472fa2164fd5c3d5dd8e&_e=SWbL2i0nphnhz7C7x4ztjQ0r60fGCmOE41A2bRv_0XdM3qXghJ5RqsZ-eQ8Pfp8dqtxf9B3lNcx8DtzNhaNy0rtvDoLFSpvsw8y03oHf1KZARz4WReUH-j1Oeq7GZ5vvJKyLFbV8Z0k2PjrHmU19e7LNvEks93jJ-8fXmgkYApUsmTBh9ExInAdx88afqLkP6JckzmiSMtzgkDsx8arDypbH6usUF7D2uSyVIcnVS7xLLkaiaWet1w1FUSzyQAgqCqRSrTgp7g2yQsEMLmiMzHUve04FCKZ9Qu3THA2-JM8Mn0wQkEEgd9quk0XGpbTK5a5YTFrjadgjKrzeDH2mVg%3D%3D)** to protect Texas' energy industry from Biden's overreach, you will play a pivotal role in keeping our state the #1 energy producer for years to come!

clean_body: Texas is pro-energy, and we plan to stay that way. | | | | | | | Untitled Document | Friend, President Joe Biden is waging a war on American energy production. Governor Abbott is fighting to stop the federal government's war on American energy and keep Texas a global energy leader. Can we count on you to help him FIGHT BACK against President Biden's anti-energy policies? Texas is a pro-energy state - indeed, we are THE #1 energy state in the nation. But since President Biden took office, he has pushed an anti-energy agenda that threatens to weaken our state's energy agenda. The men and women who work in the energy industry help power our lives, and they are vital to our booming Texas economy. Governor Abbott won 't stand idly by as the Biden Administration pushes strict regulations that jeopardize affordable energy prices and the livelihoods of hardworking Texans. By joining Governor Abbott today and to protect Texas' energy industry from Biden's overreach, you will play a pivotal role in keeping our state the #1 energy producer for years to come! Thank you in advance for your support. \- Team Abbott POLITICAL AD PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT PO BOX 308, AUSTIN, TEXAS 78767

| [S.B. 69](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y5t0gcuvs0Ifu7T-KYjmqK0-XNhVDUY-qLj-HWSBD7ixV2B00PsJGM9P-18uE0lK5xRzfgIlIgmEm9LEYKMsdCYT6zYa8CXoXBk_xCzQcTvX1QL9I1o7f3-oXHarbyWUaGs9elm48-sfaAkD9S9cP73v8bYbk8ZEJIoOkl708y5V5akEACFanYUVE0bTDi-nPi8poEn1g28=&c=HXU0UrW_y7FWM0yIygdvWOeArleW_vo5Ap4R35jO1yPz1DnZwuFM4w==&ch=YQDLGurn3yFzbEojGtmHqOFlYtL76ylCV5ZCuU0PwsGupaq5UsvlrA==) Patron: McPike Minimum qualifications for law-enforcement officers; citizenship; waiver. Allows individuals who have been granted Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals by U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services to qualify for the positions of chief of police, police officer of a locality, deputy sheriff, jail officer, and law-enforcement officer. Current law allows only citizens of the United States to qualify for the named positions. A BILL to amend and reenact § [15.2-1705](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y5t0gcuvs0Ifu7T-KYjmqK0-XNhVDUY-qLj-HWSBD7ixV2B00PsJGIiGZbh_tfyofdwVJPAUw1ck1TOeiDRV4WarIvOtsQtzZRqrukh3Ugj7pYuSztsHMeBhIw-m0tDuIDzM2vIsJhvwUrYaB1rp2n0m0dxbrqf-RYfTe8ncNJc=&c=HXU0UrW_y7FWM0yIygdvWOeArleW_vo5Ap4R35jO1yPz1DnZwuFM4w==&ch=YQDLGurn3yFzbEojGtmHqOFlYtL76ylCV5ZCuU0PwsGupaq5UsvlrA==) of the Code of Virginia, relating to minimum qualifications for law-enforcement officers; citizenship.24100992D
[S.B. 503](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y5t0gcuvs0Ifu7T-KYjmqK0-XNhVDUY-qLj-HWSBD7ixV2B00PsJGL15g4nMTyO4B4cfoapCOIg49bRUcZqanDyaBsaWKGUGVkyHxs4iv_9AfxmFCdRjP3rMwKKAoiv9sSALSy-B-JLSGLuSGk7Pd0nxOPItxcBctQZdfl_I5lchpm1bJdcF35E2eckJ8NxgUDFxAbfnuZY=&c=HXU0UrW_y7FWM0yIygdvWOeArleW_vo5Ap4R35jO1yPz1DnZwuFM4w==&ch=YQDLGurn3yFzbEojGtmHqOFlYtL76ylCV5ZCuU0PwsGupaq5UsvlrA==) Patron: Surovell License plate reader systems; civil penalty. Provides requirements for the use of license plate reader systems, defined in the bill, by law-enforcement agencies. The bill limits the use of such systems to scanning, detecting, and recording data about vehicles and license plate numbers for the purpose of identifying a vehicle that is (i) associated with a wanted, missing, or endangered person or human trafficking; (ii) stolen; (iii) involved in an active law-enforcement investigation; or (iv) in the vicinity of a recent crime and may be connected to that crime. The bill authorizes and requires the Commonwealth Transportation Board to establish a permitting process for installing and using such systems in state highway rights-of-way. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding in Title 2.2 a chapter numbered 55.6, consisting of a section numbered [2.2-5517](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y5t0gcuvs0Ifu7T-KYjmqK0-XNhVDUY-qLj-HWSBD7ixV2B00PsJGIiGZbh_tfyoyl7GZt48pAFce8cPM3OMHsz7u8vJl3BPTxPtnLgl2v6Vpq1sl__ukl7f4j7BaBmfI6KMhb3iOMXspWkLWtuKVjNIBO3GSl7qBdy2TkbtbOY=&c=HXU0UrW_y7FWM0yIygdvWOeArleW_vo5Ap4R35jO1yPz1DnZwuFM4w==&ch=YQDLGurn3yFzbEojGtmHqOFlYtL76ylCV5ZCuU0PwsGupaq5UsvlrA==), and by adding a section numbered [33.2-210.1](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y5t0gcuvs0Ifu7T-KYjmqK0-XNhVDUY-qLj-HWSBD7ixV2B00PsJGIiGZbh_tfyoxGwn1_g4lHJr3PjmXgpiufIUz0hWLxPcy6BRHWM6vJtVCwVYrzdTBoq-q0z2Ek4r62U4qqBdzNVkKyj_6oiQqVm6_YAzAeqzurK5rgSpcLEGfWxcGDWGwQ==&c=HXU0UrW_y7FWM0yIygdvWOeArleW_vo5Ap4R35jO1yPz1DnZwuFM4w==&ch=YQDLGurn3yFzbEojGtmHqOFlYtL76ylCV5ZCuU0PwsGupaq5UsvlrA==), relating to license plate reader systems; civil penalty.24100926D

[S.B. 101](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y5t0gcuvs0Ifu7T-KYjmqK0-XNhVDUY-qLj-HWSBD7ixV2B00PsJGIiGZbh_tfyoyjeTgyxRpG-xDYJnzIHPry3tbNI7yrAJWEMpuc7ywvG1iWRs7Fx9yvY3JDXPYlQNlX_uWrUR-E9vCGRUuVGKXmgCtF0waoHPllQEcgizm9bz3_YOHbZKsAzTgUiLi8ovXUK_gx_2Hu0=&c=HXU0UrW_y7FWM0yIygdvWOeArleW_vo5Ap4R35jO1yPz1DnZwuFM4w==&ch=YQDLGurn3yFzbEojGtmHqOFlYtL76ylCV5ZCuU0PwsGupaq5UsvlrA==) Patron: Ebbin Marriage lawful regardless of sex, gender, or race of parties; issuance of marriage license. Provides that no person authorized to issue a marriage license shall deny the issuance of such license to two parties contemplating a lawful marriage on the basis of the sex, gender, or race of the parties. The bill also requires that such lawful marriages be recognized in the Commonwealth regardless of the sex, gender, or race of the parties. The bill provides that religious organizations or members of the clergy acting in their religious capacity shall have the right to refuse to perform any marriage. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding a section numbered [20-13.2](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y5t0gcuvs0Ifu7T-KYjmqK0-XNhVDUY-qLj-HWSBD7ixV2B00PsJGIiGZbh_tfyolvRfXPM88M3B9e-DViryYtkRRL-NEEeaax86-txKU0p50DQ_gDyet0YgdSr4Z47E0sDlYfzMlNJxcMKxsxNVLmySnP6SbLlLaUkqIXLc30c=&c=HXU0UrW_y7FWM0yIygdvWOeArleW_vo5Ap4R35jO1yPz1DnZwuFM4w==&ch=YQDLGurn3yFzbEojGtmHqOFlYtL76ylCV5ZCuU0PwsGupaq5UsvlrA==), relating to marriage lawful regardless of sex, gender, or race of parties; issuance of marriage license.24101679D
[S.B. 532](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y5t0gcuvs0Ifu7T-KYjmqK0-XNhVDUY-qLj-HWSBD7ixV2B00PsJGET-kUCsIX7yogPFpB6YAyXU4RaTJBaiPQKB5_ypOQXpNgd6cCq5RnATGxXaCjNm2hoBtbLHYp1fCAFgI7Sx8tK2Bkjr_AQmijy38d54YiBpLQtJgvoHTx_nNGvPHTEOTXLzP3mhDevoECkwpI4P64U=&c=HXU0UrW_y7FWM0yIygdvWOeArleW_vo5Ap4R35jO1yPz1DnZwuFM4w==&ch=YQDLGurn3yFzbEojGtmHqOFlYtL76ylCV5ZCuU0PwsGupaq5UsvlrA==) Patron: Jordan Commercial entity offering social media accounts; restricted hours for minors; civil liability. Provides that no commercial entity that offers social media accounts, as defined in the bill, shall knowingly or intentionally allow a minor to access his social media account during the hours of 12:00 a.m. to 6:00 a.m. unless the minor's parent, guardian, or legal custodian has provided permission for the minor to use such social media account during these hours. The bill provides that any commercial entity that violates these provisions shall be subject to civil liability for damages resulting from the interference with a minor's sleep cycle or mental health by allowing such minor to access to his social media account during the hours of 12:00 a.m. to 6:00 a.m. and reasonable attorney fees and costs. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding a section numbered [8.01-40.6](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y5t0gcuvs0Ifu7T-KYjmqK0-XNhVDUY-qLj-HWSBD7ixV2B00PsJGIiGZbh_tfyouEDYtEwRUSt11KfOPOxcbCn4WHpMMrleF0tNAZyc9LMNNXquVtfBZlMiTg1iwvYh5gXZxznh7fmO86ujwb8soCaLX6BZglBZnOHMCspv3-Q=&c=HXU0UrW_y7FWM0yIygdvWOeArleW_vo5Ap4R35jO1yPz1DnZwuFM4w==&ch=YQDLGurn3yFzbEojGtmHqOFlYtL76ylCV5ZCuU0PwsGupaq5UsvlrA==), relating to commercial entity offering social media accounts; restricted hours for minors; civil liability.24104696D
[S.B. 695](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y5t0gcuvs0Ifu7T-KYjmqK0-XNhVDUY-qLj-HWSBD7ixV2B00PsJGGuwOH09piX8EZ6fRfPy7K4asvkSM-vY9mCt-o7wijQbdJv1-Z3vqfPAyQs0cWdZIsjeVvvqzJ6-d4lqQTCS8jfpn3Yxn8MJhc4xKiM3TLyVBAnlTAnqVFa4qUh-me0NQNLEYpHjFM5Jdca3r2XVALg=&c=HXU0UrW_y7FWM0yIygdvWOeArleW_vo5Ap4R35jO1yPz1DnZwuFM4w==&ch=YQDLGurn3yFzbEojGtmHqOFlYtL76ylCV5ZCuU0PwsGupaq5UsvlrA==) Patron: Peake Virginia Crime Commission; surveillance technology; report. Adds to the powers and duties of the Virginia Crime Commission (the Commission) the power to conduct an annual study on surveillance technology, defined in the bill, utilized by local and state law-enforcement agencies throughout the Commonwealth, including (i) the technology's potential impact on privacy rights and civil liberties, with particular attention to potential disparate impacts on different communities and populations; (ii) the technology's effectiveness for law or regulatory enforcement purposes, and the likelihood that evidence collected through such technology will be considered inadmissible in a court of competent jurisdiction; (iii) the potential for the misuse of the technology or any data that is collected through the use of such technology and safeguards to prevent such misuse; (iv) existing laws and regulations governing the technology and whether additional legislation is necessary to regulate its use; and (v) any recommendation as to whether technology utilized by a locality should be implemented throughout the Commonwealth. The bill provides that the Commission shall submit a report of its findings to the Chairmen of the House Committee for Courts of Justice, the Senate Committee on the Judiciary, and the Governor within six months of beginning the study and shall make such report available to the public on the website of the Commission. A BILL to amend and reenact § [30-158](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y5t0gcuvs0Ifu7T-KYjmqK0-XNhVDUY-qLj-HWSBD7ixV2B00PsJGIiGZbh_tfyowO2hDQs54z98erKoQyjA97DSLiXWoDgo9fk1BggiUGUmrhvteX1RGwKBQbcjKWiZOpPAxy3Pk2oyelkHb2KWjGMJDjdCsgOWWEmst5b9Ud4=&c=HXU0UrW_y7FWM0yIygdvWOeArleW_vo5Ap4R35jO1yPz1DnZwuFM4w==&ch=YQDLGurn3yFzbEojGtmHqOFlYtL76ylCV5ZCuU0PwsGupaq5UsvlrA==) of the Code of Virginia, relating to Virginia Crime Commission; surveillance technology; report.24104136D

# ACTION, ACTION, ACTION
---
|
Friends, Crossover begins Tuesday night at midnight. Legislators in each house have less than 48 hours to make decisions on bills in their respective houses.
The Senate floor dockets for Monday and Tuesday will be heavy as legislators work hard to finish any outstanding legislation before the pending deadline. Just another reminder that...
YOU can participate remotely with your legislators from the comfort of your home.
YOU can watch Senate Committees in action and at the right time, comment to the committee in real time.
This is YOUR opportunity to DO SOMETHING.
Above I have listed the dockets for THIS MONDAY'S Senate Committee hearings. By clicking each link you can quickly look over which bills are coming up this Monday that are of interest to you.
Find a bill that interests you and want to comment remotely?
Then click on the link below to the streaming of the committee meeting and follow the directions to either view the committee in real time or comment remotely to the Senate committee members in real time to state your support or opposition to a particular bill.
It's that easy to express your support or opposition to a bill coming up on this Monday's docket.

| Thank you to those who have pitched in to help cover my costs to communicate with you each week while the General Assembly is in session. THANK YOU.
Many of you have advised me that you appreciate my instructive and informative emails, regarding important bills coming before the Virginia General Assembly.
I'm delighted to continue to send you these emails and ask for your continued support so that I may continue to communicate with you.
If you haven't done so already, will you please help me offset the cost by pitching in a few dollars?
It costs about $400 per month to send out emails to keep you informed about bills coming before the General Assembly.
Would you please make a donation today to help offset the cost, so that I can continue to bring you the latest on what's going on in the General Assembly?
Thank you in advance for your continued support. After serving you for 8 years in the Virginia Senate, I know how things really work in Richmond and want to keep you informed.
Please consider donating $25, $50, $100 so that I can continue to communicate with you and help you to engage and interact with your representatives to ensure accountability and transparency.

clean_body: Participate online or in person here | | | | Senate Bills Up MONDAY CALL IN REMOTELY OR SHOW UP | | Senate Committee Public Hearings for MONDAY BILLS TO WATCH Monday's Dockets | | == | == Patron: McPike Minimum qualifications for law-enforcement officers; citizenship; waiver. Allows individuals who have been granted Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals by U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services to qualify for the positions of chief of police, police officer of a locality, deputy sheriff, jail officer, and law-enforcement officer. Current law allows only citizens of the United States to qualify for the named positions. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia, relating to minimum qualifications for law-enforcement officers; citizenship.24100992D == Patron: Surovell License plate reader systems; civil penalty. Provides requirements for the use of license plate reader systems, defined in the bill, by law-enforcement agencies. The bill limits the use of such systems to scanning, detecting, and recording data about vehicles and license plate numbers for the purpose of identifying a vehicle that is (i) associated with a wanted, missing, or endangered person or human trafficking; (ii) stolen; (iii) involved in an active law-enforcement investigation; or (iv) in the vicinity of a recent crime and may be connected to that crime. The bill authorizes and requires the Commonwealth Transportation Board to establish a permitting process for installing and using such systems in state highway rights-of-way. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding in Title 2.2 a chapter numbered 55.6, consisting of a section numbered ==, and by adding a section numbered ==, relating to license plate reader systems; civil penalty.24100926D == Patron: Ebbin Marriage lawful regardless of sex, gender, or race of parties; issuance of marriage license. Provides that no person authorized to issue a marriage license shall deny the issuance of such license to two parties contemplating a lawful marriage on the basis of the sex, gender, or race of the parties. The bill also requires that such lawful marriages be recognized in the Commonwealth regardless of the sex, gender, or race of the parties. The bill provides that religious organizations or members of the clergy acting in their religious capacity shall have the right to refuse to perform any marriage. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding a section numbered ==, relating to marriage lawful regardless of sex, gender, or race of parties; issuance of marriage license.24101679D == Patron: Jordan Commercial entity offering social media accounts; restricted hours for minors; civil liability. Provides that no commercial entity that offers social media accounts, as defined in the bill, shall knowingly or intentionally allow a minor to access his social media account during the hours of 12:00 a.m. to 6:00 a.m. unless the minor's parent, guardian, or legal custodian has provided permission for the minor to use such social media account during these hours. The bill provides that any commercial entity that violates these provisions shall be subject to civil liability for damages resulting from the interference with a minor's sleep cycle or mental health by allowing such minor to access to his social media account during the hours of 12:00 a.m. to 6:00 a.m. and reasonable attorney fees and costs. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding a section numbered ==, relating to commercial entity offering social media accounts; restricted hours for minors; civil liability.24104696D == Patron: Peake Virginia Crime Commission; surveillance technology; report. Adds to the powers and duties of the Virginia Crime Commission (the Commission) the power to conduct an annual study on surveillance technology, defined in the bill, utilized by local and state law-enforcement agencies throughout the Commonwealth, including (i) the technology's potential impact on privacy rights and civil liberties, with particular attention to potential disparate impacts on different communities and populations; (ii) the technology's effectiveness for law or regulatory enforcement purposes, and the likelihood that evidence collected through such technology will be considered inadmissible in a court of competent jurisdiction; (iii) the potential for the misuse of the technology or any data that is collected through the use of such technology and safeguards to prevent such misuse; (iv) existing laws and regulations governing the technology and whether additional legislation is necessary to regulate its use; and (v) any recommendation as to whether technology utilized by a locality should be implemented throughout the Commonwealth. The bill provides that the Commission shall submit a report of its findings to the Chairmen of the House Committee for Courts of Justice, the Senate Committee on the Judiciary, and the Governor within six months of beginning the study and shall make such report available to the public on the website of the Commission. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia, relating to Virginia Crime Commission; surveillance technology; report.24104136D | | == | no docket | | == | no docket | | == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == | | == | no docket | | == | no docket | ACTION, ACTION, ACTION | Friends, Crossover begins Tuesday night at midnight. Legislators in each house have less than 48 hours to make decisions on bills in their respective houses. The Senate floor dockets for Monday and Tuesday will be heavy as legislators work hard to finish any outstanding legislation before the pending deadline. Just another reminder that... YOU can participate remotely with your legislators from the comfort of your home. YOU can watch Senate Committees in action and at the right time, comment to the committee in real time. This is YOUR opportunity to DO SOMETHING. Above I have listed the dockets for THIS MONDAY'S Senate Committee hearings. By clicking each link you can quickly look over which bills are coming up this Monday that are of interest to you. Find a bill that interests you and want to comment remotely? Then click on the link below to the streaming of the committee meeting and follow the directions to either view the committee in real time or comment remotely to the Senate committee members in real time to state your support or opposition to a particular bill. It's that easy to express your support or opposition to a bill coming up on this Monday's docket. | | GET REGULAR UPDATES | Thank you to those who have pitched in to help cover my costs to communicate with you each week while the General Assembly is in session. THANK YOU. Many of you have advised me that you appreciate my instructive and informative emails, regarding important bills coming before the Virginia General Assembly. I'm delighted to continue to send you these emails and ask for your continued support so that I may continue to communicate with you. If you haven't done so already, will you please help me offset the cost by pitching in a few dollars? It costs about $400 per month to send out emails to keep you informed about bills coming before the General Assembly. Would you please make a donation today to help offset the cost, so that I can continue to bring you the latest on what's going on in the General Assembly? Thank you in advance for your continued support. After serving you for 8 years in the Virginia Senate, I know how things really work in Richmond and want to keep you informed. Please consider donating $25, $50, $100 so that I can continue to communicate with you and help you to engage and interact with your representatives to ensure accountability and transparency. | | == | | | | | | | | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. **It's because thousands of $5 donations from supporters like you helped Nikki win in 2022 and get to work delivering for the people of Central and Southern Illinois.**
It was $5 donations that allowed Nikki to build bipartisan relationships to break through gridlock and deliver meaningful results for our families and communities.
And it was $5 donations that helped secure more than $320 million in federal funding to improve our district’s infrastructure and jumpstart workforce development initiatives.
We know five bucks might not seem like a lot, especially when you compare it to National Republicans’ massive fundraising hauls.
But every $5 donation truly makes a huge difference and will help fuel our work to overcome outside spending, reelect Nikki, and take back the House majority.

clean_body: | Hey folks, we know you’re probably preparing to watch the Super Bowl later today, so we’ll cut right to the chase: = | **= We know we ask you to pitch into our campaign every so often, but do you know why? It's because thousands of $5 donations from supporters like you helped Nikki win in 2022 and get to work delivering for the people of Central and Southern Illinois. It was $5 donations that allowed Nikki to build bipartisan relationships to break through gridlock and deliver meaningful results for our families and communities. And it was $5 donations that helped secure more than $320 million in federal funding to improve our district’s infrastructure and jumpstart workforce development initiatives. We know five bucks might not seem like a lot, especially when you compare it to National Republicans’ massive fundraising hauls. But every $5 donation truly makes a huge difference and will help fuel our work to overcome outside spending, reelect Nikki, and take back the House majority. That’s why we’re asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ** **= | = ** **= | = ** **= Thank you, and we hope you enjoy the big game tonight! — Team Nikki ** ** ** **= Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

name: Al Franken
subject: told you so
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20762%2E4449941%2EgSTY0V)
---
Guess what, **I was right.**

I’ve been screaming from the rooftops that my friend Josh Riley’s race here in NY-19 is the top race Democrats need to win to take back the House... and finally, folks are catching on.

In case you missed the news, Josh just earned a spot on the national Democrats’ highly exclusive ‘Red-to-Blue’ list. Only a handful of races in the entire country made the cut, and it goes to show how competitive and important this race will be.

**I hate to say ‘I told you so,’ but I kind of did.** I know Josh has what it takes to win, and I’m thrilled they see it too. [**This is a key moment in his race, and Josh needs our help to keep up the momentum. So today, I’m asking you to split $5, $25, or whatever you can between Josh to help him win in NY-19 and Fight for Reform to help elect Democrats across the country.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37296?t=7&akid=20762%2E4449941%2EgSTY0V) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Josh Riley will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37297?t=8&akid=20762%2E4449941%2EgSTY0V)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37298?t=9&akid=20762%2E4449941%2EgSTY0V)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37299?t=10&akid=20762%2E4449941%2EgSTY0V)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37300?t=11&akid=20762%2E4449941%2EgSTY0V)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37296?t=12&akid=20762%2E4449941%2EgSTY0V)
Let’s be real: there’s no taking back the House majority without flipping districts like NY-19. I know, and national Democrats know, that Josh is just the guy to do the job.

Josh was my counsel in the Senate, and he’s the hardest working person I know. Together, we passed bills expanding rights for survivors of domestic abuse and providing new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. (We also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad.)**Josh ran in this district in 2022, and came up short by 1.6% – and he’s going to win this time with our help.**
[**So if you’re all-in to take back the House this November, I need you to get serious about Josh’s race. Please donate anything you can (seriously, every dollar helps) to Fight for Reform to elect state and local Democrats and Josh today to send Marc Molinaro packing and get the Speaker’s gavel out of Mike Johnson’s hands.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37296?t=13&akid=20762%2E4449941%2EgSTY0V)
Thanks,

Al

P.S. I look pretty smart now that everyone else is realizing just how important Josh’s race is, huh? [**You can look like a political genius too – donate today!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37296?t=14&akid=20762%2E4449941%2EgSTY0V)
Josh Riley is only asking for contributions of up to $5,000 from individuals, federal PACs, and other federally permissible sources for End Citizens United-Nonfederal. Josh Riley is not asking for contributions in excess of that amount or any contributions from corporations, unions, or other federally prohibited sources.
---
| | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. Box 66005, Washington, D.C. 20035.
Authorized by Josh Riley for Congress.
Your contribution to FFR will be used in connection with FFR’s matching funds program to match the contributions of other contributors.
Contributions to End Citizens United Non-Federal are not tax deductible.
fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=20762%2E4449941%2EgSTY0V). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=20762%2E4449941%2EgSTY0V).**

[Click here](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails/?t=4&akid=20762%2E4449941%2EgSTY0V) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?t=15&akid=20762%2E4449941%2EgSTY0V). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Fight for Reform »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26914?t=5&akid=20762%2E4449941%2EgSTY0V)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26915?t=6&akid=20762%2E4449941%2EgSTY0V)

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Help me strike out this liberal lineup?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=554fc2968de6420c9a3e77f44a73cb95&_e=t_V7Iwrfdpehy8f_b_yyTwP0Gldq8NbV9GEvBPlOJcugpzIvY6CxsFwp0si0NvGg5By5dHG1UoeFREzzF9u6Cgxt0oxA07-4padq3QAdz293FH3v5vNjWJ59MkOE7SWXhxzdoWVyMjx4ajSd2gyq1gwx3a40WghZtFXbro7bk1IpCaVBQ2CJbFxfW5h-h_U9mci3jp8iYbcRupJkTOFh5qnHpXQLZTzReXoBY0XG-sUdTbG5HQmvo2xSzho_RAYK-sqohfRPbQVFGecR688PxgJw2LdqroWiXMaTjMt4gZofsR9DNJyiiaerw6eo8Gel5Ht55DmAehX1TW0CvuA_O4vUUiVoqwj5DNX9UnLpTP9Pi0KQ_Ki8Oa8oKTioC4a6DBdqmfsXEsKP9m5iG7LRVQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=554fc2968de6420c9a3e77f44a73cb95&_e=t_V7Iwrfdpehy8f_b_yyTwP0Gldq8NbV9GEvBPlOJcugpzIvY6CxsFwp0si0NvGg5By5dHG1UoeFREzzF9u6Cgxt0oxA07-4padq3QAdz293FH3v5vNjWJ59MkOE7SWXhxzdoWVyMjx4ajSd2gyq1gwx3a40WghZtFXbro7bk1IpCaVBQ2CJbFxfW5h-h_U9mci3jp8iYbcRupJkTOFh5qnHpXQLZTzReXoBY0XG-sUOBEPEMr_O5zLXHdF4jjbub1t-ipQMfTwcIapZU_zXPZSMOep6UZFColH2Qglb4HlrcXUO99Rp-z2mMt6ISSicW8FoPPrgRXXcZQpZ5R7R4qmJRcs3RpW2kqV-i625eYEJ5HTyoT5kwBN6YVivjGSrF7Eu0UMFJ-xnchaIJKiJTQ%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=554fc2968de6420c9a3e77f44a73cb95&_e=t_V7Iwrfdpehy8f_b_yyTwP0Gldq8NbV9GEvBPlOJcugpzIvY6CxsFwp0si0NvGg5By5dHG1UoeFREzzF9u6Cgxt0oxA07-4padq3QAdz293FH3v5vNjWJ59MkOE7SWXhxzdoWVyMjx4ajSd2gyq1gwx3a40WghZtFXbro7bk1IpCaVBQ2CJbFxfW5h-h_U9mci3jp8iYbcRupJkTOFh5qnHpXQLZTzReXoBY0XG-sVXxKQKKjcBB69Yw25oRZLscPWmIP5QWPvDy1hSBngDQQP46ZnNv_0wZmlx97WCm-w4AbaV-AyNYLyqRfvWHvCt9tnqoA1ZIqkEvlOl_KKW2iwVAsAju6OH64nj5A4yXltJZvuY2IUykUNMlOgKcME8zd6IbSe3u6R5hC9fs8zcbA%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=554fc2968de6420c9a3e77f44a73cb95&_e=t_V7Iwrfdpehy8f_b_yyTwP0Gldq8NbV9GEvBPlOJcugpzIvY6CxsFwp0si0NvGg5By5dHG1UoeFREzzF9u6Cgxt0oxA07-4padq3QAdz293FH3v5vNjWJ59MkOE7SWXhxzdoWVyMjx4ajSd2gyq1gwx3a40WghZtFXbro7bk1IpCaVBQ2CJbFxfW5h-h_U9mci3jp8iYbcRupJkTOFh5qnHpXQLZTzReXoBY0XG-sWr0AfjgDDa__BdXrLrHLRuwdTe4LAfnGA6sG88M3woUiKsRUXD_6dKZXt116ljLI0jLd2cYucwa6Szy-lMkk95LKZAPDw_zldVIohUErumxloIj4SVEaarc2dXlu8mtP8zNU3OMKYV7L_FhvV0ly75LLOkHo2erJHnlOp5rYgAvQ%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=554fc2968de6420c9a3e77f44a73cb95&_e=t_V7Iwrfdpehy8f_b_yyTwP0Gldq8NbV9GEvBPlOJcugpzIvY6CxsFwp0si0NvGg5By5dHG1UoeFREzzF9u6Cgxt0oxA07-4padq3QAdz293FH3v5vNjWJ59MkOE7SWXhxzdoWVyMjx4ajSd2gyq1gwx3a40WghZtFXbro7bk1IpCaVBQ2CJbFxfW5h-h_U9mci3jp8iYbcRupJkTOFh5qnHpXQLZTzReXoBY0XG-sXRaC5DaJmoONQSAKd5eR7oEDdXyqRq0Ve97XUK7N5EBkSLoh_ii1wX-4ELHAHGISkVwdo1-mVKbwuES8GhCbtBvOt4uost4fxoc4SNltaitvDD-AHLhijHA2zZ5Dbqt2oRR92sbBkWlupsqzvJggJEFJG1d0zAwzehQ4pP9ktefg%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate
---

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

clean_body: | | | | | | Fellow American, That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. But even before then, I've always been invested in Michigan politics. When I was 12, I started participating in YMCA's Michigan Youth in Government program.
**Most importantly, I've seen first-hand what it takes to organize and win here in Michigan – and I know that Callie's got "it."**
That's what drew me to her campaign - and why I know that **together, we're going to make history and send Rep. Bergman packing.**
But the thing about campaigns is they don't run on a wish and a prayer. I've been around the block enough times to know that grassroots support is the lifeblood of a campaign – especially up here in Mi-01.

clean_body: [ ]Tied Race Derek, Despite his unpatriotic attacks on American democracy and important freedoms like abortion rights, new polling shows Donald Trump tied with President Biden here in Wisconsin. Folks, with so much at stake, we can’t wait to take action. That’s why I’m calling on all of my supporters to mobilize to help scale up our campaign to make sure Wisconsin goes blue in November. [ ]Wisconsin is tied, and all current and future Americans are counting on us to win because if we don’t, the future of fair elections and the rights we care about will be at stake. Can I count on you to rush a donation to help us fight back and win? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. [ ]Donate $10 Now [ ]Donate $25 Now [ ]Donate $50 Now [ ]Donate $100 Now [ ]Donate $500 Now [ ]Another Amount While Donald Trump is attacking democracy on a national level, MAGA Republicans in Wisconsin continue to follow his lead. And I mean _everyone_. My hedge fund executive opponent. Her national GOP allies like Mitch McConnell. If we hold our own against my new challenger’s self-funded war chest of $500,000 and counting, Republican super PACs and mega-donors may back off. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78824633/454574297/-742709655?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.02.11_B1_Aftermath_T2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODVjZmE2YTgtMGRjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hUwKZA6KSKrPphvvUlTvo8u3DEVdDsDXPiYssA0h2Ts=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78824634/454574298/-407916182?amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.02.11_B1_Aftermath_T2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODVjZmE2YTgtMGRjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hUwKZA6KSKrPphvvUlTvo8u3DEVdDsDXPiYssA0h2Ts=) Hey there,

I'll be straight with you, I've done a lot of tough things in my life. I played college football, tried to make it in the NFL and CFL. That was tough, mentally, physically, emotionally.

I served as a Capitol police officer for over 15 years, those were tough some days.

But the aftermath of the January 6 insurrection was one of the toughest things I've been through. My pain, my trauma, it didn't end on January 7.

Even after the violence of that day, I dealt with death threats. I dealt with people harassing me for speaking out. And when I decided to testify in front of Congress? It was one of the toughest things I've ever faced. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78824635/454574299/-407916182?amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.02.11_B1_Aftermath_T2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODVjZmE2YTgtMGRjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hUwKZA6KSKrPphvvUlTvo8u3DEVdDsDXPiYssA0h2Ts=) But I did testify, because it was my duty not just as an officer, but as an American. I made a big step the day I testified for the January 6 committee. I stepped in the direction of protecting our democracy.

And honestly, I've never looked back.

[**_I'm ready to protect our democracy as a Congressman, and I need you to join me. I wouldn’t ask if this fight wasn’t absolutely critical – will you rush a donation to my campaign so I can fight for Democrats and every Marylander in District 3? It's going to be tough, but like I said, I'm no stranger to tough._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78824636/454574300/-407916182?amount=&25amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.02.11_B1_Aftermath_T2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODVjZmE2YTgtMGRjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hUwKZA6KSKrPphvvUlTvo8u3DEVdDsDXPiYssA0h2Ts=) | [RUSH $10 NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78824637/454574301/-832842128?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.02.11_B1_Aftermath_T2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODVjZmE2YTgtMGRjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hUwKZA6KSKrPphvvUlTvo8u3DEVdDsDXPiYssA0h2Ts=) | [RUSH $25 NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78824638/454574302/-407916182?amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.02.11_B1_Aftermath_T2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODVjZmE2YTgtMGRjOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hUwKZA6KSKrPphvvUlTvo8u3DEVdDsDXPiYssA0h2Ts=)

clean_body: | = = Hey there, I'll be straight with you, I've done a lot of tough things in my life. I played college football, tried to make it in the NFL and CFL. That was tough, mentally, physically, emotionally. I served as a Capitol police officer for over 15 years, those were tough some days. But the aftermath of the January 6 insurrection was one of the toughest things I've been through. My pain, my trauma, it didn't end on January 7. Even after the violence of that day, I dealt with death threats. I dealt with people harassing me for speaking out. And when I decided to testify in front of Congress? It was one of the toughest things I've ever faced. = But I did testify, because it was my duty not just as an officer, but as an American. I made a big step the day I testified for the January 6 committee. I stepped in the direction of protecting our democracy. And honestly, I've never looked back. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With love, Harry 🖤 = = | = = Harry Dunn for Congress PO Box 1449 Columbia, MD 21044 United States | mailto:info@harrydunnforcongress.com Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress

name: Dr. Jill Biden
subject: My thoughts on this week.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
| | |
---
Peter, I’ve heard from so many of you asking about the Special Counsel's report this week. Thank you for your love and support. You probably know the basics: Joe cooperated fully with a Special Counsel’s investigation and they found he did nothing wrong -- no criminal charges were warranted. [**I thought Heather Cox Richardson wrote about it eloquently here.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.SLdqY4re9NRChJwFnQ0irybX0AMCXn6oRKpS-X9TZ3gDDFG6M4szry_zUUBPYjTv9dOV6pqs_zWe7KN0kn4EFPqwfaVyEWtE8405sc2GkXe2EK0Al2bVvdM4WX65jTlQbuIIvLv9ON8tTEmaupCXog5EaIm4PlrHuE6vZjod7TlJ_Ul8LCyj9ifT5T0W1KbGEqnTgRXknHErGufqNcWrdnTAUI6FpLFw_ATROLrxklQnEEvgAlEvtZ-WQc7PAO1llGnyP8nQpcoRqNaucIIkt-iUvzQ7WFPYy5wdHjpGIdnOrU3shKMY3-Aqvaw3LASjXZ-majo7cufmZVMVITAhkLhnBpv705e4Gxn1BfJRMVY/43r/5Pv_NXf-RnyZfqHEQApSIQ/h0/h001.JlMc2tb0Un0rDDoY78XesfGfc4tWcg-M6UFRwDBEppg) The reason I’m writing is because of what else was in the report: Inaccurate and personal political attacks about Joe. Rather than just saying the case was closed, as they have for others, the Special Counsel claimed that Joe “couldn’t remember the year his son died.” Believe me, like anyone who has lost a child, Beau and his death never leave him. I hope you can imagine how it felt to read that attack -- not just as Joe’s wife, but as Beau’s mother. I don’t know what this Special Counsel was trying to achieve. We should give everyone grace, and I can’t imagine someone would try to use our son’s death to score political points. If you’ve experienced a loss like that, you know that you don’t measure it in years -- you measure it in grief. May 30th is a day forever etched on our hearts. It shattered me, it shattered our family. So many of you know that feeling after you lose a loved one, where you feel like you can’t get off the floor. What helped me, and what helped Joe, was to find purpose. That’s what keeps Joe going, serving you and the country we love. Joe is 81, that’s true, but he’s 81 doing more in an hour than most people do in a day. Joe has wisdom, empathy, and vision. He has delivered on so many of his promises as President precisely because he’s learned a lot in those 81 years. His age, with his experience and expertise, is an incredible asset and he proves it every day. Look at all he’s accomplished: He brought our country back from COVID. He brought our economy back from the brink. He created 14 million jobs. Gas prices are down. Inflation is down. Energy costs are down. He got bipartisan legislation passed -- even in the midst of this hyper-partisan environment. The media may not give him credit, but I’m thankful you realize all he’s done for this country. Joe is the most resilient person I’ve ever known. When he gets knocked down, he gets back up and gets back to work. That’s what he’s doing. It is just so meaningful to both of us to have you behind us. Your support is what keeps this campaign moving forward. At some point in our lives, we’ll all experience grief or loss. We’ll go through challenging moments and twists and turns. But we find joy together, we persevere together, and ultimately we’ll prevail together. Thank you for being part of our campaign. Love, Jill | | | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jwo48Pzlh6he5y-OY0IheoZhFy919hdCv12HrtNldlhUcmU8kNNeWqw72o-XGJveNYbTsSRWVRrsnDV1qoDEQuh4z8SdSRQ_0ORKFsKg4oW-RzrFxFonNZtdaqxVg7Ad87mMF2EQffof6kmRRC0cRW8IiMIb7pf290Z3mp0XFLAhdBJTzGeuVJ4E4Oc_SlKKpSWOvyMUjfwI6ljCGTr-k_A2x8v6cRKmXDSghCzEmP9i1fMh7rpL0nPSNBUNUxsQh2OYnvzKckUqBLsHvKcoyVOcefQ1RIDtJNz1XnL4zrqLmIYCbK5dlopxQsINwimGzDiVnLRuy8_cvrLx90U1BfHi8-4wq9hl_UNY5bwnLbSVEcNZvZ3ZRhgn-XbXFNmN77q9FhHRdr3dXyxdsXwHR3eFlTVQwuplYAQGthbcA7ua0vd00lWL9MZW2EPkSBTOox6C3JLpRF3KAjFirIBELL4JCoLU9Ns6NVmomAp85WaGS-fgXHrpDESfrzQX25QqTA8MAhoZRftXMn_sVEkV9S7/43r/5Pv_NXf-RnyZfqHEQApSIQ/h1/h001.BG6vR0Zf5zcjibjo7e7qbDaqD9j0z27dOk3RgB014sc)

We're prepared to do what it takes to push back against the grave injustices that the Radical Left impose on citizens like us. It's our time to act to preserve conservative values in this nation. Haven 't you noticed your grocery bills rising? Crime running rampant in our cities? Migrants flooding the streets and taking over our hotels, hospitals, schools, and more? True patriots like you and I know that this does not have to be the future of America. Let's return to the days where safety and freedom were guaranteed rights in our country, not put at stake by Joe Biden and his crooked cronies. ** | It's in your hands now. We must take the lead in races across the nation before it's too late. MAGA Conservatives are counting on your support. Thanks for acting quickly, Ben, Team Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Hamas Tunnel Network Discovered Under UN Agency In Gaza That Fired
Staffers Over Alleged Terror Links, IDF Says

The Israel Defense Forces (IDF) have discovered a series of tunnels
