name: Lt. Gov. Sara Rodriguez
subject: A Win for Wisconsin🏈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Rodriguez for Wisconsin
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP06/1/84281/images/SR22%20Logo%20FINAL%20%28750%20x%20750%20px%29.png]
Before running for elected office, I spent decades of my career in nursing and public health, working at some of our state’s largest health care institutions.
The health and safety of individuals in this state is why I became lieutenant governor — because every Wisconsinite deserves access to quality, affordable health care and prescription drugs that won’t break the bank.
We’re working hard to champion policies that would expand BadgerCare — but Republicans have rejected our proposals again and again.
To that, I say: ENOUGH. If you’re with me in the fight to invest in the health and well-being of Wisconsinites, help put one in the win column for Wisconsin by rushing a donation ahead of our mid-month deadline: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sr_feb]
If you have an ActBlue account, your donation will be processed immediately.
DONATE $10 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sr-eoy?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10] DONATE $20.24 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sr-eoy?express_lane=true&amount= 20.24&refcode=express_lane_ 20.24]
DONATE $50 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sr-eoy?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50] DONATE $100 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sr-eoy?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sr-eoy?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250] DONATE OTHER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sr-eoy?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
70% of Wisconsinites support expanding BadgerCare. 70%! Still, Republicans won’t budge — and today, Wisconsin is one of only ten states in the nation that hasn’t accepted expansion.
While Republican legislators continue to play politics with people’s health and insurance, I'm fighting to address the pressing issues facing our state. Right now, we once again have the opportunity to do the right thing, listen to the will of the people, and invest in the health and well-being of Wisconsinites.
And despite some GOP lawmakers saying BadgerCare expansion “will never happen,” I promise that we will not stop fighting to expand health care coverage, lower prescription costs for everyone, and protect folks from outrageous out-of-pocket expenses.
Can I count on you to help us take this fight across Wisconsin with a donation today? Any amount makes a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sr_feb]
Together, we can save lives and build the future we want to see for health care, for our state, and for each other.
Forward,
Sara
Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about our work and build a strong people-focused campaign. But if you'd still like to unsubscribe you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/bSK0S2TpB06fE82_CF0vSg2?unsubscribedata=ISCV76LS85K4FGieD11ORw4%2FOcyMJaIHYLlqfuiz0OG9aSAI%2FmJ9NMx7GvZDvlONtiP92jXI2IB4zXQQIQoQWYfYkILfXzWVABqhR02Gz6bRlMXmkhou1nUW35jj9%2FlIvMzOg6Sa7QgbTe3LfOIOLq3iDft%2FceN80DCc9AZjJEjVSw7fKow5wTjNeLpuxMxlbVz31tVPtHMvXlMOx8EsTGD%2BCLDVDcBmUNQzgo4N%2BcNgSLrTDkG%2B4WlYe6iD9Cs4cJBpMrvEZqQrDceuzwOKUmAlLI%2BpeKl1If2%2FxECdOayYtGRMkB5sLgREFD8Ubd8%2F40sRRUX5%2FbMBvZqFnK2jfYvOnmi1VbcN74tz7HE5l5qZr6zaWovTHZ1sV2zb%2B9yG2auOGGUlGQvtHnVDRaFSbhQX2aEvcRU9nJziTw0NxacvZ2vo%2FdlgGB41hTU9cLnk .

body:

| | Take a look...

Here are _a few_ highlights from last week in the Idaho Senate.

I was in the thick of it, debating AGAINST a bill that would hand Big Pharma a free pass for harmful products. Then, I stood strong FOR a bill aimed at reining in Idaho's overly powerful "Public Health Districts." Plus, I've got a quick video for you, where I talk about the importance of protecting our rights instead of finding new ways to erode them bit by bit.

>> [Watch](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=49b216b846&e=dea908e0fe "watch these 3 short clips")[ all three of these short clips](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=751b60025b&e=dea908e0fe "watch em")

[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=92ae16707c&e=dea908e0fe "watch em")

All this to drive home _**one point**_...

Myself and the Idaho Freedom Caucus are in the trenches fighting FOR YOU.

While too many are distracted by expanding government (i.e. the WRONG things), we're laser focused on defending the individual rights of Idahoans.

Stay frosty,

Brian

Hello,
After the 2022 election, I had a hard decision to make.
When I ran against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I knew we could win. No one believed me – not the Democratic party, not the Republican party, and certainly none of the political pundits.
Ultimately, though, after the recount, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country.
We were outspent heavily by Boebert and her allies. And the attacks and the vicious lies they told about me were really hard on my family – especially my two teenage children.
After we came so close to winning against Boebert, everyone expected me to run again in 2024. It seemed like a no-brainer. But it wasn’t an easy decision to put my family through what I knew was going to be an even nastier race than the last.
I spent a lot of time reaching out to supporters and donors like you, listening and getting their advice. And everyone promised me: They’d have my back. So I took a leap of faith.
Now, with Lauren Boebert having run off scared, the Super PACs are attacking me, and the smear campaign is beginning. I need your help if I’m going to have the resources it takes to finish the job and win this seat.
I made the decision to run again because I knew I could count on people like you to help me win, so it would mean so much to me if you could chip in to my campaign today:

**A MESSAGE FROM THE OFFICE OF ATTORNEY GENERAL KEN PAXTON**
Republican Patriot,

I hope you get this message before it's too late...

Texas is under attack. The Biden Administration is sending its Soros-sponsored lawyers and politicians to stop us from doing what's RIGHT and JUST.

The only thing we're doing is upholding our oath of office and putting TEXAS first.

Instead of letting us do what we were elected for, the Biden administration and RINO establishment pawns are opting to conduct open lawfare against Governor Abbott and I.

I've held true to my word -- I will hold the Biden administration accountable, AND I will continue to campaign against RINOs who tried to overrule the will of the voters.

$5 or $10 might not seem like a lot of money, but it's thanks to grassroots donations like these that I've been able to stand strong against the RINO establishment and their far-left allies.

The Biden Administration is sending its Soros-sponsored lawyers and politicians to stop us from doing what's RIGHT and JUST. The only thing we're doing is upholding our oath of office and putting TEXAS first. Instead of letting us do what we were elected for, the Biden administration and RINO establishment pawns are opting to conduct open lawfare against Governor Abbott and I. I've held true to my word -- I will hold the Biden administration accountable, AND I will continue to campaign against RINOs who tried to overrule the will of the voters. $5 or $10 might not seem like a lot of money, but it's thanks to grassroots donations like these that I've been able to stand strong against the RINO establishment and their far-left allies. | Thank you, Attorney General Ken Paxton | Ken Paxton Texas Attorney General ---|--- Pol. name: Team Kennedy
subject: Upcoming Events, Rallies, and a Special Message from RFK Jr.!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
We've got exciting news about upcoming events and rallies and a special message from RFK Jr. you won't want to miss.

|
---
| | | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_11_24_a2&n=1)
---
|
---
Upcoming Events: An Exclusive Invitation to a Memorable Experience!
Don't miss out on an opportunity to embark on an extraordinary journey with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and connect with our future President. [RSVP now!](https://www.kennedy24.com/events?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_11_24_a2&n=2)
|
* * *
---
[Upper Saddle River, New Jersey](https://www.kennedy24.com/bergen-county?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_11_24_a2&n=3) \- Saturday, February 17th at 6:30 PM
Attend an exclusive event in the Metropolitan NYC area, offering a rare opportunity for an intimate Q&A session with RFK, Jr. with hors d’oeuvres, cocktails, and photo opportunities.
[Brooklyn, New York](https://www.kennedy24.com/brooklyn-bhm-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_11_24_a2&n=4) \- Sunday, February 18th at 1:30 PM
Come join us for a Black History Month celebration where Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will present his plan for Black America. This event will feature a round table, African performers, and an interview with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. followed by Q&A.
[Los Angeles, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/night-of-laughter-la?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_11_24_a2&n=5) \- Wednesday, February 21rd at 7:30 PM
Experience an unforgettable evening of laughter as Cheryl Hines hosts _A Night of Laughter with RFK, Jr._ Secure your tickets now to enjoy performances by Tim Dillon, Rob Schneider, and more!
[Newport Beach, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/newport-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_11_24_a2&n=6) \- Saturday, February 24th at 7:30 PM
Join us at a private venue in the heart of Newport Beach for a special event. Experience an intimate Q&A session with RFK, Jr. while enjoying hors d'oeuvres, cocktails, and memorable photo opportunities.
[Las Vegas, Nevada](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-las-vegas-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_11_24_a2&n=7) \- Friday, March 8th at 6:00 PM
Please join Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and Cheryl Hines at this in-person fundraising event which includes hors d’ oeuvres and cocktails, remarks from the candidate, Q&A, and a photo opportunity.
[Austin, Texas](https://www.kennedy24.com/austin-private-dinner?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_11_24_a2&n=8) \- Friday, March 15th at 6:30 PM
Along with a very special dinner with RFK, Jr., this exclusive gathering includes business leaders, entrepreneurs, leading podcast hosts, media personalities, celebrities, and industry influencers.
|
* * *
---
RFK Jr.: The Globalists Must Be Stopped—Now!
The 250+ billionaires and millionaires who gathered at the annual World Economic Forum meeting in Switzerland this month want to commoditize our lands, our waters, our homes, our workers, our public health, and even our children.
The corporate elites’ scheme will drain what’s left in your bank account and strip-mine the beleaguered middle class of its remaining equity. Their plan is insidious—and I plan to stop it.
**My fundraising report to the FEC is due February 29th and we need to show just how strong our movement is every month.** [By donating to my campaign today,](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_11_24_a2&n=9) **you’re telling the globalists loud and clear: We’re not going to take it anymore.**
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/globalists-stopped-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_11_24_a2&n=10)
|
* * *
---
| Discover our latest [Kennedy 2024 merchandise](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=92YYov9O17-vE3x_2FgMqY7clOS3V4M0N_bQWU4eY8DgZmNXgu4AttV9MFg0k6JcR2JpbU0SSSY73_ba7eAF81VBGDm_EG8iBpER_1eW0Ik5ag5GQ5A2g3b60ZgoTu_b1kzAoQ1D2o2OIfYbyzYf8Q&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_11_24_a2&n=11), suitable for any occasion. Delve into the unique appeal of limited edition items that reflect the essence of this historic campaign. Immerse yourself in the spirit of change and progress, and join a movement that holds the power to shape the future.
---
---
* * *
Thank you for your continued support. Every dollar you give moves us one step closer to the White House.
[DONATE](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?=&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_11_24_a2&n=12)
|

[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_11_24_a2&n=18) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024!
Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House!

PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY

Would you like help donating?

subject: “he is an elderly man with poor memory.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
I could not have said it better myself | | |
---
[](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2475b3487bd7463db35aa8ab8bd0c8a1&_e=jI6UisRacS5OY2RmQsK6m7PwWOpv_GyTGU9syF7-6e_ohH5lnMx-IzP06lIOx8C3jYJFXjSm5cKUTegrlBU2WAeWcdKm5fLJRUyFlu7Pg8-4Cuz8YWHPlMzjzKEf2KDfvqptsL4uILQ6OpXkCg2R_nLIHBtfILV7IWAR9HAcqoQNlNwxOyNcrSq907yCn4D08YEyjcJcyO9jHjihHO7FHHsA-aerJ-uQ0r3E9vbT_ptte0OWXtIC3ncvZClhXDvGVNmf8PApNoeuQNg1MR7qR_aw0RyWIM1gRDemjz4fXrgYJB5oIceuNja8F90-IQz2orFGEuUVRhsnl4Fa2SYU4BD2pHbSn8JyulkEekE0UPbVaYyh_-Q8D1_xMW52JoaW_CsPv0kbBf_TZdoDqVFogXm56ZNooK22TSekuYnRDdwe4KJuBf5RCHh_w4DPogJw2V64daBajgzNctpi5cVlXA%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, Special Counsel Robert Hur was investigating the latest instance of Joe Biden jeopardizing America's national security, and after a thorough interview, this is what he found:
---
| | **["We have also considered that, at trial, Mr. Biden would likely present himself to a jury, as he did during our interview of him, as a sympathetic, well-meaning, elderly man with a poor memory," Hur wrote.](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2475b3487bd7463db35aa8ab8bd0c8a1&_e=jI6UisRacS5OY2RmQsK6m7PwWOpv_GyTGU9syF7-6e_ohH5lnMx-IzP06lIOx8C3jYJFXjSm5cKUTegrlBU2WAeWcdKm5fLJRUyFlu7Pg8-4Cuz8YWHPlMzjzKEf2KDfvqptsL4uILQ6OpXkCg2R_nLIHBtfILV7IWAR9HAcqoQNlNwxOyNcrSq907yCn4D08YEyjcJcyO9jHjihHO7FHHsA-aerJ-uQ0r3E9vbT_ptte0OWXtIC3ncvZClhXDvGVNmf8PApNoeuQNg1MR7qR_aw0RyWIM1gRDemjz4fXrgTXztGTKhobpGaaTKxkQ4f3Rv2PaZspESNdFjG_T_qwtVXBzGrz0gPiXKR6hiKsNqDL_kar-sXwYVheNkisjGzYhKTA4AHrHsx7zplbppMXAmeVAzg2N-mNYLZtnTEJeodl2P-gPGM6aEK_gLbJydbmH58tZoxLaPczxkykOSDbA%3D%3D)**
---
| | I won't mince words about this: _**[_**If Joe Biden is too incapable to be held accountable for mishandling classified information, then he is undoubtedly unfit for the Oval Office.**_](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2475b3487bd7463db35aa8ab8bd0c8a1&_e=jI6UisRacS5OY2RmQsK6m7PwWOpv_GyTGU9syF7-6e_ohH5lnMx-IzP06lIOx8C3jYJFXjSm5cKUTegrlBU2WAeWcdKm5fLJRUyFlu7Pg8-4Cuz8YWHPlMzjzKEf2KDfvqptsL4uILQ6OpXkCg2R_nLIHBtfILV7IWAR9HAcqoQNlNwxOyNcrSq907yCn4D08YEyjcJcyO9jHjihHO7FHHsA-aerJ-uQ0r3E9vbT_ptte0OWXtIC3ncvZClhXDvGVNmf8PApNoeuQNg1MR7qR_aw0RyWIM1gRDemjz4fXrg9lot_ZIAypFOOr6VSl2Qyg2R2PwHkUbwNPJwq15YQDsyfKB8jRoMfc2n3tqNoXx8rnxA_rYCL_-iKIzvLey9cZNkrafyFiCffVZQESCDoFu0XEM2b7TDDHgIcgDFQ2TwzTvXLMkGQ0PpCgWSNbA8PqLqakGXXtLIRuM2nvrXfTw%3D%3D)**_ Knowing that he and he alone holds the key to America's nuclear codes is terrifying.

You mean to tell me that a man essentially determined to be unfit to face trial, is somehow fit to be the LEADER OF THE FREE WORLD? **[That's why Republican leaders like myself are doing what the liberal Democrats and mainstream media won't: Taking Joe Biden to task, and working to ensure that he is evicted from the White House in November. ](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2475b3487bd7463db35aa8ab8bd0c8a1&_e=jI6UisRacS5OY2RmQsK6m7PwWOpv_GyTGU9syF7-6e_ohH5lnMx-IzP06lIOx8C3jYJFXjSm5cKUTegrlBU2WAeWcdKm5fLJRUyFlu7Pg8-4Cuz8YWHPlMzjzKEf2KDfvqptsL4uILQ6OpXkCg2R_nLIHBtfILV7IWAR9HAcqoQNlNwxOyNcrSq907yCn4D08YEyjcJcyO9jHjihHO7FHHsA-aerJ-uQ0r3E9vbT_ptte0OWXtIC3ncvZClhXDvGVNmf8PApNoeuQNg1MR7qR_aw0RyWIM1gRDemjz4fXriyEfVfm9zJxR0sXQPqoPc2TqhPkI7WrPjohqspszJJMStBazBzn_-YtO8ov3dChr-K46GGeeOVM-hr7Jv8LPe2o4ytRWgmVkNziWE_7ed-qOCWWAXKewCjk0KGbE8EZCBkfEYLoSgoDitIBHSto_LXSSEu1izCZOgr9NatE1iHJA%3D%3D)** But we sure could use your help. It might sound silly, but this is a David vs. Goliath scenario. Breaking through the power, favor, and endless amounts of cash that come with the Democratic machine is a steep hill to climb. But we are not slowing down.

Right now, House Republican leadership is working day-in and day-out to build the most effective grassroots conservative operation this country has ever seen.

From Connecticut to California, we are investing in candidates, in congressional districts, and in hard-working Americans like you, Friend to make sure that we grow the House majority and get this unfit President out of the Oval Office.

Will you join our movement, by clicking the link attached _**[_**HERE**_](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2475b3487bd7463db35aa8ab8bd0c8a1&_e=jI6UisRacS5OY2RmQsK6m7PwWOpv_GyTGU9syF7-6e_ohH5lnMx-IzP06lIOx8C3jYJFXjSm5cKUTegrlBU2WAeWcdKm5fLJRUyFlu7Pg8-4Cuz8YWHPlMzjzKEf2KDfvqptsL4uILQ6OpXkCg2R_nLIHBtfILV7IWAR9HAcqoQNlNwxOyNcrSq907yCn4D08YEyjcJcyO9jHjihHO7FHHsA-aerJ-uQ0r3E9vbT_ptte0OWXtIC3ncvZClhXDvGVNmf8PApNoeuQNg1MR7qR_aw0RyWIM1gRDemjz4fXrhxtEbZTTGjMMr6YvBj6S11aA0kyy2Z46Pck0_htYwMS2CgRDjan9_UQsLe_hBc-fwu63BVj4ULQOBeYtPtq_n9Qg6r-DdkXoQ0DFqdRFXnfA_Z-tlXBMiBLkvvuIbxj_m45ZeBebccmzaRGht-hN9TrkcOnU78wCDbW9BOUXI80w%3D%3D)**_? clean_body: I could not have said it better myself | | | | | Friend, Special Counsel Robert Hur was investigating the latest instance of Joe Biden jeopardizing America's national security, and after a thorough interview, this is what he found: | | | | I won't mince words about this: Knowing that he and he alone holds the key to America's nuclear codes is terrifying. You mean to tell me that a man essentially determined to be unfit to face trial, is somehow fit to be the LEADER OF THE FREE WORLD? But we sure could use your help. It might sound silly, but this is a David vs. Goliath scenario. Breaking through the power, favor, and endless amounts of cash that come with the Democratic machine is a steep hill to climb. But we are not slowing down. Right now, House Republican leadership is working day-in and day-out to build the most effective grassroots conservative operation this country has ever seen. From Connecticut to California, we are investing in candidates, in congressional districts, and in hard-working Americans like you, Friend to make sure that we grow the House majority and get this unfit President out of the Oval Office. Will you join our movement, by clicking the link attached ? Thank you for your time and investment in America's future, Mike Johnson, Speaker of the House
